title: Backend Engineer, Privy
description: Who we are About Privy Our mission is to make privacy and user ownership the default online. We build simple, flexible developer tooling that make it easy to build products that put users first. By leveraging modern cryptography, we shift the status quo around digital ownership and protect the accounts and assets of millions of users. Learn more about Privy: Privy and Stripe: Bringing crypto to everyone What you’ll do Engineering at Privy is not just about writing world-class code. We create software that turns complex technical systems into delightful developer tools. We assemble tried-and-true primitives into intuitive, responsive APIs and beautiful interfaces. We believe in open-source work and transparency with our teammates and users. We encourage each other to think big, run experiments and follow our curiosity so we can build better tooling that lets developers shine and empower their users. Who you are Minimum Requirements 8+ years of experience building and maintaining a production system at scale An understanding of modern API development best practices and design Experience in building data models, managing database migrations and best practices, and infrastructure configuration An ability to thrive in a fast paced environment. A growth mindset and a constant curiosity and fearlessness to dive into the unknown. An ability to write maintainable, well-tested, modular code, but also be pragmatic about moving fast. Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including the ability to write clear technical documentation. Preferred Qualifications Experience in an API-driven business within payments, fintech, or crypto Built or contributed to open-source developer tooling Published work (open source code, talks, blog posts, etc.) Experience working with blockchain protocols and designing or interacting with smart contracts Experience in authentication, identity, or security In-office expectations Office-assigned Stripes in most of our locations are currently expected to spend at least 50% of the time in a given month in their local office or with users. This expectation may vary depending on role, team and location. For example, Stripes in Stripe Delivery Center roles in Mexico City, Mexico, Bengaluru, India, and Dublin, Ireland work 100% from the office. Also, some teams have greater in-office attendance requirements, to appropriately support our users and workflows, which the hiring manager will discuss. This approach helps strike a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility when possible. Pay and benefits The annual US base salary range for this role is $224,000 - $336,000. For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings ("OTE") range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonuses target and annual base salary for the role. This salary range may be inclusive of several career levels at Stripe and will be narrowed during the interview process based on a number of factors, including the candidate’s experience, qualifications, and location. Applicants interested in this role and who are not located in the US may request the annual salary range for their location during the interview process. Additional benefits for this role may include: equity, company bonus or sales commissions/bonuses; 401(k) plan; medical, dental, and vision benefits; and wellness stipends.

title: Software Engineer - Backend
description: P-1317 At Databricks, we are passionate about enabling data teams to solve the world's toughest problems — from making the next mode of transportation a reality to accelerating the development of medical breakthroughs. We do this by building and running the world's best data and AI infrastructure platform so our customers can use deep data insights to improve their business. Founded by engineers — and customer obsessed — we leap at every opportunity to solve technical challenges, from designing next-gen UI/UX for interfacing with data to scaling our services and infrastructure across millions of virtual machines. And we're only getting started. As a software engineer with a backend focus, you will work with your team to build infrastructure and products for the Databricks platform at scale. The Impact You'll Have Our backend teams span many domains across our essential service platforms. For instance, you might work on challenges such as: Problems that span from product to infrastructure including: distributed systems, at-scale service architecture and monitoring, workflow orchestration, and developer experience. Deliver reliable and high performance services and client libraries for storing and accessing humongous amount of data on cloud storage backends, e.g., AWS S3, Azure Blob Store. Build reliable, scalable services, e.g. Scala, Kubernetes, and data pipelines, e.g. Spark, Databricks, to power the pricing infrastructure that serves millions of cluster-hours per day and develop product features that empower customers to easily view and control platform usage. What We Look For BS (or higher) in Computer Science, or a related field 2+ years of production level experience in one of: Java, Scala, C++, or similar language. Experience developing large-scale distributed systems. Experience working on a SaaS platform or with Service-Oriented Architectures. Good knowledge of SQL. About Databricks Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on Twitter, LinkedIn and Facebook. Benefits At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region, please visit https://www.mybenefitsnow.com/databricks. Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics. Compliance If access to export-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.

title: Unilog - Senior UI Developer - Vue.js
description: Description : Principal Engineer -UI Location : Bangalore/Mysore/Remote Job Type : Full-time Department : Software R&D Job Summary We are seeking an experienced Senior UI Developer with strong expertise in Vue.js and Java to design and develop scalable, high-performance user interfaces for Unilog platforms. This role involves building complex, metadata-driven applications, collaborating closely with backend, product, and UX teams, and developing reusable UI components driven by metadata. The candidate will be owning the development and maintenance of Unilog custom CMS platform. The ideal candidate will ensure high standards of usability, performance, scalability, and maintainability across the platform. Key Responsibilities within the UI framework for reducing the pageload time Optimize application performance for large datasets and complex UI interactions Integrate frontend components with REST APIs / GraphQL Ensure cross-browser compatibility and responsive design Use AI for building components within Unilog CMS platform Build AI capabilities within CMS platform. Build capabilities within Unilog CMS framework to convert third party VueJs components compatible with the Unilog CMS Implement role-based access control and UI-level validations Write clean, reusable, testable, and maintainable code Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and UI design decisions Mentor junior UI developers and enforce frontend best practices Collaborate with backend, QA, DevOps, and Product teams in an agile environment Mandatory Skills 8 + years of experience in frontend/UI development Strong expertise in Vue.js and Java Proficient in JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript Strong experience with : HTML5, CSS3, SCSS Responsive and adaptive design Experience working with metadata-driven applications (dynamic forms, attributes, schemas) Experience consuming RESTful APIs Strong understanding of state management (Redux / Zustand / Context) Familiarity with UI performance optimization techniques Experience with GitLab, code versioning, and CI/CD pipelines Understanding of Agile/Scrum development practices Good To Have Prior experience in Ecommerce / MDM / CMS platforms Experience complex data models Knowledge in building deployment pipelines. Knowledge of GraphQL Experience with Micro-servises architecture Familiarity with UI testing frameworks (ReactJs, AngularJS, Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress) Exposure to accessibility standards (WCAG) About Our Benefits Unilog offers a competitive total rewards package including competitive salary, multiple medical, dental, and vision plans to meet all our employees needs, career development, advancement opportunities, annual merit, a generous time-off policy, and a flexible work environment. Unilog is committed to building the best team and we are committed to fair hiring practices where we hire people for their potential and advocate for diversity, equity, and inclusion. As such, we do not discriminate or make decisions based on your race, color, religion, creed, ancestry, sex, national origin, age, disability, familial status, marital status, military status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity, or expression, or any other protected class. title: Frontend Developer - Vue.js
description:
Location: Coimbatore Experience: 5+ Years The Mission: Engineering the Agentic Finance Engine We are architecting the real-time, cognitive infrastructure that allows financial data to self-reconcile across distributed environments through agentic systems. The industry is reaching a tipping point: shifting from static records to autonomous, agentic systems. We are building the specialized middleware—combining high-performance system languages and low-latency event buses—to make this transition possible. We aren't looking for feature-builders; we are looking for the architects who want to build the agentic backbone of this new ecosystem. The foundation is being laid now. If you prefer solving deep consistency and concurrency problems of autonomous systems over moving pixels, this is the environment you've been looking for. Core Responsibilities ● Architecture & Design: Lead the architectural design of complex Single Page Applications (SPAs) and Progressive Web Apps (PWAs), ensuring a modular, maintainable, and scalable frontend structure. ● Composition API Mastery: Architect re-usable logic using Composables, moving away from legacy Options API patterns to create a clean, "functional-first" codebase. ● State Management: Design and optimize global state strategies using Pinia, ensuring predictable data flow and high performance in data-heavy environments. ● Performance Engineering: Own Core Web Vitals and frontend performance; implement advanced code-splitting, lazy loading, and Vapor Mode (Virtual-DOM-less) optimizations to ensure sub-second interactivity. ● Design System Integration: Collaborate with UX/UI teams to build and maintain high-quality, accessible (A11y) component libraries using tools like Storybook and Tailwind CSS. ● Cross-Platform Delivery: Utilize frameworks like Quasar or Capitator to deploy and maintain high-performance versions of applications across Web, Desktop, and Mobile. ● Full-Stack Integration: Architect the contract between frontend and backend, ensuring seamless integration with REST/GraphQL APIs and managing complex client-side caching strategies. ● Code Quality & Mentorship: Establish frontend best practices, conduct rigorous code reviews, and mentor mid-level developers in modern reactive patterns and TypeScript best practices. Technical Qualifications ● Expert Vue Knowledge: 5+ years of experience with Vue.js, with deep expertise in Vue 3/4, syntax, and the internal reactivity system.

● TypeScript Mastery: Proficiency in advanced TypeScript (Generics, Utility Types, Type

Guards) to ensure end-to-end type safety across the application.

● Ecosystem Proficiency: Expert-level experience with the modern Vue stack: Vite,

Vitest, Vue Router, and Nuxt 4.

● Modern CSS: Mastery of Tailwind CSS, CSS Variables, and responsive design patterns

(Grid, Flexbox, Container Queries).

● Testing Discipline: Strong experience in "Behavioral Testing" using Vitest for unit logic

and Playwright or Cypress for E2E user-flow validation.

● Build Tooling: Deep understanding of modern build pipelines, including

ESLint/Prettier configurations, CI/CD integration, and bundle analysis.

● State & Data Handling: Experience handling real-time data streaming

(WebSockets/SSE) and complex form state validation (VeeValidate/Zod).

● Soft Skills: Strong communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical

"frontend" trade-offs into business-level decisions for stakeholders

description: 【仕事内容】 事業を成長させるVue.js/Nuxt.jsエンジニアです。 アプリケーション開発をプロダクトマネージャーと協力しながら行っていただきます。Squadの形で動いているため、少人数のチームで素早く、設計～開発～テスト、運用まで一貫して携わることができます。 メイン以外の言語・FWを触って頂く機会も豊富です。 【具体的には】 ・Vue.js、Nuxt.jsを用いたANDPADの新規機能設計・開発及び機能改善 ・既存サービスのAngular1環境からVue/NuxtのSPA環境への移行 ・顧客業務に寄り添ったUIの実装とUXの向上 ・他エンジニアの設計レビュー・コードレビュー ・DX推進を実現する、顧客業務に寄り添ったUIの実装とUXの向上 【開発環境】 ・開発言語：TypeScript、HTML、CSS ・フレームワーク：Vue.js、Nuxt.js ・インフラ： AWS、GCP ・Knowledge Tool：Confluence / esa ・VCS：GitHub ・その他：Slack / Jira / Trello 【求める人材】 ・アンドパッドのミッションとバリューへの共感 ・Vue.jsやNuxt.jsなどでの開発経験 ・Webの動作原理やブラウザの違いに関する知識と説明能力 ・Webアプリケーションのセキュリティ知識 ・各種フレームワークを使用した開発・運用経験 【給与】 年収600~800万円,※職務経験を考慮のうえ決定いたします。 【勤務地】 東京都港区 【勤務時間】 10:00～19:00 【雇用・契約形態】 【待遇・福利厚生】 通勤手当 住宅手当 残業手当 出張手当 サークル支援金制度 インフルエンザ予防接種費用負担 結婚・出産祝い金制度 近隣住宅手当（※地域により金額は異なる） リモートワーク手当 【休日・休暇】 慶弔休暇 年末年始 夏期休暇 有給休暇 完全週休二日制（土日祝）特別休暇（入社当日に、３日付与／半年後消滅）

title: Desarrollador/a Front VUE.js 3
description: Descripción de la empresa Inetum es líder europeo en servicios digitales. Las soluciones de Inetum tienen como objetivo contribuir al rendimiento y la innovación de sus clientes, así como al bien común. Presente en 19 países con una densa red de centros, Inetum se asocia con los principales fabricantes de software para afrontar los retos de la transformación digital desde la proximidad y flexibilidad. Nuestros 28.000 atletas digitales están orgullosos de haberse certificado Top Employer Europe 2026. Descripción del empleo Buscamos un perfil apasionado/a en las tecnologías front para iniciativas en entorno bancario, con sólida experiencia en desarrollo de interfaces modernas utilizando Vue.js 3 , capaz de construir aplicaciones web eficientes, escalables y con alto nivel de usabilidad. Dominio completo de JavaScript , HTML5 , CSS3 y un profundo entendimiento de arquitectura front, componentes, estado y rendimiento en aplicaciones SPA. 🛠️ Competencias Técnicas Clave Frameworks y Librerías ✔️ Vue.js 3 (Composition API, Options API, componentes, mixins, composables) ✔️ Vue Router, Pinia o Vuex ✔️ Ecosistema Vite / Webpack ✔️ Experiencia con UI frameworks: Vuetify, Element Plus, Tailwind o similar Lenguajes y Tecnologías ✔️ JavaScript (ES6+) ✔️ HTML5 ✔️ CSS3 / SASS / SCSS ✔️ Manejo de APIs REST y consumo mediante Axios o Fetch Herramientas de desarrollo ✔️ Git / Gitflow ✔️ Node.js + npm/yarn/pnpm ✔️ Testing con Vitest / Jest / Cypress ✔️ Control de calidad: ESLint, Prettier Requisitos Formación y Experiencia Formación técnica o universitaria en informática, ingeniería o similar (no imprescindible si la experiencia es equivalente). 7+ años de experiencia demostrable en desarrollo front-end. 2+ años de Experiencia comprobada trabajando con Vue 2 y 3 en proyectos reales. Habilidades Blandas Deseadas Capacidad analítica y resolución de problemas. Comunicación clara y trabajo en equipo. Mentalidad de mejora continua. Autonomía y proactividad en entornos ágiles (Scrum / Kanban). Información adicional ¿Qué ofrecemos? 👩🏼‍🎓 Programa de formación por parte de la empresa para que puedas seguir desarrollándote y promocionar dentro del plan de carrera que existe para ti. ✍🏼 Contrato indefinido y estabilidad. 💵 Retribución flexible y más beneficios 🕓 Flexibilidad horaria. 💻 Modalidad de teletrabajo híbrida. 🚀 Te ofrecemos un entorno dinámico, en el que tu plan de carrera y crecimiento será nuestro objetivo. 💝 Buen ambiente de trabajo, abiertos e inclusivos. 🙋‍♀️ Formarás parte de un gran equipo de profesionales con inquietud y motivación por la tecnología.

title: Senior Vue.js Engineer
description: We’re seeking a skilled Senior Vue.js Engineer to build responsive web applications at EPAM Vietnam. In this role, you will build scalable and user-friendly web applications using Vue.js and TypeScript. You will partner closely with DevOps and cloud teams to support reliable deployments and day-to-day operations on Microsoft Azure. Responsibilities Develop and maintain responsive front-end applications using Vue.js and TypeScript Collaborate with designers and product managers to deliver intuitive user experiences Write unit and integration tests using Playwright and other testing frameworks Containerize front-end applications with Docker and orchestrate deployments using Kubernetes (AKS) Work with DevOps to manage CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI/CD Deploy and monitor applications on Azure Cloud with Datadog and Azure Log Analytics Ensure code quality and security compliance using Renovate and MIC Compliance Framework Participate in code reviews, design discussions and Agile ceremonies Contribute to back-end microservices when needed Requirements Strong proficiency in Vue.js and TypeScript Experience with Playwright or similar testing tools for front-end automation Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes (AKS) Familiarity with GitLab Enterprise for repository management and CI/CD pipelines Understanding of monitoring tools such as Datadog and Azure Log Analytics Knowledge of deployment using Helm Solid grasp of software development best practices and Agile methodologies Strong problem-solving and communication skills Experience working with Golang-based microservices is a plus We offer By choosing EPAM Vietnam, you're getting a job at a Vietnam Best Workplace™ certified company (2022-23 and 2023-24) You'll work with the latest and most advanced technologies on exciting global projects with a supportive multicultural team where your voice matters We prioritize a healthy work-life balance with a flexible hybrid working model and generous annual leave of up to 19 days We offer a transparent career path and an individual roadmap to engineer your future & accelerate your journey At EPAM, you can find vast opportunities for self-development: access to over 25,000 online courses and libraries from industry leaders, English classes, mentoring programs, partial grants of certification, and experience exchange with colleagues around the world. You will learn, contribute, and grow with us Life at EPAM EPAM Systems, Inc. (EPAM) is a leading digital transformation services and product engineering company. Since 1993, we have used our software engineering expertise to become a leading global provider of digital engineering, cloud and AI-enabled transformation services, and a leading business and experience consulting partner for global enterprises and ambitious startups. We address our clients’ transformation challenges by fusing EPAM Continuum’s integrated strategy, experience and technology consulting with our 30+ years of engineering execution to speed our clients’ time to market and drive greater value from their innovations and digital investments. Established in 2019, EPAM Vietnam has been constantly expanding our team and capabilities with two offices in Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi. We offer a multicultural environment where our tech talents can proactively develop world-class solutions directly with international clients. At EPAM Vietnam, we adopt a global growth strategy, thinking and acting like start-ups, working in multi-disciplinary teams, and delivering results. You’ll find interesting challenges typically dealt with at a start-up, yet you’ll be in a highly professional corporate setting. Learn more at www.epam.com and follow us on facebook. How we hire Here, we summarize the typical journey to finding a job within EPAM: Step 1: General interview with our talent attraction specialist Step 2: Technical interview with our technology experts* Step 3: Manager interview with a hiring manager Step 4: Client interview** And you are ready to join the team! Not sure if you meet all the requirements? No problem. Let’s talk anyway and find out more! It takes 1 min of application to start the journey with us. Apply now! *Certain positions may necessitate entry tests tailored to specific client and project requirements. **A project-specific interview may precede the client interview to assess project fit.

title: Front-end Developer - Vue.js
description: 🚨 Estamos contratando: Desarrollador/a Frontend Senior – Vue.js Contrato directo con empresa final, compañía tecnológica con proyectos digitales en crecimiento. ¿Te motiva crear interfaces modernas, escalables y bien diseñadas? ¿Disfrutas trabajando con Vue.js en entornos técnicos exigentes y con buenas prácticas de desarrollo? Escribir y mantener tests unitarios (Jest, Karma, Jasmine). Aplicar buenas prácticas de código (clean code, estándares y revisiones). Se valorará especialmente Formación en Ingeniería Informática o similar. Experiencia con librerías de mapas (Google Maps, Leaflet, OpenLayers). Conocimientos en React y/o Angular . Uso de herramientas como ESLint, SonarQube, Webpack o Vite . Experiencia con TypeScript y Docker . Nivel de inglés B2 . Condiciones Ubicación: Barcelona Modalidad: Híbrido (60% remoto – 2 días en oficina) Rango salarial: 35.000 € – 50.000 € brutos anuales (según experiencia) Beneficios Contrato directo con cliente final. Horario flexible y conciliación.

title: Frontend developer (React)
description: 📍 Paris (hybrid) | 🗣️ English C1/C2 – French B2+ | 💼 Permanent contract (CDI) Join Pixid, an HR scale-up at the crossroads of SaaS, data, and employee experience, rapidly expanding across Europe. We help companies digitalize the management of their talents and partners through powerful, intuitive solutions. And to support our growth, we’re hiring a React Frontend Developer . Pixid is entering an ambitious transformation phase and is looking for the next builders of this change! The platform is highly configurable and used by multiple international stakeholders, making the challenge particularly stimulating . PIXID manages more than 222,000 companies connected to over 12,000 temporary work agencies. Each month, they exchange more than 2.5 million documents , representing a purchasing volume estimated at nearly €11 billion ! Join our Squad working in Agile as we build next-generation micro-services using cutting-edge technologies. You’ll develop scalable, secure services while promoting engineering best practices and contributing to our event-driven architecture. We're looking for a passionate Frontend Developer (Individual Contributor). You'll collaborate within a cross-functional squad to build and improve React applications in our monorepo, following best practices and contributing to our frontend modernization through hands-on delivery. You’ll work in an Agile Scrum squad to deliver high-quality frontends and services. You’ll refine user stories with the Product Owner, contribute to UX decisions, and collaborate with backend engineers to define and consume clear API contracts. Key Responsibilities Coding Standards & Reviews : Contribute to frontend best practices, participate in code reviews, and apply sound architectural patterns in React applications Upgrade Contributions : Implement and validate React upgrades in specific apps, including refactors and automated tests Quality Engineering : Write unit, integration, and E2E tests; help maintain healthy coverage and CI stability (Jest/Karma/Cypress) UX Collaboration : Partner with Product and Design to refine user flows, ensure accessibility, and tune performance Design System Contribution : Build and document reusable React components in Storybook and consume the design system consistently Monorepo Workflow : Contribute to Yarn workspace-based libraries and build optimizations; maintain shared utilities and tooling Incremental Migration : Implement micro-frontend modules and adapters to gradually replace legacy UI features 6+ years of frontend development with 4+ years of React expertise (React 19+) Proven experience leading React version migrations in enterprise environments Strong understanding of testing strategies (Jest, Karma, Cypress) with emphasis on code coverage Experience with monorepo tools (Nx, Lerna, Yarn workspaces) and multi-app architectures Expertise in design systems and component library development (leveraging existing design systems) Proficiency with Storybook for component documentation and testing Strong UX sensibility and experience challenging design decisions for better user outcomes Experience with state management patterns Nice to Have Experience with micro-frontend architectures (Module Federation, Single-SPA) Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA) Performance optimization expertise (Core Web Vitals, bundle optimization) Experience with CI/CD pipelines for frontend applications Familiarity with backend technologies for full-stack collaboration HR Screening Technical Interview with the Head of Engineering Home Case study Culture fit interview with HRD and CTO 🏆 Offer! Ready to leave your mark on the transformation of a strong, market-established SaaS? Join us and be part of the journey!

title: UI React/UX Developer

description: About The Role Synechron is seeking an experienced Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in React.js and Node.js to join our dynamic development team. You will work closely with product, design, and engineering teams to deliver solutions that support business goals and continuous technology improvement. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable and responsive web applications using React.js and Node.js Collaborate with product managers, UX/UI designers, and backend teams to deliver innovative features and functionality Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following established coding standards and best practices Participate in code reviews, providing constructive feedback and ensuring code quality Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve application defects, performance issues, and production incidents Contribute to continuous improvement of development processes, tools, and engineering standards Stay current with emerging web technologies and recommend best practices and tools for adoption Support the definition of technical solutions aligned with business requirements and user needs Required Qualifications & Experience 5+ years of hands-on experience in full-stack development with strong focus on React.js and Node.js Proven experience building and optimize performance Contribute to technical documentation and engineering standards Education & Certifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field title: REACT FRONTEND DEVELOPER
description: BŪDAMAS KOMANDOS DALIMI TU: Vystysi ir tobulinsi e. komercijos platformos frontend sprendimus, naudodamas React ir Next.js; Prisidėsi prie frontend architektūros formavimo ir vystymo principų kūrimo; Integruosi frontend sprendimus su backend API (REST / GraphQL); Dalyvausi visame funkcionalumo kūrimo procese – nuo reikalavimų analizės iki sprendimų paleidimo vartotojams; Užtikrinsi kuriamo kodo kokybę, našumą ir palaikomumą; Glaudžiai bendradarbiausi su backend programuotojais, analitikais ir kitais komandos nariais; Dalyvausi kodo peržiūrose (code reviews) bei prisidėsi prie komandos praktikų tobulinimo; Testuosi sukurtus funkcionalumus ir užtikrinsi jų atitikimą reikalavimams; Analizuosi esamus sprendimus ir teiksi pasiūlymus jų gerinimui. IŠ TAVĘS TIKIMĖS: Bent 4 metų patirties kuriant frontend sprendimus su React; Tvirtos praktinės patirtis dirbant su TypeScript; Gerų JavaScript (ES6+), HTML ir CSS žinių; Išmanymo apie TailwindCSS ar kitus stilizavimo sprendimus; Patirties integruojant frontend su REST ar GraphQL API; Supratimo apie komponentinį programavimą ir frontend architektūros principus; Praktikos dirbant su state management įrankiais (pvz., Zustand ar pan.); Susipažinimo su TanStack įrankiais (pvz., TanStack Query); Gebėjimo rašyti švarų, palaikomą ir testuojamą kodą; Darbo patirties su Git versijų kontrolės sistema; Savarankiškumo ir gebėjimo efektyviai dirbti komandoje; Gerų anglų kalbos žinių (raštu ir žodžiu). PRIVALUMAS, BET NE BŪTINYBĖ: Patirtis su testavimo įrankiais (Jest, React Testing Library); Patirtis dirbant su e-komercijos projektais; Supratimas apie web aplikacijų našumo optimizavimą; Patirtis dirbant su monorepo (pvz., Turborepo); Patirtis dirbant su Blazor; Patirtis dirbant su Payload CMS. KO GALI TIKĖTIS IŠ MŪSŲ? Papildomo sveikatos draudimo – rūpinkis savimi; Hibridinio darbo modelio + modernaus biuro – dirbk patogiai; PROMO Cash & Carry nuolaidų kortelės – kasdieniai pirkiniai palankesnėmis sąlygomis; Specialių kainų Officeday parduotuvėse – geresnės galimybės; Partnerių naudų: sveikata, grožis, pramogos – mėgaukis gyvenimu; Stiprios profesionalų komandos - augink savo kompetencijas; Karjeros galimybių – tavo motyvacija bus pastebėta. Spustelėję „Siųsti savo CV“ sutinkate, jog Jūsų asmens duomenys, pateikti gyvenimo aprašyme ir kituose pagal šį darbo skelbimą pateiktuose dokumentuose, bus renkami, tvarkomi ir saugomi vadovaujantis Bendruoju duomenų apsaugos reglamentu bei UAB „Sanitex“ privatumo politika. Atlyginimas 2100-2800 €/mėn. atskaičius mokesčius Galutinis darbo užmokestis yra aptariamas pokalbio metu ir priklauso nuo kandidato kompetencijų bei patirties, o vėliau nuo rezultatų. Jeigu kyla klausimų - bendraukime! Sandra | Personalo vadybininkė sandra.ku@sanitex.eu

title: React Developer
description: React / TypeScript Developer 🎨 Build Interfaces That Power Healthcare 📍 Location: Republic of Georgia based, remote 🔎 Why Pharmbills? Every great healthcare platform needs an intuitive and reliable user interface. At Pharmbills, we create digital experiences that make complex processes simple and efficient for healthcare providers. With 1,200+ team members across 7 countries, we bring together technology and purpose—because better tools mean better care. 🎯 What’s This Opportunity About? We’re looking for a React / TypeScript Developer who can independently own and deliver features from concept to production. You’ll submerge in a modern development environment, contributing to scalable and maintainable UI solutions. 💡 Because great user experiences help healthcare teams work smarter. 🔥 What’s in It for You? ✅ A stable, long-term cooperation opportunity. ✅ Ownership of meaningful features from idea to delivery. ✅ A modern tech stack and engineering-driven culture. ✅ Collaboration with international teams and U.S. clients. ✅ Opportunities to grow your frontend expertise. 👤 What You’ll Be Doing: ✔️ Developing and maintaining front-end features using React and TypeScript. ✔️ Owning medium-sized features from planning to delivery. ✔️ Writing clean, maintainable, and well-structured code. ✔️ Implementing unit tests and contributing to code quality. ✔️ Collaborating in standups, planning sessions, and code reviews. ✔️ Engaging with Git in a branch-based workflow (PRs, feature branches). ✔️ Building reusable UI components using libraries like MUI. ✔️ Managing state with tools like Redux or similar. ✔️ Communicating clearly with team members about progress and blockers. 📚 What You Bring to the Table: ✅ 2+ years of experience with React and TypeScript. ✅ Experience writing unit tests. ✅ Familiarity with state management tools (Redux, Zustand, Recoil, etc.). ✅ Experience with UI component libraries (MUI, Chakra, Ant Design, etc.). ✅ Ability to independently deliver medium-sized features. ✅ Experience with Git workflows (branches, PRs, reviews). ✅ Strong communication skills. ✅ English proficiency (B2+). ⭐ Nice to Have: ✨ Experience with E2E testing (Cypress, Playwright). ✨ Experience contributing to design systems or component libraries. ✨ Knowledge of React performance optimization techniques. 🤍 Why You’ll Love It Here: ✨ A product-focused environment where your work is visible and impactful. ✨ A team that values clean code, ownership, and collaboration. ✨ A chance to build tools that support real healthcare professionals. 📩 Ready to create interfaces that make a real impact? Let’s talk! 🚀

title: Estágio em Desenvolvimento Fullstack (Node.js / PHP)
description: Na Azapfy, acreditamos que a tecnologia é uma ferramenta poderosa, mas o que realmente sustenta nossa evolução é o lado humano das coisas. Estamos em busca de um(a) estagiário(a) que deseje construir uma carreira sólida como Fullstack, unindo proatividade, vontade de aprender e uma visão voltada para a resolução de problemas reais. Buscamos alguém que não apenas execute tarefas, mas que tenha a atitude de buscar entender o \"porquê\" das coisas, colaborando com o time de forma transparente e empática. Responsabilidades e Atribuições Requisitos e Qualificações Diferenciais O que oferecemos Auxiliar no desenvolvimento e manutenção de sistemas back-end utilizando PHP com o framework Laravel. Participar ativamente na implementação de novos módulos e serviços utilizando Node.js com NestJS e TypeScript. Apoiar o desenvolvimento de interfaces e funcionalidades no front-end, integrando com nossas APIs. Colaborar na manutenção e estruturação de bancos de dados relacionais e não-relacionais, como MongoDB e PostgreSQL. Identificar e corrigir bugs, garantindo a qualidade e o bom funcionamento das aplicações. Participar de reuniões técnicas e code reviews, focando no aprendizado contínuo e na troca de conhecimento com o time. Documentar soluções implementadas para facilitar a manutenção e o crescimento do ecossistema técnico. Estar cursando graduação em Engenharia de Software, Ciência da Computação, Sistemas de Informação ou áreas correlatas. Base sólida em lógica de programação e algoritmos. Conhecimento inicial em JavaScript/TypeScript e/ou PHP. Familiaridade com bancos de dados (SQL ou NoSQL). Noções básicas de versionamento de código com Git. Proatividade elevada e facilidade de comunicação para atuar em um ambiente colaborativo. Conhecimento prévio ou interesse em aprender o framework NestJS. Familiaridade com o framework Laravel. Noções de containerização utilizando Docker. Conhecimento básico em metodologias ágeis e Clean Code. Interesse por testes automatizados e arquitetura de sistemas. Ambiente que prioriza o bem-estar e o acolhimento das pessoas. Mentoria técnica e oportunidade real de atuar em projetos que impactam a logística nacional. Liberdade para propor melhorias e participar da escolha de tecnologias. Possibilidade de efetivação e plano de carreira voltado para desenvolvimento Fullstack. Bolsa estágio competitiva. Vale Transporte. Seguro de Vida.

title: Backend Engineer (Node.js / TypeScript)
description: Backend Engineer (Node.js / TypeScript) — AI-First SaaS | ListKit ListKit is a B2B lead generation platform processing 825M+ records, helping businesses find and reach their ideal customers. We're hiring a Backend Engineer to own critical services powering our data enrichment pipeline, order processing, and API infrastructure. This is a backend-heavy role. We have a strong frontend team — we need someone who lives in Node.js, thinks in async patterns, and knows their way around cloud infrastructure and large-scale databases. What makes us different: We're an AI-first engineering team. Claude Code isn’t an optional extra — it’s how we build. We track AI adoption, estimate all work assuming AI-assisted development, and expect engineers to ship faster because of it. If that excites you, read on. What You'll Do: Design and build backend services in Node.js/TypeScript for data enrichment, order processing, and API infrastructure Own async processing pipelines, including message queues, job lifecycle management, retries, and completion detection Work with GCP (Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, Cloud Tasks, Firestore) to build event-driven, scalable systems Optimize SQL queries across 100M+ row tables (SingleStore, SQL Server, PostgreSQL) Integrate third-party APIs with rate limiting, provider fallback, and robust error recovery Build REST APIs for internal teams and external customers Use AI development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) as a core part of your workflow Requirements: 4+ years of backend experience with Node.js/TypeScript in production Strong understanding of async patterns (Promises, event loop, streaming) Experience with message queues (Pub/Sub, SQS, Kafka, or similar) Solid SQL skills, including complex JOINs, query optimization, and stored procedures Experience with a cloud platform (GCP preferred; AWS/Azure transferable) Active use of AI coding tools (Claude, Cursor, Copilot) Strong written English for async-first communication Nice to Have: Experience with GCP services (Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, Cloud Tasks, Firestore) Terraform or other Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) experience Background in data enrichment, lead generation, or sales automation platforms Experience with Stripe billing integration Ability to read or work with .NET/C# codebases Experience designing multi-tenant SaaS APIs

title: Node.js Developer
description: We are seeking a skilled Node.js Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable backend applications and APIs. You will work closely with front‑end engineers, product managers, and DevOps to deliver high‑performance, secure, and reliable systems. 🎯 Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain RESTful & GraphQL APIs using Node.js (Express/NestJS). Design scalable, secure, and high‑performance backend architectures. Integrate third‑party services, SDKs, and external APIs. Write reusable, well‑structured, clean, and tested code. Implement authentication & authorization (JWT, OAuth2, Sessions). Optimize performance, caching, memory usage, and API response times. Work with databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis). Implement security best practices (OWASP, input validation, rate limiting). Collaborate with front‑end teams for API integration. Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and architecture discussions. Maintain CI/CD workflows and containerized deployments (Docker, Kubernetes). 🧰 Required Skills & Experience 2–5+ years of experience in Node.js development. Strong knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript . Hands‑on experience with Express.js , NestJS , or similar frameworks. Solid understanding of asynchronous programming and event-driven architecture. Experience with databases: MongoDB / Mongoose PostgreSQL / MySQL Redis (optional) Strong understanding of REST APIs , WebSockets, and microservices. Familiarity with Git , CI/CD tools, and Docker. Understanding of error handling , logging , and monitoring . Knowledge of security fundamentals (CORS, CSRF, XSS, token security). 💡 Nice-to-Have Experience working with AWS / GCP / Azure cloud services. Knowledge of Serverless (AWS Lambda) . Experience with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS). Exposure to unit testing & integration testing (Jest, Mocha, Supertest). Experience with agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).

title: Backend Engineer
description: Ready to scale your career in a high-growth scale up where your results drive real world change? We’re Sensorfact , Europe’s #1 smart monitoring platform for the industry , on a mission to make industry smarter, cleaner, and more efficient. Every day, our technology helps thousands of manufacturers cut energy waste, reduce costs, and lower carbon emissions through intelligent data insights and automation. Today, we’ve joined forces with ABB, a global leader in electrification and automation. This partnership has propelled us onto the world stage, enabling us to expand rapidly and help more businesses optimize their energy efficiency, cut costs, and make a positive impact on the planet. Apply today and help shape a smarter and more sustainable industry. About The Role As a Backend Engineer, you'll be part of our Backend Engineering team, building the core services that power our platform. You'll work on scalable microservices, APIs, and data pipelines that transform raw sensor data into actionable insights for our customers. This role offers the opportunity to work across the full data lifecycle—from ingestion to delivery. What you will do: You'll design and develop scalable backend services and APIs, primarily using TypeScript/Node.js and Python. Your work will include building microservices that power our smart monitoring platform and working with GraphQL to expose data to frontend applications. You'll collaborate closely with Product Managers and cross-functional teams to deliver impactful features, contribute to architecture decisions, and help shape our engineering best practices. Code reviews and maintaining high-quality standards are a natural part of how we work together. Our Tech Stack We work with AWS cloud services (ECS/EKS, API Gateway, Lambda, Fargate), TypeScript/Node.js and Python, PostgreSQL and ClickHouse databases, Kafka for messaging, GraphQL APIs, and containerization with Docker and Kubernetes. What We're Looking For We're looking for someone with around 3+ years of backend engineering experience who enjoys building reliable, scalable systems. You're comfortable working with TypeScript/Node.js or Python and have experience with cloud services, preferably AWS. You understand how microservices and distributed systems work, and you value sound engineering practices such as testing, CI/CD, and collaborative code reviews. Fluency in English helps you communicate effectively with our international team. Proven experience collaborating with third-party stakeholders and communicating effectively throughout projects. Demonstrated track record in developing and/or integrating external APIs. Experience with streaming technologies like Kafka, stream processing frameworks such as Flink, or time series databases like ClickHouse would be valuable in this role—but if you're excited to learn these, that counts too. You don't need to check every box. If this role excites you and you bring relevant experience, we'd love to hear from you. How We Work We do Scrum with 2-week sprints and schedule most meetings in the mornings to preserve afternoon focus time. We work in a hybrid setup with regular office collaboration in Utrecht. You'll be part of multidisciplinary teams across Data, IoT, and Platform departments. title: Software Enginner Node.js SSR - Credit Risk
description: #SomosNaranjaX y nos une el propósito de trabajar por la inclusión y la educación financiera de millones de personas. Colaborar dentro de un equipo multidisciplinario que trabaja bajo la metodología ágil Scrum, fomentando la comunicación y la mejora continua. Analizar, identificar y resolver problemas complejos, asegurando la calidad y mantenibilidad del código mediante pruebas unitarias e integraciones. ¿Qué buscamos? - Experiencia SSR en desarrollo con Node.js. Experiencia trabajando en el desarrollo de aplicaciones en entornos Cloud. Experiencia en el uso de agentes de IA y asistentes de desarrollo. Experiencia trabajando con arquitecturas orientadas a eventos. Conocimiento y experiencia en la implementación de pruebas unitarias y de integración. Experiencia en despliegues, CI/CD, pipelines y contenedores. Experiencia en construcción de APIs REST. Conocimientos en metodologías ágiles. Sumarte a la Experiencia NX es: 📍 Modo Flex: Creemos en la presencia más que en la presencialidad. Trabajá de manera híbrida y flexible: desde casa, oficina o mixto. 🌍 #WorkFromAnywhere: dias para trabajar desde cualquier parte del país o el mundo. 🌴 Más días de descanso: Además de vacaciones, tenés días libres NX desde el inicio para elegir cuando quieras. 💸 Ajustes de sueldo periódicos que acompañan el contexto económico. 💻 Reintegros por gastos de internet y servicios. 🍔 Reintegro en compras de supermercado y restaurantes 🤩 Programas de capacitación constante y plataformas de E-learning (Udemy) para potenciar tu desarrollo. 👶 Licencia extendida y flexibilidad al regreso para gestantes y no gestantes. + Licencias especiales para el cuidado de tu familia. 🥰Y una propuesta de valor mucho más amplia pensada para acompañarte en cada momento y desarrollar todo tu potencial. En Naranja X promovemos un espacio de trabajo seguro e inclusivo, donde podés desplegar tu talento, tus ideas y tu magia. Nuestras búsquedas son abiertas y equitativas para todas las personas: teniendo en cuenta diversidad de género, etaria, de religiones, ideas y opiniones, nacionalidad, personas con discapacidad, LGBTIQ+. ¡Mientras más diversos sean nuestros equipos, mayor será nuestra capacidad de agregar valor a las finanzas de las personas!

title: PHP Developer
description: About The Company Relecura is a leading technology-driven organization dedicated to delivering innovative solutions in the field of intellectual property analytics, patent research, and data-driven decision-making. With a focus on leveraging advanced AI and machine learning technologies, Relecura empowers clients across various industries to optimize their patent portfolios, streamline research processes, and gain strategic insights. Our commitment to excellence, continuous innovation, and fostering a collaborative work environment makes us a preferred employer for talented professionals seeking to make a significant impact in the tech industry. About The Role We are seeking a skilled PHP Developer with 3–4 years of hands-on experience in both frontend and backend development. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in developing, maintaining, and modernizing PHP-based web applications, with particular expertise in migrating legacy applications to newer PHP versions. You will play a pivotal role in enhancing our existing platforms, ensuring they are scalable, secure, and optimized for performance. Collaborating closely with UI/UX designers and product teams, you will translate wireframes and design prototypes into responsive, user-friendly interfaces that meet high standards of quality and usability. The role requires a proactive individual capable of working on multiple projects simultaneously, troubleshooting complex issues, and implementing best practices for code quality and security. Your contributions will directly impact the efficiency, reliability, and user experience of our products, supporting Relecura’s mission to deliver cutting-edge solutions to our clients. Qualifications The ideal candidate should possess a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field. Proven experience of 3–4 years in PHP development, with a strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in both frontend and backend technologies, is essential. Candidates must have hands-on experience with PHP frameworks such as Laravel or CodeIgniter, along with a solid understanding of PHP version migrations and legacy code refactoring. Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and templating engines is required. Experience working with RESTful APIs, MySQL databases, and implementing security best practices is also necessary. Familiarity with DevOps tools like Git, CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and basic knowledge of AWS cloud services will be advantageous. Exposure to Node.js for frontend tooling or backend services is a plus. Responsibilities Develop, enhance, and maintain PHP-based web applications, ensuring high performance, responsiveness, and scalability. Lead migration efforts for legacy PHP applications to newer versions, refactoring code to improve maintainability and compatibility. Collaborate with UI/UX designers and product teams to translate wireframes into intuitive, responsive user interfaces. Implement and optimize RESTful APIs for seamless integration with external services and internal modules. Ensure application security by applying best practices in coding, authentication, and authorization mechanisms. Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging to uphold quality standards. Automate deployment processes using CI/CD tools and manage version control via Git. Monitor application performance and troubleshoot issues proactively to minimize downtime. Stay updated with the latest industry trends, tools, and best practices to continuously improve development processes. Contribute to documentation and knowledge sharing within the team to foster a collaborative environment. Benefits Competitive salary package aligned with industry standards. Opportunities for professional growth and skill development through training and certifications. Flexible work hours and a collaborative, innovative work environment. Health insurance coverage for employees and their dependents. Paid time off and holidays to promote work-life balance. Participation in challenging projects that foster learning and career advancement. Access to modern tools and technologies to support your development work. Employee recognition programs and a supportive team culture. Equal Opportunity Relecura is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse teams foster innovation, creativity, and better decision-making, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to join our team and contribute to our success.

title: Backend Entwickler/-in (m/w/d)
description: Backend Entwickler/-in (m/w/d) bei GGM Gastro International GmbH Anforderungen Bitte beachte, dass für diese Stelle eine Arbeitserlaubnis für Deutschland erforderlich ist. Sprache: Deutsch - Fließend Anforderungen Technisches Know-how Fundierte Kenntnisse in PHP (OOP, Patterns) Erfahrung im Umgang mit Datenbanken (z. B. MySQL) Vertraut im Einsatz von APIs und Versionierungstools (z. B. Git, Github) Praxis in der Arbeit mit Magento und WordPress Erfahrung in der Entwicklung und Pflege von Web-Applikationen Arbeitsweise & Soft Skills Selbstorganisierte und strukturierte Arbeitsweise Teamfähigkeit und Kommunikationsstärke Problemlösungsorientierung und Hands-on-Mentalität Sprachkenntnisse Sichere Deutsch- und/oder Englischkenntnisse Nice-to-have Erfahrung mit weiteren Frameworks oder Content-Management-Systemen Grundkenntnisse im Frontend-Bereich (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) Tätigkeiten Du entwickelst PHP-basierte Systeme mit dem Symfony Framework oder Module für Systeme wie Magento, WordPress etc. Du führst E-Commerce-Projekte mit bis zu 7 Personen durch. Du planst und entwickelst Web-Applikationen. Du betreibst und entwickelst bestehende Web-Applikationen weiter. Du konzipierst und gestaltest Software im Frontend- und Backend-Bereich. Team Dein Team bei GGM Gastro Du wirst Teil unseres IT- und Development-Teams am Standort Ochtrup . Hier arbeiten aktuell rund 33 Kolleg:innen aus den Bereichen Backend, Frontend, DevOps und Projektmanagement eng zusammen. Arbeitsweise: Wir arbeiten in kleinen Projektteams (ca. 3–5 Personen), die agil und lösungsorientiert zusammenarbeiten. Dabei legen wir Wert auf flache Hierarchien, offene Kommunikation und gegenseitige Unterstützung. Zusammenhalt: Egal ob bei der gemeinsamen Mittagspause in unserer Kantine, beim Kaffee an der Bar oder bei unseren regelmäßigen Team-Events – Teamspirit wird bei uns großgeschrieben. Einarbeitung: Ab Tag 1 bekommst du einen persönlichen Buddy, der dich in unsere Tools, Prozesse und Projekte einführt. So wirst du schnell ein fester Teil des Teams. Vielfalt: Unsere Abteilung vereint unterschiedliche Persönlichkeiten, Erfahrungen und Fachrichtungen – genau das macht die Zusammenarbeit spannend und bereichernd. Kurz gesagt: Du triffst bei uns auf ein offenes, motiviertes und hilfsbereites Team , das gemeinsam an innovativen E-Commerce- und Web-Lösungen arbeitet. Über das Unternehmen Wer liebt es nicht? In Restaurants, Imbissen und Bars gutes Essen und Drinks genießen! Aber hast du dich eigentlich schon einmal gefragt, wo dein Lieblings-Restaurant sein ganzes Küchenequipment herhat? Die Antwort darauf sind wir – GGM Gastro!! Als Europas Marktführer für Gastronomiebedarf erleichtern wir seit nunmehr 20 Jahren unzähligen Gastronomen mit professionellem Equipment den Arbeitsalltag. 24 Standorte, 1000 Mitarbeitende und die Reise hat gerade erst begonnen. Werde auch du Teil der GGM-Familie und wachse gemeinsam mit uns weiter. Klicke auf "Bewerben" für Details zu den Benefits, dem Team und dem Bewerbungsprozess.

title: DevOps - Symfony Bare Metal Linux
description: OUR STORY: 🇪🇺 Join Scaleway and shape the sovereign cloud of tomorrow ! Since 1999, we have been designing secure, sustainable infrastructures aimed at supporting the most ambitious companies. Historically known for our dedicated servers (Dedibox), we made a strategic shift to cloud computing in 2015. Staying true to our principles of simplicity, flexibility, and technical excellence, we have become one of the leading players in Europe in the sector. With the rise of artificial intelligence, we have strengthened our commitment, supported by the Iliad Group, which is investing €3 billion to develop a serious, sovereign AI alternative to American and Asian giants. Every day, thanks to our fast-growing portfolio of cloud and AI products (bare metal, containerization, serverless, AI, etc.), Scaleway proudly serves thousands of customer across the private and public sector, from corporations like France Télévisions or Hachette Livre, to fast-growing startups like Photoroom and Biolevate, to institutions like the City of Copenhagen. 📍 Our offices are located in Paris, Lille, Toulouse, Rennes, Rouen, Bordeaux and Lyon. WHY WE NEED YOU ? Our growth is driving us to strengthen our Dedibox Compute Foundation team to modernize and scale our legacy backend systems while ensuring production excellence. Your mission will be to maintain and progressively evolve our legacy Dedibox Symfony application toward more modular and service-oriented architectures in order to improve performance, resilience, and long-term scalability in a critical production environment. YOUR FUTURE TEAM We work in a collaborative and international environment where the diversity of Scalers, combined with a spirit of sharing, helps bring new projects to life every day, advancing our ambitions together. You will be part of a team of 6 DevOps Engineers, working alongside 1 Engineering Manager, a dedicated Product team, and a dedicated SRE team. The team operates in an agile setup with strong technical autonomy and is responsible for internally built applications running in a high-volume, production-critical cloud provider environment. You will collaborate daily with cross-functional teams such as hardware, support, billing, and infrastructure. The team recently welcomed new members and reorganized into a tribe structure to support upcoming modernization challenges. YOUR DAILY ROUTINE Develop and maintain backend features using Symfony (PHP 7+) Ensure application maintenance in operational conditions (MCO) in production Debug and resolve production incidents in high-availability environments Contribute to the progressive modernization of a legacy monolith toward modular/microservices architectures Improve application performance and resilience Participate in code reviews and enforce best backend practices Manage deployments through CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI) Work with Docker and DevOps tooling in distributed environments Collaborate closely with SRE, hardware, support, and billing teams Participate in the on-call rotation after onboarding About You HARDSKILLS : Bare metal et Linux : expérience avec configuration et gestion des serveurs Machine Virtuelle et dédiée Minimum 5+ years of backend experience with significant production experience in Symfony Strong expertise in PHP 7+ and Symfony in critical production environments Solid experience maintaining and evolving legacy applications Hands-on experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines (Git, GitLab CI) Good knowledge of distributed systems and Linux server environments SOFTSKILLS : Strong production mindset with a culture of availability and resilience Autonomous and able to quickly take ownership of a broad technical scope Pragmatic and comfortable working with legacy systems while driving modernization Adaptable and capable of switching contexts efficiently Strong cross-team communication skills WHY JOIN THE SCALEWAY ADVENTURE ? ✔ A rich and diverse product offering: Scaleway offers over 100 public cloud products in IaaS, PaaS, and AI. ✔ A cutting-edge technical environment: Scaleway provides modern infrastructures, including high-performance bare metal servers, to tackle exciting technical challenges. ✔ Commitment to responsible cloud: Scaleway is dedicated to a more responsible cloud, with data centers powered solely by renewable energy since 2017, minimizing our ecological footprint and holding top-level certification. 🔜 THE NEXT STEPS … HR interview (30 min) I nterview with your future Manager to understand your technical skills and approach to the role (45 min) Technical interview with the team including practical discussions to validate your expertise (1h) Final discussion with the Head Of to deepen technical topics and assess your fit with the team (45 min) At Scaleway, we are committed to building an inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone has a fair opportunity to thrive. All applications are considered with care, regardless of age, gender, sexual orientation, ethnic or social background, religion, disability, or any other characteristic. We believe great ideas come from everywhere, and everyone which is why you should definitely apply.

title: Developpeur senior PHP / Symphony H/F (IT) / Freelance
description: Au sein d'une équipe pluridisciplinaire, vous interviendrez dans le développement d'application web et d'APIs à destination des services transverses de l'entreprise (vues clients partagées, brique d'authentification, outils de gestion de commandes et d'abonnements, etc.). Estimer la charge de travail et réaliser les développements en PHP/Symfony selon les standards de l'équipe. Intégrer des solutions tierces (Keycloak, etc.) dans l'écosystème applicatif existant. Optimiser les performances des applications et assurer la qualité du code par la mise en place de bonnes pratiques. Participer activement aux rituels Agile (daily, sprint planning, retrospectives) et contribuer à l'amélioration continue. Collaborer avec les équipes transverses (Data Analyst, Infrastructure, Product) pour délivrer des services robustes. Assurer la documentation technique et le transfert de compétences au sein de l'équipe. Profil candidat: Minimum 3 ans d'expérience en développement PHP/Symfony Solide maîtrise de Symfony (composants, bundles, services) et de l'architecture MVC Expérience confirmée dans le développement et la conception d'APIs REST Connaissance des bases de données relationnelles et optimisation des requêtes SQL Expérience en méthodologie Agile (Scrum/Kanban) Capacité à travailler en autonomie et esprit d'équipe Connaissance de Keycloak ou d'autres solutions IAM (Identity Access Management) Expérience dans le secteur de la presse ou des médias Connaissance de l'écosystème DevOps (CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes)

title: Full Stack Developer - PHP
description: About The Company Awign Expert is a leading organization dedicated to transforming the education landscape by leveraging innovative technology solutions. With a focus on creating impactful learning experiences, we strive to bridge the gap between traditional education and modern digital methodologies. Our team is composed of passionate professionals committed to excellence, continuous improvement, and fostering a collaborative environment that encourages creativity and innovation. The role offers an exciting opportunity to work with a diverse tech stack, influence product development, and contribute to a mission-driven organization dedicated to student success. Immediate joiners are preferred to ensure a seamless onboarding process and quick integration into ongoing projects. While prior experience with the specified technologies is advantageous, we welcome skilled candidates eager to learn and grow within our tech stack. Writing clean, efficient, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and coding standards. Participating in code reviews, testing, and debugging to ensure optimal performance and security. Contributing to the continuous improvement of development processes, tools, and methodologies. Managing database design and optimization using MySQL, Redis, and RabbitMQ to ensure data integrity and system efficiency. Exploring and integrating new technologies such as Kubernetes and ElasticSearch to enhance platform capabilities, where applicable. Taking ownership of features from concept through deployment and post-launch support. Benefits At Awign Expert, we value our team members and offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your professional and personal growth. Additionally, you will be part of a mission-driven company that makes a tangible difference in education, offering a sense of purpose and fulfillment in your work. Equal Opportunity Awign Expert is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse perspectives foster innovation and excellence, and we are dedicated to providing a fair and equitable workplace for everyone.

title: Junior Full Stack Software Engineer (JAVA)
description: Description Interclypse is seeking full-stack web developers in Annapolis Junction, Maryland. We are looking for a developer interested in applying software solutions to a variety of challenges across multiple projects and domains. Our teams leverage modern technologies and best practices to address diverse problems and deliver impactful results. title: Backend Engineer, Data
description: Who we are About Stripe Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career. About The Team The Data Foundations team drives Data Engineering and Data Apps & Tooling work across Stripe, enabling Stripes to leverage data to make informed decisions and build user-centric products. We provide tools and infrastructure to move, store, process, and analyze data, both at rest and in motion. We are looking for talented data-minded software engineers to help us manage business-critical data leveraged across the entire organization. If you are passionate about data, excited about designing data pipelines and data-driven user experiences, and motivated by having an outsized impact on the business, we want to hear from you. Team Matching: exact team matching for one of the subteams will begin during final stages. Please note we may also consider you for different orgs based on your experience, location, etc. More information on our team matching process can be found here. What you’ll do Every record in our data warehouse is vitally important for the businesses that use Stripe, so we’re looking for people with a strong background in software engineering and data to help us scale while maintaining correct and complete data. You’ll be working with a variety of internal teams across Product, Data Science, and GTM to help them solve their data needs. Your work will provide visibility into how these stakeholders and the Data Foundations organization are performing and how we can deliver a better experience to Stripe's customers. Responsibilities Design, develop, and own data pipelines, models, and products that power the Product, Data Science, and GTM functions Develop strong subject matter expertise and manage the SLAs for both data pipelines and full stack web applications that support these critical stakeholders Build and refine Stripe's data foundations - infrastructure, pipelines, and tools to enable various teams at Stripe - working with Scala, Spark, and Airflow Leverage LLM and Agents at scale to produce high-quality data on ambiguous problems Refine our existing data marts that help the GTM organization forecast the future potential performance of the business and reliably measure ongoing attainment toward targets Build data services that track key product metrics and measure the impact of different strategies employed by teams in the field Our tech stack is Spark, Scala, Java, SQL, and Python - and while we don’t expect everyone on the team to be an expert in all of these, you will work across all of these technologies throughout your tenure on the team Who you are We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement. Minimum Requirements Must have 6+ years of experience in a Software Engineering role, with a focus on building and maintaining data services, or data-intensive applications. A strong engineering background and are interested in data Prior experience with writing and debugging data pipelines using a distributed data framework (Spark / Hadoop / Pig etc) An inquisitive nature in diving into data inconsistencies to pinpoint issues, and resolve deep rooted data quality issues Knowledge of a backend development language (such as Scala, Java, or Go) and strong SQL experience The ability to communicate cross-functionally, derive requirements and architect shared datasets A strong engineering background and an interest in data Preferred Requirements Experience creating and maintaining Data Marts to power business reporting needs Experience working with Product or GTM (Sales/Marketing) teams Hybrid work at Stripe This role is available either in an office or a remote location (35+ miles or 56+ km from a Stripe office). In-office expectations Office-assigned Stripes spend at least 50% of the time in a given month in their local office or with users. This hits a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility about how to do this in a way that makes sense for individuals and their teams. Working remotely at Stripe A remote location is defined as being 35 miles (56 kilometers) or more from one of our offices. While you would be welcome to come into the office for team/business meetings, on-sites, meet-ups, and events, our expectation is you would regularly work from home rather than a Stripe office. Stripe does not cover the cost of relocating to a remote location. We encourage you to apply for roles that match the location where you currently live or plan to live. Pay and benefits The annual salary range for this role in the primary location is CA$135,200 - CA$202,800. This range may change if you are hired in another location. For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings (“OTE”) range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonuses target and annual base salary for the role. This salary range may be inclusive of several career levels at Stripe and will be narrowed during the interview process based on a number of factors, including the candidate’s experience, qualifications, and specific location. Applicants interested in this role and who are not located in the primary location may request the annual salary range for their location during the interview process. Specific benefits and details about what compensation is included in the salary range listed above will vary depending on the applicant’s location and can be discussed in more detail during the interview process. Benefits/additional compensation for this role may include: equity, company bonus or sales commissions/bonuses; retirement plans; health benefits; and wellness stipends. Hybrid work at Stripe This role is available either in an office or a remote location (35+ miles or 56+ km from a Stripe office). This hits a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility about how to do this in a way that makes sense for individuals and their teams. Working remotely at Stripe A remote location is defined as being 35 miles (56 kilometers) or more from one of our offices. While you would be welcome to come into the office for team/business meetings, on-sites, meet-ups, and events, our expectation is you would regularly work from home rather than a Stripe office. Stripe does not cover the cost of relocating to a remote location. We encourage you to apply for roles that match the location where you currently live or plan to live.

Mocha/Chai, Jest, Cypress) Consume/interface with an API including Error Handling, Authentication & Authorisation Experience of team leadership would be an advantage Extended knowledge of Web technologies CSS, HTML and CSS preprocessors (SCSS/LESS) Good knowledge of the SOLID principles & DRY Good knowledge on how to setup and develop SPA & PWA applications Good knowledge of CI/CD Use and knowledge of ESLint & Prettier Advanced understanding of standard front end development technologies: HTML5, CSS2.1/3, jQuery + Plugins, Photoshop/Illustrator Demonstratable experience developing for Responsive Web Design, as well as targeted Mobile Web Development Experience with/using Version control (i.e.: GIT, SVN) Strong command of using Firebug and/or Chrome Developer Tools Comfortable working around PHP templates and the various IDEs, 3rd party API integration, varied CMS experience Good understanding of Front End concepts such as Progressive Enhancement vs. Graceful Degradation, accessibility, browser inconsistencies, and support for various CSS properties Experience Developing With Plain JQuery And Other JS Libraries Proficient with preprocessors such as Sass, LESS Experience with OOP pattern development Understanding of SEO best practices Bonus points Webpack Docker AWS Good Linux(or UNIX like OS) knowledge You know and understand the TDD approach What we offer We Love What We Do And Working At Jagaad Is a Chance To Be a Part Of Something Big! Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written). Experience with Git and modern frontend tooling. Experience working with remote/distributed teams is a plus. Benefits B2B Contract AO3532
