title: React Developer
description: About The Company TruMetric.AI is a leading innovator in the artificial intelligence and data analytics industry, dedicated to transforming complex data into actionable insights for businesses worldwide. Our mission is to empower organizations with cutting-edge AI solutions that enhance decision-making, streamline operations, and drive sustainable growth. With a team of passionate professionals and a culture of innovation, TruMetric.AI continuously pushes the boundaries of technology to deliver exceptional value to our clients across various sectors, including finance, healthcare, retail, and manufacturing. We pride ourselves on fostering a collaborative and inclusive work environment where creativity, expertise, and continuous learning are highly valued. About The Role We are seeking a highly skilled React Developer with 3 to 6 years of experience to join our dynamic development team. In this role, you will be responsible for translating modern UI/UX designs into high-performance, scalable web applications that meet the evolving needs of our clients. Your expertise will contribute to building intuitive, mobile-first interfaces that are both visually appealing and highly functional. You will work closely with product designers, backend engineers, and architects to develop robust frontend solutions that align with our company's strategic goals. The ideal candidate possesses a strong foundation in React and Next.js, excellent problem-solving skills, and a passion for crafting pixel-perfect user experiences. Qualifications To succeed in this role, candidates should possess a solid background in frontend development with a focus on React and related technologies. A bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field is preferred, along with relevant industry experience. Proficiency in modern JavaScript, TypeScript, and frontend frameworks is essential. Candidates should demonstrate experience working with design tools such as Figma, and possess a deep understanding of responsive and mobile-first design principles. Knowledge of state management libraries like Redux, Zustand, or Context API, as well as familiarity with CSS frameworks such as Tailwind CSS and Material UI, is required. Additionally, experience with performance optimization techniques, frontend architecture, and API integration is highly valued. Strong communication skills, a detail-oriented mindset, and the ability to work effectively in a collaborative environment are critical for success in this role. Responsibilities Develop and maintain scalable, maintainable frontend applications using React and Next.js frameworks. Translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect, responsive UI components that adhere to design specifications. Create highly interactive, mobile-first interfaces that deliver exceptional user experiences. Implement clean, reusable, and modular component architectures to facilitate scalability and maintainability. Optimize applications for maximum speed, performance, and scalability through best practices and performance engineering techniques. Manage application state effectively using Redux, Context API, or other state management libraries. Collaborate with backend teams to ensure seamless API integration and data flow. Ensure cross-browser compatibility and responsiveness across multiple devices and screen sizes. Participate actively in code reviews, contribute to frontend architecture decisions, and uphold high coding standards. Contribute to performance tuning, frontend security, and overall system architecture improvements. Benefits At TruMetric.AI, we believe in investing in our employees’ growth and well-being. We offer competitive compensation packages, including health insurance, retirement plans, and performance-based bonuses. Our flexible work environment supports remote work options and promotes work-life balance. Employees have access to ongoing learning opportunities, professional development programs, and industry conferences to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving tech landscape. We foster a collaborative culture that encourages innovation, ownership, and continuous improvement. Additionally, employees enjoy a vibrant office environment with modern amenities, team-building activities, and recognition programs designed to celebrate achievements and milestones. Equal Opportunity TruMetric.AI is committed to creating an inclusive and diverse workplace. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse perspectives foster innovation and drive our success. All qualified candidates are encouraged to apply and will be considered based on their skills, experience, and alignment with our company values. We are dedicated to providing a supportive environment where every employee can thrive and reach their full potential.

title: Fullstack Developer (React and NodeJS)
description: We are looking for Fullstack Developer (Node.js & React ). This is a full-time permanent position. What You Will Do Backend Development: Design and develop scalable Node.js services and APIs. Cloud Engineering: Design and implement solutions using AWS services (Lambda, S3, CloudFront, etc.). Frontend Development: Build reusable UI components and containers using React, Next.js, HTML5, CSS/SCSS. API Integration: Consume and integrate REST APIs to deliver seamless user experiences. Mobile Development: Maintain and enhance Android mobile applications. Product Alignment: Ensure technical solutions align with product goals and user experience. Code Quality & Ownership: Write clean, maintainable, reusable software with strong ownership. Automation & Testing: Define, develop and enforce automation testing standards and best practices. Reporting & Collaboration: Report testing impact and improvements to stakeholders and collaborate using tools like JIRA, Git, GitHub, GitLab. What We Seek In You Strong Computer Science fundamentals – algorithms, data structures, and system design. 4+ years of strong full-stack development experience in: Node.js, JavaScript / TypeScript, React, HTML5 & CSS / SCSS 2+ years of experience in AWS services (Lambda, S3, CloudFront, etc.). 2+ years of Android mobile development experience. Strong understanding of RESTful APIs and modern web architecture. Experience using version control and collaboration tools like JIRA/Git/GitHub/GitLab. Bonus Experience (Desirable) Experience working with Next.js. Experience practicing Test Driven Development (TDD). Exposure to AI-assisted development tools. Life At Next At our core, we're driven by the mission of tailoring growth for our customers by enabling them to transform their aspirations into tangible outcomes. We're dedicated to empowering them to shape their futures and achieve ambitious goals. To fulfil this commitment, we foster a culture defined by agility, innovation, and an unwavering commitment to progress. Our organizational framework is both streamlined and vibrant, characterized by a hands-on leadership style that prioritizes results and fosters growth. Perks Of Working With Us Clear objectives to ensure alignment with our mission, fostering your meaningful contribution. Abundant opportunities for engagement with customers, product managers, and leadership. You’ll be guided by progressive paths while receiving insightful guidance from managers through ongoing feedforward sessions. Cultivate and leverage robust connections within diverse communities of interest. Choose your mentor to navigate your current endeavors and steer your future trajectory. Embrace continuous learning and upskilling opportunities through Nexversity. Enjoy the flexibility to explore various functions, develop new skills, and adapt to emerging technologies. Hybrid work model promoting work-life balance with comprehensive family health insurance. Accelerated career paths to achieve your professional aspirations. Who we are? We enable high-growth enterprises to build hyper-personalized solutions to transform their vision into reality. With a keen eye for detail, we apply creativity, embrace new technology, and harness the power of data and AI to co-create solutions tailored to meet unique customer needs. Join our passionate team and tailor your growth with us!

title: Full Stack Engineer (New Grad)
description: Full-Stack Software Engineer (New Grad) San Francisco, CA (On-Site) Company Overview We’re the modern data infrastructure platform for construction, the world’s third-largest industry, and one of its most technologically underserved. Every day, contractors run into the same problem: their business-critical systems don’t talk to each other. These systems, for accounting, project management, estimating, payroll, and field operations, each hold essential data — from job costs and invoices to budgets and schedules, and are the backbone of how contractors run their business, make decisions, and keep projects moving. When these systems and data live in silos, the result is errors, delays, double-entry, and wasted money. Teams spend countless hours reconciling spreadsheets, chasing down missing information, and stitching together a reliable view of their projects and finances. Our client solves this by being the connective tissue across the industry’s most important tools. We integrate and synchronize data across systems so that contractors always have accurate, up-to-date information in real time. That shared data layer unlocks the next step: workflow automations that replace spreadsheets, emails, and one-off processes with reliable, system-driven execution across finance and operations — enabling teams to work faster, make better decisions, and avoid costly mistakes. Requirements Exceptional college grads with strong intern/co-op experience, ideally from a top undergraduate university Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science Self-motivated, high ownership, low ego; desire to work on a fast-paced, intense, fun team. Passion for building a world-class engineering culture. Pumped to work in-person with us in SF 5 days/week. No need to have : prior experience with our tech stack or at B2B SaaS/API company Tech stack TypeScript, React, Redis, Postgres, AWS - CDK, EC2

title: Backend Engineer, Developer Experience & Product Platform
description: Who we are About Stripe Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career. About The Organization / Team Stripe’s DEeP organization empowers all of Stripe's products with a shared product platform that helps with rapidly delivering high-quality, cross-product experiences across our UI and API surfaces. It focuses on providing a consistent and scalable developer experience that any developer (both internal and external) can leverage to accelerate a merchant’s ability to create value using Stripe. The IAM Login Services team is responsible for managing authentication into Stripe. We are expanding our authentication stack to allow more teams at Stripe to integrate with it and to support AI agents authenticating into Stripe. This is a critical workstream due to the growth in AI adoption and the need for secure and manageable Identity and Access Management (IAM) as Stripe's enterprise customer base grows. Team Matching: exact team matching for one of the subteams will begin during final stages. Please note we may also consider you for different orgs based on your experience, location, etc. More information on our team matching process can be found here. What you’ll do As a Backend Engineer on the IAM Login Services team, you will play a crucial role in platformizing Stripe's authentication stack and expanding our authentication offerings to support AI agents. You will contribute to critical workstreams that have a significant impact on Stripe's enterprise customers and our overall business. This is an opportunity to work on cutting-edge security and IAM infrastructure, collaborating with various teams across Stripe to invent and implement innovative solutions. Responsibilities Contribute to expanding Stripe's OAuth offering. Develop and improve SSO/SCIM products to increase adoption for enterprise users. Collaborate with other teams within Stripe to deliver a next generation authentication platform for Stripe. Who you are We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement. Minimum Requirements 2-5 years of relevant experience. Experience with backend infrastructure. Experience building systems that scale. Familiarity with AWS. Experience with Java/Ruby. Preferred Qualifications Prior experience with IAM. Comfortable with ambiguity, and can drive clarity independently. If you’re ready to help shape the future of identity and access management at Stripe and work on solutions that impact millions of users, we encourage you to apply! Also, some teams have greater in-office attendance requirements, to appropriately support our users and workflows, which the hiring manager will discuss. This approach helps strike a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility when possible. For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings (“OTE”) range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonuses target and annual base salary for the role. title: Full Stack Developer

Experience with caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached). Experience with cloud services (AWS, Azure, Kubernetes clusters, or similar). Familiarity with front-end testing frameworks (like Jest, Cypress). Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and deployment processes. What We Offer Professional, friendly, reliable and dedicated team members. An engaged and flat structured organization that offers full support throughout your career journey. And last but not least – a pet-friendly office. Salary from 4100 to 5000 Eur gross (with the growth potential).

Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career. This approach helps strike a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility when possible. title: Full Stack Engineer
description: About OpenLoop OpenLoop was co-founded by CEO, Dr. Jon Lensing, and COO, Christian Williams, with the vision to bring care anywhere. Our telehealth support solutions are thoughtfully designed to streamline and simplify go-to-market care delivery for companies offering meaningful virtual support to patients across an expansive array of specialties, in all 50 states. About The Role OpenLoop is looking for a Full Stack Engineer to join our team hybrid in our San Jose, CA office. This role sits within OpenLoop’s AI team and focuses on bringing our AI Care Engine into production across real-world healthcare environments. You will work closely with partners and internal teams to build, deploy, and integrate AI-powered voice, messaging, and clinical workflows, ensuring seamless connections across clinical systems, telephony infrastructure, and patient engagement tools throughout OpenLoop’s nationwide network. What You'll Do Lead Deployments: Architect and execute technical integrations for new healthcare partners, customizing our platform to fit their unique workflows and legacy systems Bridge the Gap: Build the "last mile" of connectivity. You will design robust data pipelines to securely ingest clinical data and synchronize it with our AI services. Communication Infrastructure: Configure and optimize voice and messaging channels to ensure reliable patient engagement across various telephony networks. Cross-functional Work: Collaborate with engineering, product, and clinical teams to translate partner needs into crisp technical execution Other duties as assigned. Who You Are Required Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field Proven Engineering Experience: 3+ years of experience, Strong background in shipping production-grade software in modern cloud environments. You are comfortable hopping across the stack—from APIs to databases to infrastructure. Data & Security Fluency: Experience handling sensitive data with a security-first mindset. Familiarity with industry-standard compliance requirements and data protocols is essential. Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders and translate ambiguous partner needs into clear technical requirements Preferred Qualifications Integration Expertise: Deep experience connecting disparate systems. You understand the complexities of data ingestion, API interoperability, and third-party integrations. AI/LLM Curiosity: Practical experience or strong interest in working with Large Language Models (LLMs) and understanding how to operationalize them in production settings. Our Benefits In addition, for salaried positions you would also be eligible for: Medical, Dental, and Vision plans Flexible Spending/Health Savings Accounts Flexible PTO 401(k) + Company Match Life Insurance, Pet insurance, and more Compensation Range: $116,450 - $135,150 Our Company We have a relatively flat organizational structure here at OpenLoop. Everyone is encouraged to bring ideas to the table and make things happen. This fits in well with our core values of Autonomy, Competence and Belonging, as we want everyone to feel empowered and supported to do their best work. Sound like a good fit? We’d love to meet you.

title: Junior Full Stack Engineer

The India team focuses on client deliverables and the development of high-performance low-code Blockchain technologies. We operate from Delhi, along with certain project locations. Role Overview : We are looking for a motivated Junior Fullstack Engineer (3-5 years' experience) to join our team and contribute to building scalable backend systems and modern web applications. This role focuses on fullstack development, involving both backend systems using Node.js/NestJS with SQL databases and frontend development using modern frameworks like React or Next.js. It is ideal for candidates with hands-on experience across the stack who are eager to build end-to-end features and grow in a fast-paced product environment. Key Responsibilites : Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Node.js (NestJS preferred) Build and manage RESTful APIs for web and platform integrations Work with SQL databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) including schema design and query optimization Implement business logic, validations, and workflows in backend systems Collaborate with frontend teams to integrate APIs into applications Develop user-facing features using React.js or Next.js Debug, troubleshoot, and improve application performance Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code with proper documentation Participate in code reviews and follow best development practices Work with product and design teams to deliver end-to-end features Required Skills : 3 plus years of experience in fullstack or backend development Strong proficiency in JavaScript / TypeScript Hands-on experience with Node.js frameworks (NestJS or Express.js) Solid understanding of SQL databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) Writing complex queries Database design and normalization Performance optimization basics Experience in building and consuming REST APIs Familiarity with ORMs such as TypeORM, Prisma, or Sequelize Experience with React.js or Next.js Understanding of authentication & authorization (JWT, role-based access) Familiarity with Git and version control workflows Strong problem-solving and debugging skills Good to have : Experience working with NestJS architecture (modules, guards, interceptors) Familiarity with GraphQL APIs Knowledge of Docker and containerization Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) Understanding of CI/CD pipelines Experience with Redis or caching mechanisms Basic understanding of microservices architecture Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field Relevant project or internship experience is a plus What SettleMint India has to offer: At SettleMint India, we operate in a fast-paced, evolving environment where innovation is constant and so is growth. As the company scales, so will your opportunities to shape your career and make meaningful contributions. We support continuous professional development through access to training, mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration aligned with your career goals. Join a forward-thinking team passionate about solving real-world challenges using advanced technologies like AI and Blockchain.

title: Software Development Engineer - 3 (Backend)
description: ABOUT QUINCE Founded in 2018, Quince was built to challenge the idea that nice things have to cost a lot. Our mission is simple: to make really high quality essentials for really low prices, produced fairly and sustainably. We believe everyone deserves exceptional craftsmanship and timeless design without the traditional markups. Quince is a direct-to-consumer (DTC) model that cuts out middlemen and leverages just-in-time manufacturing to minimize waste and maximize value. Quince is a tech company disrupting the retail industry by putting AI, analytics and automation at the center of everything we do. Our unwavering commitment to excellence and company values guide our teams and actions: Customer First: We prioritize customer satisfaction in every decision. High Quality: True quality means premium materials and rigorous production standards you can feel good about. Essential Design: We focus on timeless, functional essentials instead of chasing trends. Always a Better Deal: Innovation and transparency ensure value for both customers and partners. Social & Environmental Responsibility: We commit to sustainable materials, ethical production, and fair wages. Quince partners with world-class manufacturers across the globe and serves millions of customers. With strong investor backing and a focus on sustainable growth, we are a company that is rapidly scaling while maintaining a commitment to quality, simplicity, and radical price transparency. OUR TEAM AND SUCCESS At Quince, you will be part of a high-performing team that is redefining what quality, value, and sustainability mean in modern retail. We are a destination for builders, innovators, and operators to come together and challenge the status quo. Our collective ambition is bold. We are creating an entirely new category and customer experience – one that democratizes luxury and provides high quality products at radically low prices. That mission demands a world-class team committed to excellence. If you are motivated by impact, growth, and purpose, you will find a strong sense of belonging at Quince. THE ROLE Software Development Engineer - 3 (Backend) We’re looking for a Software Development Engineer - 3 (Backend) to join our growing engineering team. In this role, you will lead the design and development of highly scalable, reliable backend systems that power our core products. You will solve complex technical challenges, drive architectural decisions, and play a key role in shaping the technical direction of the team. Success in this role means delivering robust, high-performance systems at scale, proactively identifying and solving ambiguous problems, and influencing engineering excellence across teams. You will also mentor engineers, drive best practices, and contribute to building a high-performing engineering culture. This position is critical to enabling scalable growth and supporting Quince’s mission of delivering exceptional quality at incredible value. Responsibilities: Lead the design and implementation of scalable, resilient backend systems and services Own architectural decisions and drive system design for complex, high-scale distributed systems Identify and solve deeply complex technical challenges related to scalability, performance, and reliability Define and drive short-term and long-term technical strategy for backend systems Establish and enforce high standards for code quality, system design, and engineering best practices Review and guide design and code across teams to ensure consistency and excellence Mentor and develop engineers across levels, fostering a strong engineering culture Collaborate with cross-functional teams (product, data, infra) to drive end-to-end delivery of impactful solutions Proactively identify areas of improvement in system architecture, performance, and developer productivity Drive initiatives around system observability, reliability, and operational excellence Contribute significantly to hiring, team building, and raising the bar for engineering talent Qualifications: Strong computer science fundamentals including data structures, algorithms, and system design 5+ years of experience in backend development using Java, Spring/Spring Boot Deep expertise in building and scaling high-traffic, distributed systems Strong experience with SQL and NoSQL databases and data modeling at scale Proven experience in designing fault-tolerant, highly available systems Ability to drive architecture and influence technical decisions across teams Strong debugging and problem-solving skills for complex, large-scale systems Experience working in fast-paced, ambiguous environments with high ownership Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills Demonstrated experience mentoring engineers and leading technical initiatives Preferred: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS preferred) and cloud-native architectures Strong understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems patterns Experience with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure automation Familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes Experience driving large-scale system migrations or architectural transformations Prior experience in high-growth startups or consumer internet companies. title: Junior Backend Developer (Node.js & SQL)
description: Work Schedule Mondays to Fridays, 1pm to 10pm Fully-Remote Work Arrangement The Role We are looking for a Junior Backend Developer to join our team to build, optimize, and maintain the server-side logic of our applications. Our primary stack is Node.js and SQL , but we deal with a variety of web technologies. You will be responsible for building robust APIs and ensuring seamless data flow. While the role is backend-focused, you should be comfortable working with the full-stack fundamentals and helping us navigate logic tucked away in our legacy PHP systems. Core Responsibilities Feature Development: Build and maintain server-side logic and RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js . Database Management: Write, test, and optimize SQL queries in PostgreSQL or MySQL . Third-Party Integrations: Read, interpret, and implement external APIs (e.g., Google Maps, Mandrill, Payment Gateways) by following their technical documentation. Legacy Translation: Read and understand small snippets of PHP code to help transition business logic into our modern Node.js environment. Technical Requirements (Must-Have) JavaScript​: Solid grasp of Node.js and the Express framework. Relational Databases: Proficiency in SQL (basic joins, CRUD operations, and schema understanding). API Literacy: A proven ability to read and implement third-party documentation from scratch. Web Fundamentals: High comfort level writing CSS and manipulating the DOM. Logic Reading: The ability to read and interpret code in other languages (specifically PHP ) to understand existing business logic. Version Control: Strong knowledge of Git fundamentals (branching, merging, committing, and resolving basic conflicts). Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have) Testing: Basic familiarity with Jest or other testing libraries. CMS Knowledge: Familiarity with WordPress or similar content management systems. Cloud Infrastructure: Exposure to AWS services (e.g., EC2, S3, RDS, or Lambda). AI-Assisted Development: Experience using GitHub Copilot as a productivity accelerator (while still being able to code manually when needed). Specs-Driven Development: Experience or interest in working from technical specifications/blueprints before starting a build.

title: Digital Interactive Developer (Front-End / React)
description: We are hiring for a Digital Interactive Developer on behalf of a global biopharmaceutical leader. This is a long-term contract (through May 2027) for a front-end focused developer who will build engaging digital experiences including interactive sales aids, marketing websites, responsive emails, and touch-based applications. Location: Fully remote (must be flexible with East Coast to West Coast hours — projects currently lean East Coast but shift as needed) Duration: Through May 10, 2027 (strong chance of extension) What You’ll Do: Build and maintain interactive web experiences, marketing websites, complex forms, banners, and interactive sales aids Develop responsive, component-based UIs using modern JavaScript/TypeScript and React (or similar frameworks) Collaborate closely with UX/UI designers to bring designs to life with high attention to detail Integrate with APIs and backend services Work on a variety of “one-off” projects in a fast-paced agency-style environment Participate in iterative reviews and efficiently incorporate feedback Maintain and extend existing codebases while writing clean, reusable, component-driven code Must-Have Qualifications: Advanced TypeScript + strong JavaScript skills Hands-on experience with React , Vue, or similar component-based frameworks Proficiency with modern CSS frameworks (Tailwind, Bootstrap, SCSS, etc.) 4+ years overall front-end development experience 2+ years in a fast-paced advertising or marketing agency environment Strong communication and collaboration skills (you’ll work directly with designers, PMs, and account teams) Portfolio or GitHub repository required with submission (we want to see your work samples) Nice-to-Have: Next.js or static site generation experience Component libraries (Material-UI, Chakra UI, etc.) Complex form development (multi-step wizards, conditional logic, schema-driven forms) Animation libraries (GSAP, Framer Motion) Email development (MJML, responsive HTML/CSS, Liquid templating) Veeva CLM or pharmaceutical/healthcare experience You’ll join a small, tight-knit development team of 5 developers working alongside 7 UX/UI designers in a 30-person interactive department. The pace is quick and collaborative — we move fast, own our work, and focus on delivering quality without burnout. If you’re a versatile front-end developer who thrives in a dynamic agency-like setting and loves building polished digital experiences, this is a great long-term opportunity. Beacon Hill is an Equal Opportunity Employer that values the strength diversity brings to the workplace. Individuals with Disabilities and Protected Veterans are encouraged to apply. Completion of this form is voluntary and will not affect your opportunity for employment, or the terms or conditions of your employment. This form will be used for reporting purposes only and will be kept separate from all other records. California residents: Qualified applications with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers and the California Fair Chance Act.

title: Front End Developer (React)
description: Please no job recruiter solicitations* About Haneke Design We are a custom software development firm in downtown Tampa, FL, looking to expand our team with individuals who will help us fortify our mission: to deliver digital experiences that amaze and delight. Our clients range from early stage start-ups to Fortune 500 companies, but we always keep a strong focus on user experience. We believe that we can achieve the best results when our designers and developers collaborate from the start. Our team is passionate about keeping up with the pace of our ever-evolving industry, so we are looking for those who are just as bored by the status quo and just as excited about the cutting edge as we are. Based in Tampa, Florida (813) 605-3586 contact@hanekedesign.com © 2026 Haneke Design

title: Frontend Developer (React)
location: Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar, Punjab, India
description: Role: Frontend Developer (React) Location: Mohali Relevant Experience Required: 2-4 years Salary: 25K-50K About the Role: You'll work primarily on React and Next.js projects for international clients — translating Figma designs into fast, accessible, and maintainable interfaces. Expect a mix of greenfield builds and long-running engagements, close collaboration with designers and backend engineers, and meaningful ownership over the frontend decisions on your projects. Requirements Skills: Strong hands-on experience with React.js and Next.js, including concepts such as Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Static Site Generation (SSG), and dynamic routing Solid understanding of JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3 Experience with modern styling solutions such as Tailwind CSS, Styled Components, or similar frameworks Experience integrating frontend applications with RESTful APIs Good understanding of state management approaches like Redux, Zustand, or Context API Strong understanding of component-based architecture and reusable code practices Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Working knowledge of performance optimization techniques and basic SEO principles Strong grasp of responsive design, cross-browser compatibility, and mobile-first development Some familiarity with server-side JavaScript using Node.js or related frameworks would be a plus. Comfortable with Git and standard PR / code review workflows Basic understanding of databases like MySQL Eager to research and learn in a self-directed way. Ability to work and thrive in a fast-paced environment, learn rapidly, and master diverse web technologies and techniques. Strong problem-solving and communication skills A passion for learning and staying up-to-date with the latest developments in web technology. Goal-oriented and deadline-driven. Critical-thinking skills. Responsibilities: Build and maintain scalable, high-performance web applications in React.js and Next.js Translate Figma designs into clean, reusable, component-based UIs Integrate with RESTful APIs and collaborate closely with backend developers on contracts and data flow Optimize for Core Web Vitals, runtime performance, and SEO where applicable Participate in code reviews and help maintain our frontend coding standards Debug and resolve issues across browsers, devices, and deployment environments Stay current with the React/Next.js and Nodejs ecosystem and bring useful ideas into how we build Troubleshoot and debug code to ensure the smooth operation of the application Collaborate with other teams to ensure the successful integration of the application with other systems Stay up-to-date with the latest developments in web technologies and best practices Assisting with the testing and maintenance of software applications. Converting video, audio, written, and graphic components into compatible formats for the web application. Using user feedback to identify and correct problems with a client's software applications. Using low code tools for creating custom software applications using JavaScript. Qualifications: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field. Benefits 5-day work week to maintain a healthy work-life balance. Transparent company policies to foster a positive and open work environment. Salaries at par with industry standards to ensure fair compensation. 12 annual casual leaves to support employees’ flexibility. 6 annual emergency leaves to support our employees' well-being.

title: React Developer (Website Development)
description: Description We are looking for a skilled React Developer to build responsive, efficient, and scalable web applications. The role involves developing new user-facing features, integrating APIs, and optimizing performance across various devices. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, and state management libraries like Redux or Context API, along with proficiency in HTML, CSS, and responsive design. Develop and implement user interface components using React.js concepts, workflows, and best practices. Build reusable components and front-end libraries for future use. Optimize components for maximum performance across a variety of devices and browsers. Integrate with RESTful APIs or GraphQL endpoints to fetch and display data dynamically. Collaborate with the UI/UX design team and backend developers to implement visually appealing, responsive, and functional web solutions. Maintain code quality through best practices, including code reviews, testing, and writing documentation. Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing applications to enhance functionality and performance. Stay up-to-date with modern web development trends and emerging technologies. Proven experience as a React Developer or in a similar role (Frontend / Full Stack). Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and React.js, including React hooks, context, and state management. Familiarity with modern frontend development tools (Webpack, Babel, Vite) and frameworks (Next.js is a plus). Experience with HTML/CSS and CSS libraries/frameworks (e.g., Tailwind, Bootstrap). Knowledge of API integration (RESTful services, GraphQL) and handling asynchronous calls (Axios, Fetch). Proficiency with Git and version control tools for collaborative development. Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress) for unit and end-to-end testing. Understanding of responsive design principles and cross-browser compatibility issues. Familiarity with deployment processes and continuous integration tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub). Experience with TypeScript for type safety and better code quality. Familiarity with server-side rendering (SSR) using Next.js. Knowledge of Redux, Zustand, or Context API for state management. Experience with CI/CD pipelines and cloud platforms like AWS or Azure. Prior experience working in an Agile/Scrum environment.Actions).

title: Développeur PHP / Node.js
description: Pourquoi choisir API ? API, avec plus de 30 ans d'expérience, est une entreprise familiale, reconnue pour sa réelle expertise IT ; transformation digitale, service de support, Cloud... Nous avons su nous nous entourer des meilleurs experts afin de répondre au mieux aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients. En optant pour API, vous choisissez une entreprise à taille humaine bénéficiant d'un solide savoir-faire en IT. Nous sommes fiers de notre culture d’entreprise unique car nous offrons des opportunités de développement professionnel, avec des programmes de formation continue, d'évolution de carrière ainsi qu’un suivi rigoureux. Nous mettons l’humain au cœur de nos activités : après tout, nos ordinateurs peuvent résoudre des problèmes, mais ils ne savent toujours pas faire un bon café ! 📢 Aujourd'hui, nous recherchons un Développeur PHP / Node.js confirmé pour nous rejoindre à G enève . Votre rôle Concevoir, développer et maintenir des applications backend robustes en PHP et Node.js dans un environnement bancaire. Participer à la refonte et à l’optimisation d’architectures critiques (Core Banking, API internes, outils métier). Contribuer à la création de services sécurisés et performants, intégrés aux systèmes financiers existants. Implémenter les bonnes pratiques de développement : CI/CD, tests automatisés, revue de code et documentation technique. Collaborer avec les équipes produit, sécurité et infrastructure pour garantir l’intégrité et la fiabilité des solutions. Participer à l’intégration de données sensibles (transactions, reporting, conformité) en respectant les normes de sécurité bancaire. Assurer la maintenance, le suivi des incidents et la résolution proactive des problèmes en production. Être force de proposition sur l’amélioration continue, la modernisation technologique et l’automatisation des processus. Profil recherché Formation supérieure en informatique ou équivalent. Expérience confirmée (3–5 ans minimum) en développement backend, idéalement sur PHP (Laravel, Symfony) et Node.js (Express, NestJS). Solides connaissances des architectures REST et microservices. Maîtrise des bases de données SQL et NoSQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB) et des environnements Docker/Git/CI/CD. Expérience dans un environnement bancaire, fintech ou à forte contrainte de sécurité : un vrai atout. Sensibilité aux enjeux de sécurité applicative, de performance et de conformité (RGPD, PCI DSS). Capacité à travailler en équipe dans un contexte agile et projets multi-interlocuteurs. Esprit analytique, rigueur technique et goût pour les environnements à forte exigence qualité. Les étapes du processus de recrutement chez API : Engageons la conversation ! Pour commencer, nous souhaitons découvrir qui vous êtes : votre parcours, vos intérêts et vos aspirations. Cette première prise de contact nous permettra de mieux vous connaître. Ensuite, approfondissons ! Vous aurez l’occasion de rencontrer nos Business Managers qui vous parleront de la vie de consultant chez API. Ce sera le moment idéal pour découvrir les projets qui retiennent votre attention en fonction de vos ambitions ! Concrétisons ! Une fois l’adéquation entre vos ambitions, vos compétences et le projet établie, l’aventure ensemble peut commencer !

title: Backend Developer
description: Backend Developer Romsey, Hampshire (Hybrid - 3 days office / 2 remote, flexible) £45,000 - £50,000 + Benefits OOP, PHP, Laravel My client build innovative SaaS solutions that help organisations monitor, manage, and optimise critical infrastructure. Following recent growth and their migration to AWS, they're investing heavily in modernising their platform and building new products. I'm now looking for a Backend Developer to join their agile team and play a key role in shaping the future of their technology. The Role This is a hands-on backend role with real ownership. You'll work across both: Stabilising and improving existing Laravel-based systems Designing and building new SaaS products using a modern tech stack You'll act as the backend authority within a small, collaborative team, working closely with a Frontend Developer and Senior UX/UI Designer. What You'll Be Doing Design & Development Build and maintain scalable SaaS applications Develop clean, well-structured backend systems using modern Laravel Design and implement robust RESTful APIs for a React frontend Architecture & Ownership Own backend architecture and code quality Design multi-tenant database structures Apply best practices (service patterns, Eloquent optimisation, clean architecture) System Optimisation Improve performance and reliability of legacy systems Handle complex data migrations Proactively enhance system security Cloud & DevOps Help modernise systems using AWS managed services Maintain and improve CI/CD pipelines Support automated, reliable deployments Collaboration Work closely with frontend and UX on product development Contribute to product discovery and backlog shaping Participate in Agile/SCRUM ceremonies (Jira) Key Technical Requirements 3+ years commercial experience in backend development Strong PHP (8.x) and deep Laravel expertise Solid PostgreSQL experience (schema design, optimisation) Experience building APIs and integrating with frontend frameworks (ideally React) Strong understanding of Agile/SCRUM and TDD Nice to Have Experience with AWS and infrastructure modernisation CI/CD pipeline design and management Exposure to AI tooling (e.g. GitHub Copilot, Claude) Experience with agentic AI systems Familiarity with Figma workflows Interested in this position? Send your CV to tomrayner@spectrumit.co.uk or give me a call on 02380 765 808 Spectrum IT Recruitment (South) Limited is acting as an Employment Agency in relation to this vacancy.

title: Senior Software Developer (Laravel/PHP + AI-Driven Development)
description: Senior Software Developer (Laravel/PHP + AI Destekli Geliştirme) Konum: Remote (Türkiye) Deneyim: Kıdemli (Senior) İleri düzey Laravel bilgisine sahip ve profesyonel süreçlerde aktif olarak yapay zeka araçları kullanma konusunda deneyim sahibi bir Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştirme Uzmanı mısınız? Sizlere ekibimize katılmak için harika bir fırsat sunuyoruz! The Despatch Company olarak müşterilerimize dünya çapında binlerce e-ticaret ve lojistik operasyonuna yön veren, sektörde öncü Depo Yönetim Sistemleri (WMS) sunuyoruz; günde yüzlerce sipariş alan/sevkiyat gerçekleştiren operasyonlar için somut sonuçlar üretiyoruz; ürünlerimizle müşterilerimize gelişmiş envanter, sipariş karşılama ve depo otomasyon yetenekleri sağlıyoruz. Daha fazla bilgi için: helmwms.com Bu rol için yalnızca yüksek kaliteli kodlar yazmakla kalmayıp , yapay zeka araçlarını da iş akışının doğal bir parçası olarak kullanabilen uzmanlar arıyoruz. Sizler bu rolde ölçeklenebilir uygulamalar tasarlamada, yazılımsal olarak geliştirmede, bu uygulamaların geliştirme standartlarını iyileştirmede ve ekibin yapay zeka destekli yazılım mühendisliği uygulamalarını benimsemesinde kilit rol oynayacaksınız. Bunları Yapabilir misiniz? Laravel-PHP kullanarak sağlam backend sistemleri tasarlamak, geliştirmek ve sürdürmek. API 'lar, business logic ve entegrasyonlar oluşturmak ve bunları geliştirmek. Temiz, sürdürülebilir ve iyi test edilmiş kodlar yazmak. Ortaya çıkan ürünü uçtan uca takip edebilmek için Product , Frontend ve QC (Kalite Kontrol) ekipleriyle iş birliği yapmak. Kod incelemeleri (code review) yapmak, arkadaşlarına mentorluk etmek ve bu sayede en iyi pratiklerin inşa edilmesine katkı sağlamak. Yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde hız ve kaliteyi arttırabilmek adına yapay zeka araçlarını (kod oluşturma, hata ayıklama, test yazımı, dokümantasyon, refactoring desteği vb. alanlarda) aktif olarak kullanmak, bu sayede yazılım geliştirme süreçlerini otomatize ve optimize etme fırsatlarını keşfetmek. Mimari kararlara ve teknik planlama süreçlerine katkıda bulunmak. Uygulama performansını, ölçeklenebilirliğini ve güvenliğini optimize etmek. Bunlara sahip misiniz? Yazılım Geliştirme (Software Development) alanında 5+ yıl deneyim . Uzman seviyesinde Laravel deneyimi (mimari, queues, jobs, events, caching, service/repository patterns, API geliştirme, kimlik doğrulama/yetkilendirme, test süreçleri vb.) Güçlü PHP temelleri ve modern kodlama standartları bilgisi. REST API veya GraphQL tasarımı ve kullanımı konusunda deneyim. SQL veritabanları ( MySQL/PostgreSQL ) konusunda sağlam bilgi. Git ve modern yazılım geliştirme iş akışları (workflows) konusunda deneyim. Güçlü problem çözme ve hata ayıklama (debugging) yetenekleri. Yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde kanıtlı yapay zeka araçları* kullanım becerisi. * ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude veya benzeri araçlar. Kod kalitesini ve mühendislik muhakemesini korurken yapay zeka araçlarını etkili bir şekilde kullanma becerisi . Güçlü iletişim becerileri ve bağımsız çalışabilme yeteneği. Ayrıca bunlara sahibim diyor musunuz (tercihen)? Vue.js / Nuxt deneyimi. Laravel ekosistemi araçları ( Horizon, Filament, Forge, Livewire vb.) ile deneyim. CI/CD, Docker , bulut platformları ( AWS, DigitalOcean, GCP, Azure ) bilgisi. Redis, Elasticsearch , queue sistemleri veya “event-driven” teknik mimari deneyimi. Teknik girişimlere liderlik etme veya ekip üyelerine mentorluk yapma deneyimi. Yapay zeka destekli yazılım mühendisliği uygulamalarına, "prompt engineering" e veya dahili araç geliştirmeye ilgi. O zaman bu rolde fark yaratabilirsiniz. Ne Arıyoruz? Sahip olduğu Laravel uzmanlığını , modern ve "yapay zeka odaklı" bir yazılım geliştirme zihniyetiyle birleştiren biri. Kod kalitesinden ödün vermeden hızlı hareket edebilen bir yazılım geliştirme uzmanı. Yapay zekaya nasıl güvenileceğini, ne zaman doğruluğunun kontrol edilip iyileştirilmesi gerektiğini bilen pratik bir düşünür . Yazılım mühendisliği çıtasını yükseltebilecek bir ekip oyuncusu. Neler Sunuyoruz? Dünya çapında kullanılan, sektörde öncü WMS platformlarında çalışma fırsatı Gerçek kullanıcı deneyimini şekillendirme şansı Pek çok farklı ürünün gelişme aşaması hakkında yakın tecrübe etme imkanı Gerçek bir takım ruhuyla uzaktan çalışma fırsatı Tam zamanlı, kadrolu pozisyon

title: Senior Laravel Developer

Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies. Hand-picked opportunities, just for you Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions. One seamless process, multiple opportunities A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments. Compensation Enjoy the same pay, every month with positions landed through Proxify.

title: PHP Developer (Sector retail)
description: En ALDIA estamos en búsqueda de un/a Desarrollador/a Backend con conocimientos en PHP y frameworks como Laravel y Symfony , para uno de nuestros clientes del sector retail en Betanzos (A Coruña). 💼 Ubicación: Modalidad híbrida en Betanzos (1 día a la semana de manera presencial, y última semana de cada mes 100% presencial). 🕑 Horario: de lunes a viernes de 8h a 16:30h (con flexibilidad horaria). 🌐 Idioma: Español avanzado e inglés intermedio. ⭐ RESPONSABILIDADES: Utilizar frameworks como Laravel, Symfony, etc., para desarrollar aplicaciones web completas. Conectar aplicaciones con servicios externos a través de APIs y otras tecnologías. Utilizar sistemas de control de versiones como Git para gestionar el código fuente. Conectar aplicaciones con bases de datos como MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc. 👀 REQUISITOS: Experiencia entre 2 y 4 años como Desarrollador/a Backend con PHP. Conocimientos en uno de estos frameworks: Laravel, Symfony, etc. Conocimientos en BBDD relacionales. Nivel avanzado de español e intermedio de inglés. ¿Por qué ALDIA? 🤝 En ALDIA, te unirás a un equipo internacional especializado en proyectos de IT y desarrollo de software. Trabajamos en una variedad de sectores, desde soluciones empresariales y aplicaciones web hasta integración de sistemas y servicios en la nube. 🌍 En ALDIA estamos comprometidos a crear un ambiente inclusivo y diverso, asegurando igualdad de oportunidades sin importar la raza, religión, sexo, identidad de género, orientación sexual, origen nacional, discapacidad, edad u otras características protegidas. Promovemos la igualdad de género de acuerdo con la Ley Orgánica 3/2007 y valoramos el multiculturalismo, asegurando que todos sean tratados con respeto y dignidad. Cumplimos con todas las prácticas de empleo justas en cuanto a la ciudadanía y el estado de inmigración. Si estás buscando un desafío en un ambiente de trabajo dinámico y colaborativo, y te apasiona la innovación y la excelencia, ¡nos encantaría escuchar de ti! 🚀

title: Software Engineer – Full Stack Development – PHP
description: Job Summary We’re looking for a Full Stack developer who will take a key role on our team. Our Full Stack developer must have knowledge in all stages of software development. The developer will be responsible for managing back-end and front-end services and the interchange of data between the server and the users. Your primary focus will be the development of all server-side logic, definition, and maintenance of the central database, and ensuring high performance and responsiveness to requests from the front-end. You will also be responsible for integrating the front-end elements built by your co-workers into the application. Therefore, a basic understanding of front-end technologies is necessary as well. Responsibilities And Duties Integration of user-facing elements developed by front-end developers Build efficient, testable, and reusable PHP modules Solve complex performance problems and architectural challenges Integration of data storage solutions Required Experience, Skills And Qualifications Strong knowledge of PHP web frameworks such as Laravel, Codeigniter etc Understanding the fully synchronous behavior of PHP Understanding of MVC design patterns Basic understanding of front-end technologies, such as JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3 Knowledge of object-oriented PHP programming Understanding accessibility and security compliance Strong knowledge of the common PHP or web server exploits and their solutions Understanding fundamental design principles behind a scalable application User authentication and authorization between multiple systems, servers, and environments Integration of multiple data sources and databases into one system Familiarity with limitations of PHP as a platform and its workarounds Creating database schemas that represent and support business processes Familiarity with SQL/NoSQL databases and their declarative query languages Proficient understanding of code versioning tools, such as Git

title: PHP Laravel Developer

title: Full Stack Web Developer (JQuery, PHP, MySQL)

Other Duties Work with other departments and management to understand the needs of our customers and deliver high impact features and improvements Develop and maintain highly performant code Keeping technical documentation up to date Keeping up to date with new technologies and advancements Take a hands-on approach to all areas of the role Qualifications required: Highly proficient in HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, JQuery, PHP and MySQL Have a good understanding of web technologies Take a logical and organised approach to problem-solving, asking appropriate questions to facilitate the collection of information required Organised, able to meet deadlines, work under pressure, and deliver on many things at once Team-player who is able to work unsupervised Fluent in English Strong knowledge of the latest developments in the Javascript language and community Must have the right to live and work in the UK Our Tech Stack: HTML5, CSS JQuery, JQuery UI PHP, MySQL AWS Nice to have but not necessary: Basic knowledge of invoicing procedures Web design skills How to work with Wordpress Written integrations with other web software using REST and webhooks

title: PHP Software Developer
description: Met veel autonomie en creatieve vrijheid werken aan innovatieve en veilige applicaties die het verschil maken voor het onderwijs van morgen. Dat is precies wat jij als softwareontwikkelaar bij Kennisnet in Zoetermeer doet. Je ontwikkelt in een scrumteam software voor platforms die scholen en leraren in heel Nederland ondersteunen in hun dagelijkse (digitale) uitdagingen. Wat ga je doen? Als softwaredeveloper bij Kennisnet werk je aan platforms zoals Wikiwijs, de KennisnetWijzer of de Dienst Verwerkersovereenkomsten. Deze tools helpen leraren en scholen in heel Nederland om onder meer passend lesmateriaal te vinden, vorm en inhoud te geven aan schoolontwikkeling of op een veilige manier digitale contracten met leveranciers te beheren. Of je hart nu ligt bij frontend- of backendontwikkeling, hier vind je volop uitdaging. We kijken naar jouw expertise en interesse bij de indeling van de teams. Je komt terecht in 1 van onze 4 zelforganiserende scrumteams, waarin je samen met collega’s verantwoordelijk bent voor een of meerdere producten. Je denkt mee over nieuwe functionaliteiten, onderhoudt de code en waarborgt de veiligheid en kwaliteit van het platform. Daarbij speel je continu in op de behoeften van scholen. Zo heb je af en toe contact met gebruikers – van docenten tot schoolbestuurders – om feedback te krijgen over de platforms en te achterhalen welke vraagstukken rondom ICT spelen. Jij en je collega’s hebben alle vrijheid om de platforms naar een hoger niveau te tillen en nieuwe functionaliteiten te ontwikkelen. Bovendien werken jullie met de nieuwste technologieën en volgens waardevolle werkwijzen om snel en efficiënt software te ontwikkelen, zoals reactief programmeren en continuous delivery. Je ziet je team ongeveer 1 dag per week op kantoor. Wat is Kennisnet? Kennisnet is een superinteressante ICT-dienstverlener in de publieke sector. Digitalisering is cruciaal om talenten van leerlingen en studenten tot bloei te brengen en noodzakelijk om het onderwijs goed te kunnen organiseren. Maar ICT brengt ook veel uitdagingen en dilemma’s met zich mee. Bijvoorbeeld op het vlak van privacy, cybersecurity, leermiddelen en digitale geletterdheid. Kennisnet is de gids die het Nederlandse onderwijs wegwijs maakt in het professioneel inzetten van ICT. Zowel bij het leren als in de bedrijfsvoering. Wij onderzoeken en brengen advies uit. Niet aan één individuele school of docent, maar – en dat maakt ons werk zo leuk – op landelijk niveau aan alle scholen en besturen. Of aan het ministerie van OCW, sectorraden en andere landelijke organisaties. Jouw impact reikt dus heel ver. En dan werk je ook nog in een publieke organisatie vol (politieke) dynamiek én ruimte voor jouw initiatief. Welke kwaliteiten breng je mee? Dankzij je proactieve instelling kun je goed zelfstandig werken, signaleer je kansen voor verbeteringen en durf je met oplossingen te komen die het product beter maken. Je kunt daarnaast goed meebewegen met technologische ontwikkelingen en werkt fijn samen met collega’s. Daarbij komen je communicatieve vaardigheden goed van pas, net als wanneer je niet-technische gebruikers spreekt. Ook heb je: Ervaring met de backendtechnologieën PHP (vanaf versie 7), Symfony (vanaf versie 4), MySQL en PostgreSQL. Ervaring met frontendontwikkeling met Angular 16+ (TypeScript) en JavaScript. Ervaring met de build- en managementtools Docker, Linux, GitLab-CI, Composer, NPM, PHPStorm en VSCode. Een goede beheersing van het Nederlands, zowel mondeling als schriftelijk. Wat krijg je hiervoor terug? Veel! Werken bij Kennisnet betekent werken in een fascinerende omgeving die – net als het onderwijs – nooit stilstaat. Vind jij het leuk om steeds nieuwe kennis op te doen en eigen initiatieven vorm te geven, dan kun je bij ons je hart ophalen. En dat ook nog in een betrokken en open team van onder anderen ontwikkelaars, testers en architecten. Verder kun je rekenen op: 25 vakantiedagen en een brutomaandsalaris tussen € 4.396,47 en € 6.077,25 bij een 40-urige werkweek. Het exacte salaris hangt af van je ervaring en kwaliteiten. 8% vakantiegeld én een flexbudget van 10% van je maandsalaris dat je kunt gebruiken voor bijvoorbeeld extra verlofdagen (maximaal 26) of kunt laten uitkeren. In eerste instantie een jaarcontract. Ben je bij ons op je plek, dan is verlenging voor bepaalde of onbepaalde tijd mogelijk. Flexibele werktijden. En je kiest zelf de werkplek die het beste bij je werkzaamheden past. Een hoge pensioenbijdrage vanuit Kennisnet. Een opleidingsbudget van gemiddeld € 2.475,- per jaar. Een goede reiskostenvergoeding. Een bijdrage aan je aanvullende zorgverzekering. Een thuiswerkvergoeding van € 80,- netto per maand, ongeacht het aantal uren dat je (thuis)werkt. Een laptop of bijdrage voor een eigen device naar keuze. Lees meer over onze arbeidsvoorwaarden. Past deze uitdaging bij jou? Neem dan voor een eerste kennismaking contact op met onze recruiter, Robert van Hest. Samen kunnen jullie dan verkennen of deze rol en Kennisnet als werkgever bij jou passen. Hij vertelt je uiteraard ook graag meer over het sollicitatieproces. Robert is bereikbaar via r.vanhest@kennisnet.nl

title: Backend Web Developer
description: Description Get to Know Us InfoSend has been a trusted provider of cutting-edge eBilling, ePayment, Data Processing, BillPrint & Mail services since 1996. Our services are designed to help organizations simplify their processes and streamline their operations. With strong presence in CA, TX, FL, IL, and MA, we are expanding rapidly and attracting top talent from across the country. Our team of over 230 dedicated professionals includes many long-term employees who are committed to delivering exceptional results for our clients. At InfoSend, we pride ourselves on fostering a culture of belonging and inspiration. We believe in creating an environment where employees can thrive, achieve their full potential, and build fulfilling careers. We are deeply committed to diversity, collaboration, growth, and mobility, and we work hard to create an inclusive workplace where everyone can feel valued and respected. Join us today and become part of a team that is changing the game in the world of eBilling and beyond. Position The Backend Web Developer will play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining backend systems that support our production workflows, client portals, and internal applications. This role requires strong technical expertise, attention to detail, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment where accuracy and security are essential. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including operations and client services to deliver efficient, robust, and secure technology solutions that power our print and mail operations. Remote/Hybrid-If in commutable distance to our Anaheim location. Hours : Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:00pm PST We are flexible for starting times between 7:30am-6:00pm PST. What We Offer Medical, dental, vision, and life insurance Supplemental Insurance Flexible Spending Account 401(k) with generous company match Bonus Opportunity PTO, Sick and Holiday Pay Casual Work Environment Work-life Balance Opportunity for growth Employee Assistance Program Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain backend services, APIs, and data workflows to support internal applications and client-facing portals Integrate systems related to job submission, data processing, production tracking and reporting Build and optimize database structures to support high-volume transactional operations Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve system issues in a timely manner Collaborate with front end programmers to align user facing features with backend functionality Ensure application security, data integrity, and compliance with industry standards (including SOC, HIPAA, PCI, if applicable, etc.) Develop documentation, technical specifications, and maintenance procedures Participate in code reviews and contribute continuous process improvement Support deployment activities Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent experience 5+ years of experience as a backend developer or software engineer Strong proficiency in web programming languages (such as PHP, JavaScript) Experience building APIs, microservices, or distributed applications Strong SQL experience with relational databases (e.g. PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server) Familiarity with version control (SVN), SDLC, CI/CD pipelines Understanding of authentication, authorization, and secure coding best practices Ability to work independently and communicate effectively in a collaborative environment Linux development experience is a plus

title: Backend Developer

Design, develop, and maintain scalable back-end web applications Integrate front-end components with server-side logic Implement core business logic and develop APIs Design and manage databases, servers, and data storage solutions Ensure application security, data protection, performance, and scalability Maintain code quality, integrity, and organization, writing clean and efficient code Troubleshoot, test, debug, and optimize applications to improve functionality and performance Participate in system architecture and software design, taking technical lead on projects when required Requirements What do you need to succeed in this position? Master's degree in IT and minimum 7 years of relevant professional experience (or Bachelor and minimum 11 years of experience) Proficiency with back-end languages and frameworks such as Java, J2EE, PHP, Spring boot and Hibernate Strong understanding of the web development cycle and programming techniques and tools Experience with business rules engines such as Drools and workflow engines such as Camunda, Flex etc Previous experience with database technology such as Oracle, MongoDB Knowledge of code versioning tools such as Git or SVN Familiar with procurement budget implementation and/or procurement contracts management Advanced English (C1) communication skills (written and spoken) At Uni Systems, we are providing equal employment opportunities and banning any form of discrimination on grounds of gender, religion, race, color, nationality, disability, social class, political beliefs, age, marital status, sexual orientation or any other characteristics. Take a look at our Diversity, Equality & Inclusion Policy for more information.

title: Backend Developer (PHP, Symfony) | Remote Spain | High Impact Product
description: Únete a YNS en un momento clave de transformación tecnológica y contribuye a evolucionar un producto con impacto real en millones de usuarios. 📍 España (100% remoto) 💼 Full-time Backend Developer (PHP, Symfony) En YNS buscamos un/a Programador/a PHP Backend Senior (Symfony) que quiera formar parte de un cambio total de nuestra plataforma tecnológica. Nuestra web comercial en España es multiestetica.com . Estamos cambiando el look&feel, y todo el UX/UI de las webs de YNS. Trabajarás sobre un backend clave para el negocio en un momento de transformación total de la plataforma tecnológica: Te enfrentarás a un sistema con historia y complejidad real → ¡un reto técnico de los que motivan! Tendrás impacto directo en decisiones que afectan al producto y al negocio Formarás parte activa de este cambio transformador dentro de un equipo reducido y cercano - 1 backend (contigo 2), 2 frontend + Tech Lead Stack moderno: Symfony, PHP 8.5, MySQL, Redis, RabbitMQ Buscamos a alguien que: Disfrute entendiendo sistemas complejos antes de meter mano (no “romper por romper”) Vea el entorno actual como una base sobre la que mejorar y aportar valor Quiera tener ownership técnico y capacidad real de decisión Sea curiosx y esté al día en IA, con ganas de aplicarla de forma práctica en el producto y en cómo trabajamos Sobre Nosotros: Your New Self (YNS) es un marketplace B2B2C dentro del sector eHealth. Fundada hace 15 años, la empresa se encuentra en una fase de transformación, trabajando en una nueva estrategia para multiplicar por 2 las ventas en los próximos 10 años. YNS opera en 11 mercados en Europa y LATAM y tiene su sede en Barcelona. En 2021, la empresa estadounidense RealSelf adquirió YNS como parte de su plan de expansión internacional. RealSelf tiene su sede en Nueva York y opera en Estados Unidos, Canadá, Australia y Reino Unido con el mismo modelo de negocio. Como grupo, somos el marketplace líder en el sector de la cirugía plástica y la medicina estética. Nuestra misión es ayudar a las personas a tomar decisiones informadas y seguras sobre tratamientos estéticos. Nuestros clientes son clínicas y doctores, y nuestros usuarios finales son sus potenciales pacientes. Actualmente estamos en un proceso de transformación, evolucionando de un marketplace con fuerte dependencia del SEO a una marca user-centric y con multi canales, y mucho foco en el Social Media y la IA. Estamos transformando el negocio, con grandes proyectos en Producto & Tecnología, Marketing, Sales y Operaciones, con el objetivo de escalar el negocio de forma sostenible y rentable. Cómo es Trabajar en YNS: En YNS disfrutamos de lo que hacemos. Nuestra misión es ayudar a las personas a tomar decisiones con confianza sobre tratamientos estéticos. Somos una fuente de referencia en el sector, con más de 130k reviews, más de 24k hilos en foros, más de 54k preguntas a doctores, más de 53k historias de usuarixs y más de 8k artículos. Recibimos más de 30 millones de visitas al año de más de 25 millones de usuarixs (sin contar los mercados de RealSelf). Como parte del grupo RealSelf, operamos en 15 países, con más de 110 millones de usuarios y más de 100k clínicas y doctores presentes en nuestras plataformas. Trabajamos con mentalidad de startup , utilizando metodologías ágiles, con un enfoque data-driven y formas de trabajo propias de compañías digitales. Nuestro equipo es nuestro principal activo. 🔝 Impacto: verás los resultados de tu trabajo en el día a día. 🎢 Desarrollo profesional: grandes retos y oportunidades de crecimiento profesional en un momento clave de la compañía. 🫂 Equipo: equipo pequeño, talentoso y con muy buen ambiente. Tu papel en YNS: Como Backend Developer, tendrás un papel clave en la evolución del producto tecnológico. Estamos en pleno rediseño de nuestra web, reconstruyendo partes clave del producto y evolucionando la arquitectura para acompañar este salto. Te incorporarás en esta fase activa de cambio, colaborando estrechamente con el equipo Tech en decisiones que afectan directamente al core del sistema y donde el impacto de lo que construyas se verá directamente en el producto final. Formarás parte activa de las decisiones técnicas y contribuirás directamente a mejorar la calidad, escalabilidad y mantenibilidad del sistema. Además, te incorporarás en un contexto donde la IA juega un papel relevante en la evolución del producto. Participarás en un entorno donde se están explorando e incorporando nuevas capacidades basadas en IA, con impacto directo en cómo se construyen y escalan nuestras plataformas. Buscamos una persona con experiencia como Backend Developer y con ganas de formar parte del cambio actual, por tanto, con iniciativa y flexibilidad. Responsabilidades: Desarrollar la parte backend de una aplicación web basada en Symfony 6.4 (pronto 7.4) . Escribir código limpio, ordenado, testeable y bien documentado. Asegurar la calidad del código mediante revisión propia, testing y atención al detalle antes de dar una tarea por finalizada. Diseñar e implementar APIs y servicios backend escalables. Colaborar en el análisis técnico de requerimientos funcionales y de negocio. Entender el impacto de cada cambio en el sistema antes de implementarlo. Colaborar estrechamente con backend, frontend, y producto. Proponer mejoras técnicas, refactorizaciones y soluciones creativas. Identificar y mejorar de forma progresiva el código existente sin comprometer la estabilidad del sistema. Participar activamente en el marco de trabajo Scrum (dailies, plannings, retros). Gestionar tareas e incidencias mediante sistemas de ticketing como Jira . Trabajar sobre código existente (legacy), asegurando calidad, mantenibilidad y evolución progresiva. Organizar tu trabajo de forma autónoma y mantener visibilidad sobre el progreso. Stack tecnológico: PHP 8.5 Symfony 6 / 7 MySQL (avanzado) ElasticSearch Redis RabbitMQ Docker AWS (valorable) Kubernetes (valorable) Requisitos: ✅ Esenciales (must-have) +5 años de experiencia profesional en desarrollo backend con PHP. Experiencia sólida con Symfony (preferentemente 6.x o superior). Manejo de MySQL - nivel avanzado (modelado, optimización de queries). Experiencia con ElasticSearch para búsquedas y/o indexación. Uso de Redis (principalmente para caché y datos de soporte). Experiencia con sistemas de mensajería como RabbitMQ . Aplicación práctica de principios de Clean Code y SOLID . Experiencia trabajando bajo metodologías ágiles (Scrum) . Uso habitual de Git y flujos de trabajo colaborativos (pull requests, code reviews). Conocimientos de Docker y entornos containerizados. Perfil ordenado, limpio y metódico al trabajar. Capacidad para estructurar y priorizar tareas sin perder calidad. Actitud proactiva, con iniciativa para proponer mejoras técnicas y funcionales. Alto nivel de ownership y autonomía. Capacidad para entender requerimientos de negocio y transformarlos en soluciones técnicas eficientes. Buenas habilidades de comunicación y trabajo en equipo. Ganas de aprender y mantenerse actualizadx técnicamente. ➕ Se valorará DDD (Domain-Driven Design) / CQRS . Testing (PHPUnit, tests funcionales con Cypress, y tests de integración). Experiencia con Kubernetes . Conocimientos básicos de seguridad en aplicaciones web. Experiencia en sistemas de alta concurrencia o alto volumen de datos. Conocimientos SEO y su aplicación en entornos web. Experiencia con AWS. Experiencia con JetBrains PhpStorm o similares. Experiencia previa con Python aplicado a IA. Buen nivel de inglés Qué ofrecemos: Trabajo 100% remoto. Proyecto estable con contrato indefinido Paquete retributivo competitivo acorde a la experiencia y responsabilidades del rol Horarios de entrada y pausas flexibles: Entrada entre las 08:15h y 09:15h Descanso de 30 a 60 min Salida entre las 17:00h y 18:00h (según jornada) Viernes de jornada intensiva (salida a partir de las 14:30h). Jornada intensiva en Agosto/Julio. Seguro médico privado gratuito y posibilidad de incluir familiares en condiciones especiales y con ventajas fiscales. Retribución flexible (tarjeta restaurante, transporte y guardería). Pago de nómina el día 25 de cada mes. Posibilidad de trabajar en remoto fuera de España durante varias semanas al año (Semana Santa, verano y Navidad). Entorno joven, dinámico y con experiencia en entornos digitales B2B2C. Trabajarás en un entorno internacional, dinámico y en constante evolución, propio del mundo digital. Si te motiva trabajar sobre sistemas reales, con impacto directo en producto y negocio, y formar parte de una transformación tecnológica de verdad, nos encantará conocerte.

title: DÉVELOPPEUR(SE) PHP SENIOR F/H
description: iTekway, société de prestations de services techniques et d’ingénierie agréée entreprise adaptée, met son expertise du handicap au service de ses clients pour leurs recrutements inclusifs. Nous confier votre candidature, c’est avoir l’assurance de bénéficier d’un accompagnement personnalisé jusqu’à votre prise de poste. Intégrer iTekway, c’est rejoindre une entreprise à taille humaine porteuse de valeurs sociétales fortes et d’une ambition de développement et de réussite à laquelle participeront tous ceux qui lui feront confiance 🤝 ! 🚀 En tant qu'Entreprise Adaptée, à compétences égales, nous privilégions l'embauche de personnes titulaires de la Reconnaissance de la Qualité de Travailleur Handicapé (RQTH). Le poste Notre client est un leader européen du secteur des transports et de la mobilité durable. Dans le cadre du renforcement d'un de ses centres de services numériques majeurs, nous recherchons un(e) Développeur(se) PHP Expérimenté(e). Intégré(e) au pôle de maintenance et d'évolution applicative, vous interviendrez sur des applications critiques garantissant la continuité de service et l'optimisation des flux d'information du réseau de transport. Vos missions : Sous la responsabilité d'un Lead Developer, vous assurez la robustesse et l'évolution du patrimoine applicatif : 👉 Assurer la conception technique et le développement de nouvelles fonctionnalités complexes ; 👉 Garantir la maintenance corrective et évolutive des applications existantes ; 👉 Réaliser des audits de code et veiller au respect des bonnes pratiques de développement (Clean Code, SOLID) ; 👉 Participer activement à l'optimisation des performances et à la sécurisation des échanges de données ; 👉 Accompagner la montée en compétences des profils plus juniors par du mentoring et des revues de code ; 👉 Collaborer avec les équipes d'infrastructure pour le déploiement et le monitoring des solutions. Environnement technique : Langage : PHP (versions récentes) Frameworks : Symfony ou Laravel (selon l'application concernée) Base de données : MySQL / PostgreSQL API : REST / SOAP Outils : Git, Docker Méthodologie : Cycle en V ou Agile selon les périmètres applicatifs du centre de services. Profil recherché ✅ Vous justifiez d'une expérience de 5 ans minimum en développement PHP, idéalement acquise sur des projets à forte volumétrie ou enjeux critiques. ✅ Vous maîtrisez les concepts de l'Architecture Logicielle et les Design Patterns. ✅ Vous êtes reconnu(e) pour votre rigueur, votre capacité d'analyse et votre sens du service client. ✅ La connaissance des problématiques liées au secteur du transport ou de la logistique est un plus. Conditions : Localisation : Lyon ou Grenoble

title: Team Lead PHP
company: Zero to One Search | Recruitment Agency
description: Our client is part of a leading digital group and is building a modern mobile banking platform with the goal of setting new standards in mobile banking. To support this growth, our client is looking for a Team Lead PHP Software Development who is motivated to actively contribute to the further development of a digital banking platform. This position is ideal for individuals with a passion for modern software development who enjoy a hands-on approach and are eager to lead and develop a team in a dynamic environment. Location: Germany, Frankfurt Type of contract: permanent, on-site (1 day home office) You Will: lead your development team both technically and disciplinarily, and promote a cooperative, modern team culture. continuously develop your team – through mentoring, coaching, and constructive feedback. design sustainable technical standards, conventions, and scalable software and system architectures. develop and optimize processes and ensure effective automation. be actively involved in the development of new features as well as the further development of existing features to a high standard. assume overall responsibility for the IT system landscape of your area – from software and servers to availability. Requirements You have at least 3-5 years of professional experience as a senior developer or software architect and demonstrable leadership experience. You have very good knowledge of object-oriented PHP development and are proficient in using Symfony. You bring sound MySQL knowledge as well as good experience in Linux/Debian administration. Ideally, you have experience with Ansible and automation processes. You enjoy working hands-on, are motivated, and have a passion for modern software development. Excellent German and English skills. Benefits Long-term perspective: The client is growing continuously and offer it's colleagues long-term career prospects. Start-up flair: The security of an established online company with a start-up flair – They plan for the long term, and at the same time, you have the opportunity to actively shape the bank. An environment where you'll feel comfortable: Relaxed work environment, informal atmosphere, regular drinks, cool team events with colleagues Further training opportunities: A wide range of training courses and specialized personnel development support you on your career path. Extras: Germany ticket, vouchers for numerous clients' products, free drinks, fresh fruit and free lunches! Excellent transport links: The offices are very centrally located with excellent transport links. Business Bike: Your new bicycle leased – with financial support.
