title: Desarrollador Full Stack Senior - San Fernando de Henares
company: Pardo Selección Personal Sanitario y Recursos Humanos
description: ¿Quieres seguir creciendo como desarrollador senior, trabajar en proyectos corporativos de impacto y formar parte de un equipo estable y tecnológico? Buscamos un Desarrollador Full Stack Senior con al menos 5 años de experiencia para unirse a nuestro equipo de IT. Tu día a día: Analizar requisitos y diseñar soluciones técnicas escalables Desarrollar y mantener aplicaciones web (frontend + backend) Optimizar rendimiento, seguridad e integraciones entre sistemas Trabajar con herramientas Microsoft (Power BI, SharePoint, Teams) y resolver incidencias complejas Lo que buscamos: Experiencia sólida en al menos dos de estos stacks: PHP (Laravel o Symfony) · JavaScript/TypeScript (React, Angular o Vue) · C# / .NET Core Bases de datos: SQL Server o MySQL Diseño de APIs REST Inglés nivel B2/C1 (lectura y comunicación técnica) FPII o equivalente + capacidad analítica, autonomía y ganas de proponer mejoras ¿Qué ofrecemos? Entorno estable con proyectos variados Posibilidad de impacto real en la compañía Trabajo en equipo con buena comunicación y mejora continua Si te motiva el desarrollo full stack, la resolución de problemas reales y seguir aprendiendo en un entorno corporativo, ¡aplica ahora! Envía tu CV o contáctame directamente.

title: PHP Developer
description: About The Company Wir von CHECK24 haben es uns zum Ziel gesetzt, unseren Kunden Deutschlands besten Versicherungsvergleich zu bieten – einfach, transparent und fair. Unser Unternehmen ist führend in der Vergleichsbranche, spezialisiert auf die Entwicklung innovativer Produkte, die den Alltag unserer Nutzer erleichtern. Mit modernster Technologie, einem engagierten Team und einer starken Unternehmenskultur setzen wir Maßstäbe im digitalen Versicherungsvergleich. Unser Fokus liegt auf kontinuierlicher Verbesserung, Kundenzufriedenheit und der Nutzung neuester Technologien wie Künstliche Intelligenz, um unseren Service auf das nächste Level zu heben. Als Teil unseres Teams hast du die Möglichkeit, aktiv an der Gestaltung der Zukunft der Versicherungsbranche mitzuwirken und innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln. About The Role Als Senior PHP Entwickler (m/w/d) bei CHECK24 bist du maßgeblich an der Weiterentwicklung unserer Versicherungsprodukte beteiligt. Du unterstützt bei der Entwicklung neuer Features, die auf modernsten Web-Technologien und KI-Tools basieren, um unseren Vergleich noch smarter und effizienter zu gestalten. Deine Aufgaben umfassen die Weiterentwicklung und Wartung der Systemarchitektur, die aus Frontend, Backend, Datenbanken, MCP-Servern und Caches besteht. Zudem bist du verantwortlich für die Optimierung und Skalierung unseres Systems in einer serviceorientierten Architektur. Durch aktive Teilnahme an Code Reviews, automatisierten Tests und die Einhaltung unserer Qualitätsstandards stellst du sicher, dass unsere Produkte stets höchsten Ansprüchen genügen. Dabei arbeitest du eng mit interdisziplinären Teams zusammen, um innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln, die unsere Marktposition stärken und unsere Nutzer begeistern. Qualifications Für diese Position solltest du ein abgeschlossenes Studium in Informatik, Naturwissenschaften oder einem vergleichbaren technischen Studiengang vorweisen können. Zudem bringst du mindestens vier Jahre Berufserfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung mit, idealerweise in agilen Umgebungen. Fundierte Kenntnisse in relationalen Datenbanken wie MySQL sind ebenso erforderlich wie Erfahrung mit Frameworks wie Symfony, React.js und React-Router. Du besitzt ein tiefgehendes Verständnis für Softwarearchitektur und Clean Code Prinzipien. Sehr gute Englischkenntnisse (C1) in Wort und Schrift sowie Deutschkenntnisse (B2) runden dein Profil ab. Teamgeist, Eigeninitiative und die Bereitschaft, vor Ort im Office in Frankfurt zu arbeiten, sind für dich selbstverständlich. Responsibilities Deine Hauptverantwortung liegt in der Entwicklung und Implementierung neuer Features für unsere Versicherungsprodukte unter Einsatz modernster Technologien und KI-Tools. Du arbeitest an der Weiterentwicklung und Wartung der gesamten Systemarchitektur, inklusive Frontend, Backend, Datenbanken, MCP-Servern und Caches. Die Optimierung und Skalierung unserer Systeme in einer serviceorientierten Architektur gehören ebenso zu deinem Aufgabenbereich. Du stellst die Qualität unserer Software durch aktive Teilnahme an Code Reviews, automatisierten Tests und Einhaltung unserer Qualitätsstandards sicher. Darüber hinaus arbeitest du eng mit anderen Teams zusammen, um innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln, die unsere Produkte verbessern und die Nutzererfahrung optimieren. Dein Beitrag trägt maßgeblich dazu bei, CHECK24 als führenden Anbieter im Versicherungsvergleich zu positionieren und kontinuierlich weiterzuentwickeln. Benefits Bei CHECK24 profitierst du von zahlreichen Vorteilen, die deine persönliche und berufliche Entwicklung fördern. Wir bieten ein attraktives Gehaltspaket sowie Gutscheine für eine Vielzahl an CHECK24-Produkten. Zudem unterstützen wir dich großzügig bei deiner betrieblichen Altersvorsorge und beteiligen dich an den Kosten für den EGYM Wellpass. Unser Arbeitsumfeld ist auf Work-Life-Balance ausgerichtet: Von Montag bis Donnerstag arbeitest du vor Ort, während du am Freitag die Möglichkeit hast, mobil zu arbeiten. Du erhältst 28 Tage Urlaub sowie bis zu 10 Tage unbezahlten Urlaub. Wir stellen dir einen ergonomischen Arbeitsplatz mit modernem Equipment bereit, inklusive MacBook Pro, zusätzlichen Bildschirmen und höhenverstellbarem Tisch. Individuelles Equipment wie ergonomische Mäuse oder Noise-Cancelling-Kopfhörer sind ebenfalls verfügbar. Persönliches Wachstum wird bei uns großgeschrieben: Wir bieten vielfältige Weiterbildungs- und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten sowie einen breiten Trainingskatalog. Für das leibliche Wohl ist ebenfalls gesorgt: Kostenfreies Frühstück, Office-Lunch, frisches Obst und Getränke stehen dir jederzeit zur Verfügung. Zudem fördern wir nachhaltige Mobilität durch ein kostenloses Deutschlandticket und Firmenfahrradleasing. Unser lockeres CHECKito Spirit sorgt für ein angenehmes Arbeitsumfeld mit Duz-Kultur, regelmäßigen Team-Events und einer Game Area mit Kickertisch, Tischtennis und Dartscheibe sowie einer Dachterrasse mit Skyline-Blick. Equal Opportunity CHECK24 ist ein Arbeitgeber, der Chancengleichheit fördert. Wir setzen uns für eine inklusive Arbeitsumgebung ein, in der Vielfalt geschätzt wird. Unabhängig von Geschlecht, Alter, ethnischer Herkunft, Religion, Behinderung, sexueller Orientierung oder Identität bieten wir allen Mitarbeitenden gleiche Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Wir glauben an die Kraft der Vielfalt und sind bestrebt, ein Arbeitsumfeld zu schaffen, in dem sich jeder wohl und respektiert fühlt. Bei uns zählt die Leistung und das Engagement jedes Einzelnen, und wir freuen uns auf Bewerbungen von Menschen aller Hintergründe.

title: Senior PHP Developer
description: Voor een ambitieus en snelgroeiend softwarebedrijf ben ik op zoek naar een ervaren Senior Backend Developer (Laravel). Deze organisatie, gevestigd in Den Bosch, bestaat uit een hecht team van 15 gedreven professionals. De groei is volop gaande en jij kunt hier een sleutelrol in spelen. Vanuit het moderne kantoor ontwikkelt dit bedrijf hoogwaardige maatwerksoftware voor MKB(+) ondernemingen, vaak actief binnen specifieke nichemarkten. De focus ligt op het automatiseren en digitaliseren van bedrijfsprocessen met als doel tijdsbesparing en omzetgroei voor klanten. De cultuur is informeel, professioneel en sterk gericht op samenwerking, kwaliteit en persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Je komt terecht in een team met onder andere front-end developers, een UX designer en ervaren backend developers. Hier wordt niet gewerkt met strakke hiërarchie, maar met vertrouwen, verantwoordelijkheid en ruimte voor eigen initiatief. Vrijdagmiddagborrels en gezamenlijke lunches horen daar vanzelfsprekend bij. Functie: Als Senior Backend Developer werk je aan robuuste en schaalbare backend-oplossingen met Laravel. Je bent van begin tot eind betrokken bij projecten en denkt actief mee over architectuur, performance en beveiliging. Samen met frontend developers en andere stakeholders vertaal je wensen naar technische oplossingen die écht waarde toevoegen. Je start de dag met het team en schakelt daarna moeiteloos tussen verschillende lopende projecten. Naast het bouwen van nieuwe functionaliteiten ben je verantwoordelijk voor het onderhouden en optimaliseren van bestaande systemen. Ook speel je een belangrijke rol in code reviews, het delen van best practices en het begeleiden van junior en medior developers, eventueel ondersteund door de CTO. Eisen: HBO werk- en denkniveau Minimaal 5 jaar ervaring als Backend Developer Uitgebreide ervaring met het Laravel framework Kennis van moderne PHP-standaarden en best practices Ervaring met databases zoals MySQL en/of PostgreSQL Sterk probleemoplossend vermogen Goede communicatieve vaardigheden In staat om zelfstandig te werken én teamleden te begeleiden Hands-on mentaliteit en snel kunnen schakelen Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse taal Aanbod: Goed salaris, afgestemd op kennis en ervaring Fulltime dienstverband (36–40 uur) Veel verantwoordelijkheid en beslissingsbevoegdheid Mogelijkheid tot deels thuiswerken + internetvergoeding Interne opleidingsmogelijkheden via het ontwikkelplatform Ruimte voor persoonlijke én professionele ontwikkeling Goede pensioenregeling Reiskostenvergoeding (€0,23 per km) Laptop of BYOD-vergoeding Dagelijks verzorgde lunch (2x per week warm) & vers fruit Interne fitnessruimte Vrijdagmiddagborrel, teamuitjes en informele werksfeer Denk jij dat je geschikt bent voor deze rol en wil je bouwen aan innovatieve softwareoplossingen binnen een groeiende organisatie? Solliciteer direct en ontdek hoe jij impact kunt maken binnen dit team. Contactpersoon: Jim Loggers | jim@starapple.nl | 06-30804529

title: Développeur PHP Senior
location: Nantes, Pays de la Loire, France
description: Contexte Notre client est une fintech créée en 2014, spécialisée dans les services financiers pour les professionnels, TPE-PME et associations. La société propose un compte professionnel complet avec cartes Mastercard, ainsi qu’une plateforme digitale permettant de gérer la trésorerie, créer des factures, encaisser des clients ou automatiser la comptabilité. Depuis 2023, l’entreprise se concentre sur les grandes associations dans le secteur social et médico-social. Missions principales En tant que Développeur PHP Senior (Back-End) , vous participerez au développement et à la maintenance des fonctionnalités existantes et nouvelles. Vos missions incluront : Rédaction de documents d’analyse technique. Développement de nouvelles fonctionnalités sur le back-end. Maintenance et support sur la base de code existante (souvent legacy). Réalisation de tests pour garantir la conformité aux spécifications fonctionnelles. Rédaction de documentation technique sur le nouveau code et sur le code existant. Profil candidat: Profil recherché Minimum 3-4 ans d’expérience en développement back-end PHP/Symfony. Maîtrise des bases de données relationnelles (MySQL et/ou PostgreSQL). Expérience sur des produits SaaS. Excellentes capacités d’analyse et de synthèse. Capacité à prendre des initiatives et à proposer des évolutions techniques. À l’aise avec le code legacy et force de proposition pour son amélioration. Informations complémentaires Besoin urgent (ASAP). L’entretien se fera en présentiel sur site à Nantes.

title: Backend Engineer, Data
description: Who we are About Stripe Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career. About The Team The Data Foundations team drives Data Engineering and Data Apps & Tooling work across Stripe, enabling Stripes to leverage data to make informed decisions and build user-centric products. We provide tools and infrastructure to move, store, process, and analyze data, both at rest and in motion. We are looking for talented data-minded software engineers to help us manage business-critical data leveraged across the entire organization. If you are passionate about data, excited about designing data pipelines and data-driven user experiences, and motivated by having an outsized impact on the business, we want to hear from you. Team Matching: exact team matching for one of the subteams will begin during final stages. Please note we may also consider you for different orgs based on your experience, location, etc. More information on our team matching process can be found here. What you’ll do Every record in our data warehouse is vitally important for the businesses that use Stripe, so we’re looking for people with a strong background in software engineering and data to help us scale while maintaining correct and complete data. You’ll be working with a variety of internal teams across Product, Data Science, and GTM to help them solve their data needs. Your work will provide visibility into how these stakeholders and the Data Foundations organization are performing and how we can deliver a better experience to Stripe's customers. Responsibilities Design, develop, and own data pipelines, models, and products that power the Product, Data Science, and GTM functions Develop strong subject matter expertise and manage the SLAs for both data pipelines and full stack web applications that support these critical stakeholders Build and refine Stripe's data foundations - infrastructure, pipelines, and tools to enable various teams at Stripe - working with Scala, Spark, and Airflow Leverage LLM and Agents at scale to produce high-quality data on ambiguous problems Refine our existing data marts that help the GTM organization forecast the future potential performance of the business and reliably measure ongoing attainment toward targets Build data services that track key product metrics and measure the impact of different strategies employed by teams in the field Our tech stack is Spark, Scala, Java, SQL, and Python - and while we don’t expect everyone on the team to be an expert in all of these, you will work across all of these technologies throughout your tenure on the team Who you are We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement. Minimum Requirements Must have 6+ years of experience in a Software Engineering role, with a focus on building and maintaining data services, or data-intensive applications. A strong engineering background and are interested in data Prior experience with writing and debugging data pipelines using a distributed data framework (Spark / Hadoop / Pig etc) An inquisitive nature in diving into data inconsistencies to pinpoint issues, and resolve deep rooted data quality issues Knowledge of a backend development language (such as Scala, Java, or Go) and strong SQL experience The ability to communicate cross-functionally, derive requirements and architect shared datasets A strong engineering background and an interest in data Preferred Requirements Experience creating and maintaining Data Marts to power business reporting needs Experience working with Product or GTM (Sales/Marketing) teams Hybrid work at Stripe This role is available either in an office or a remote location (35+ miles or 56+ km from a Stripe office). In-office expectations Office-assigned Stripes spend at least 50% of the time in a given month in their local office or with users. This hits a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility about how to do this in a way that makes sense for individuals and their teams. Working remotely at Stripe A remote location is defined as being 35 miles (56 kilometers) or more from one of our offices. While you would be welcome to come into the office for team/business meetings, on-sites, meet-ups, and events, our expectation is you would regularly work from home rather than a Stripe office. Stripe does not cover the cost of relocating to a remote location. We encourage you to apply for roles that match the location where you currently live or plan to live. Pay and benefits The annual salary range for this role in the primary location is CA$135,200 - CA$202,800. This range may change if you are hired in another location. For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings (“OTE”) range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonuses target and annual base salary for the role. This salary range may be inclusive of several career levels at Stripe and will be narrowed during the interview process based on a number of factors, including the candidate’s experience, qualifications, and specific location. Applicants interested in this role and who are not located in the primary location may request the annual salary range for their location during the interview process. Specific benefits and details about what compensation is included in the salary range listed above will vary depending on the applicant’s location and can be discussed in more detail during the interview process. Benefits/additional compensation for this role may include: equity, company bonus or sales commissions/bonuses; retirement plans; health benefits; and wellness stipends. Hybrid work at Stripe This role is available either in an office or a remote location (35+ miles or 56+ km from a Stripe office). In-office expectations Office-assigned Stripes spend at least 50% of the time in a given month in their local office or with users. This hits a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility about how to do this in a way that makes sense for individuals and their teams. Working remotely at Stripe A remote location is defined as being 35 miles (56 kilometers) or more from one of our offices. While you would be welcome to come into the office for team/business meetings, on-sites, meet-ups, and events, our expectation is you would regularly work from home rather than a Stripe office. Stripe does not cover the cost of relocating to a remote location. We encourage you to apply for roles that match the location where you currently live or plan to live.

title: Senior Software Engineer - FrontEnd (ReactJS, NextJs)
description: Job Description WHAT YOU’LL DO We are seeking a skilled and experienced Senior Software Engineer with expertise in React, Typescript, and Next.JS to join our dynamic development team. As an experienced Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for designing and implementing the user interface of our web applications using React and related technologies. You will work in an agile team and collaborate with our product managers, designers, and backend engineers to deliver high-quality, scalable, and user-friendly software solutions. At H&M, one of our core principles is "We are One Team." You will be part of a global team working alongside colleagues in Sweden. Responsibilities Develop user-friendly, responsive web applications using React.js, Next.JS and related frameworks. Collaborate with product managers and UI/UX designers to translate requirements and wireframes into high-quality frontend code. Optimize application performance and user experience by implementing efficient and reusable frontend components. Conduct code reviews, identify areas of improvement, and provide constructive feedback to maintain code quality and consistency. Work closely with architects to drive the design elements. Work closely with backend engineers to integrate frontend components with backend APIs and services. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to plan, prioritize, and deliver high-quality software solutions within defined timelines. Stay up to date with the latest frontend development trends, tools, and best practices, and share knowledge with the team. Troubleshoot and resolve frontend issues, bugs, and performance bottlenecks. Write clean, well-documented code and ensure proper version control using Git or other version control systems WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH ​ At H&M, you’ll be part of a global, cross-functional team focused on enabling data-driven decision making at the core of our customer offering. Our mission is to empower assortment teams to efficiently and accurately plan and adjust demand for articles across all markets and touchpoints, with the flexibility to swiftly adapt to changing circumstances. We achieve this by providing solutions for both manual (SQUID) and AI-supported (ASQ) assortment quantification, along with benchmarking and analysis through our aggregated planning solution (APT). You will work closely with a Product Manager (PM), Engineering Manager (EM), and Tech Lead to define, prioritize, and deliver frontend initiatives aligned with product and business goals. Together, you will ensure clear ownership, strong technical direction, and high-quality execution of UI deliverables. You will collaborate deeply with UX Designers to translate design concepts into intuitive, accessible, and high-performing user interfaces, ensuring consistency and excellence in user experience. As part of a cross-functional setup, you will also partner with a Designer, Production teams, driving alignment across the product lifecycle and ensuring seamless execution from concept to delivery. In addition, you will actively engage with peer engineering teams and stakeholders, fostering strong collaboration, influencing technical decisions, and ensuring dependencies are managed effectively in a fast-paced environment. WHO YOU ARE We are looking for people with... Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience), and 6-10 years of experience as a Software Engineer. Proven work experience as a Frontend Engineer, with a focus on React and Next.JS. Strong proficiency in JavaScript, Typescript, HTML, and CSS. Extensive experience with React.js. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices. Familiarity with popular React libraries and frameworks such as Redux, React Router, or Next.js. Knowledge of frontend build tools and module bundlers such as Webpack or Babel. Experience with Git. Ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment and communicate technical concepts. Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies and frameworks. Familiarity with backend technologies (e.g., Node.js) and RESTful APIs. Experience with testing frameworks such as Jest or React Testing Library. Knowledge of UI/UX design principles and ability to work closely with designers. Familiarity with Agile/Scrum development methodologies And people who are Passionate about problem-solving and building scalable applications. Excited about working in a fast-paced, Agile environment. Open to learning and adapting to new technologies and best practices. Team players with strong collaboration and communication skills. WHO WE ARE H&M is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make. We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​ Help us re-imagine fashion and together we will re-shape our industry. Learn more about H&M here. WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE At H&M, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​ We offer all our employees at H&M attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET, Afound. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here. In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment types and countries. JOIN US Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​ Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​ * We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application Additional Information This is a full-time position, starting in May 2026 . Apply by sending in your CV in English as soon as possible, but no later than 21st of April 2026. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through the SmartRecruiters or career page.

Always put themselves in the shoes of the end-users, considering their needs, pain points, and expectations throughout the development process. Strive to deliver solutions that truly address customer requirements and enhance user satisfaction. Code Quality: Prioritize writing clean, modular, and maintainable code. Adhere to coding standards, unit tests, design patterns, and best practices. Quick to adapt to changing project requirements, technologies, and work environments. Thrive in dynamic settings. Familiarity with database concepts, including query optimization and data modeling.

title: Backend Engineer
description: About Ecopass: Ecopass is a future-forward tech company building infrastructure for circular, transparent and trusted product ecosystem. About the role: We are hiring a Founding Engineer to own and evolve the backend foundation of Ecopass . This is a backend-first role with real influence over architecture, data model quality, API standards, tenant isolation, reliability, and the way product truth moves across the platform. This is not a junior or ticket-closing role ; it is a high-ownership role for someone who wants to shape core systems early and work at the boundary of product, device workflows, and applied AI. What you will own: Backend architecture across data modelling, API design, versioning, testing standards, multi-tenancy, RBAC, and operational reliability. API consistency across our internal platform and consumer-facing product experiences. Device-to-cloud foundations for representing physical products as live, queryable entities. Observability, deployment confidence, queue/background job reliability, and engineering discipline. What success looks like in your first 6 months: Improve API consistency and backend standards across product surfaces. Strengthen tenant isolation, RBAC, and production-grade data modelling. Raise reliability across logging, monitoring, background jobs, and deployment workflows. Ship pragmatic improvements across Platform, CRM and selected AI-related workflows. What we are looking for: Graduate of Computer Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering from one of Turkey’s leading universities. A master’s degree is a plus. Minimum 3 years of meaningful engineering experience. In exceptional cases, we may also consider candidates with 2 years of full-time post-graduation experience plus 1 year of substantial long-term internship experience . Strong backend depth in Node.js and TypeScript ; NestJS is highly valuable, but not mandatory. Strong SQL and PostgreSQL fundamentals, including indexing, query optimisation, schema design, and migration-safe thinking. Genuine interest in AI as a product capability, not just as an API wrapper. High ownership and comfort operating in an early-stage environment where decisions matter. How you work: You communicate clearly and proactively-in writing and in person. You have strong ethical standards and good judgement. You are self-driven and do not need task-by-task management to move important work forward. Relevant tech environment: Today, the core backend is Laravel 12 / PHP 8.2 + PostgreSQL . The platform and DPP surfaces are React 19/Vite applications. Some fetaures run as a separate TypeScript/Hono service. Shared infrastructure is managed through Terraform, Helm, Kubernetes, and Azure/AKS , and RF operations connect through dedicated bridge tooling. Why Ecopass: Ecopass is building around a closed loop: B2B creates product truth, B2C activates and uses it, and lifecycle events feed back into operations. That gives this role both technical depth and real product consequence. Early traction: initial round closed at a $1.6M valuation , selected into TÜSİAD BGİV , accepted into Bilişim Vadisi Teknopark and already generating revenue. Close collaboration with product, hardware-adjacent, and university-linked R&D. Competitive salary plus ESOP of up to 1% for exceptional fit. Hiring process: Intro conversation → Technical/case round → On-site conversation → Final: founder & investor meeting. We aim to move fast and close this hire within 5 weeks . Apply: Send us your CV, LinkedIn profile, and any GitHub or portfolio links that help us understand how you think and build.

title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend, Google Cloud
description: Minimum qualifications: Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience. 5 years of experience in a full software development lifecycle, including design, coding, testing, and maintenance. 3 years of experience with software development, across the back-end such as Java or API development. About The Job Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward. Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems. Responsibilities Write and test product or system development code. Participate in, or lead design reviews with peers and stakeholders to decide amongst available technologies. Review code developed by other developers and provide feedback to ensure best practices (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency). Contribute to existing documentation or educational content and adapt content based on product/program updates and user feedback. Triage product or system issues and debug/track/resolve by analyzing the sources of issues and the impact on hardware, network, or service operations and quality. Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. Our mission is to build the world’s first mesh energy infrastructure — built to unite people and communities through resilient, secure, and intelligent power. We design, engineer, manufacture, install, and support our systems end-to-end, standing behind them throughout their lifecycle. Torus systems help reduce costs, lower emissions, and protect facilities from outages, while strengthening the security and reliability of the broader utility grid. Torus is committed to American manufacturing, engineering excellence, and building energy systems that last. At Torus, you will be part of something larger than a single product or technology. Your work will help build energy infrastructure that supports critical systems, industry, and communities for decades to come. We value accountability, collaboration, and clear thinking. We are looking for people who want to solve hard problems and build things that matter. This role is ideal for an experienced engineer who thrives in a hands-on environment—designing, developing, and delivering scalable systems that power our hardware-software integration, customer-facing applications, and internal tools. You will contribute to the architecture and implementation of full-stack systems spanning front-end experiences and backend services, working across the software lifecycle—from ideation to production—while partnering closely with Product, Design, Firmware, Data Science, and other engineering teams to deliver high-quality solutions that drive real-world impact in the renewable energy space. This role requires someone who can take ownership of complex features, contribute to system design, and collaborate effectively across disciplines, with opportunities to continue expanding technical scope and impact over time. Who You Are Passionate about climate solutions, sustainability, and building technology that matters Motivated by solving complex problems and delivering impactful customer experiences Strong collaborator who communicates effectively across technical and non-technical teams Self-driven and accountable—you take ownership of your work and outcomes Curious and growth-oriented, continuously learning new tools, patterns, and technologies Pragmatic—you balance speed with quality and long-term maintainability What You’ll Do Full Stack Development & Delivery Design, build, and maintain scalable full-stack applications using modern technologies Build and maintain backend services, APIs, and data models supporting customer-facing and internal systems Develop responsive, performant front-end interfaces that deliver exceptional user experiences Contribute to system design and architecture discussions, making thoughtful tradeoffs Participate in the full software development lifecycle: requirements, design, implementation, testing, deployment, and support Backend & Cloud Systems Implement cloud-native solutions using AWS services Develop RESTful APIs, event-driven services, and integrations supporting hardware-software coordination Ensure systems are reliable, secure, and scalable through proper design and implementation AI Experience & Application Experience using AI-assisted development tools to improve productivity and code quality, including tasks such as code generation, debugging, and documentation Familiarity with integrating AI-enabled APIs or services into applications Understanding of evaluating AI outputs for accuracy and reliability Interest in applying AI to enhance product features and development workflows Collaboration & Team Contribution Partner with Product and Design to translate requirements into technical solutions Collaborate with firmware, IoT, and data teams on integrated system functionality Participate in code reviews, pair programming, and knowledge sharing Contribute to shared component libraries and promote consistency across applications Required Experience Technical Proficiency Strong experience in full-stack development with TypeScript Proficiency in modern front-end frameworks such as React, Next.js/Tanstack Start, Tailwind. Experience building backend services and APIs (Node.js or similar) Experience with AWS cloud services (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, IoT Core, ECS/Fargate, CDK or similar) Solid understanding of software architecture, API design, and distributed systems fundamentals Experience implementing responsive, accessible, cross-browser compatible interfaces Implement comprehensive testing strategies and CI/CD pipelines for continuous delivery (experience with GitHub Actions is a plus) Experience using AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Copilot, ChatGPT) Experience & Impact Typically 5–8 years of professional software engineering experience Proven track record delivering production-quality software in complex environments Experience owning features or systems from design through deployment and support Demonstrated ability to break down complex problems and deliver effective solutions Collaboration & Ownership Strong communication and collaboration skills Experience working in cross-functional teams in fast-paced environments Ability to balance technical excellence with business needs Ownership mindset—takes responsibility for delivering outcomes, not just tasks Additional Details Background Check All candidates are subject to a background check. Location Remote U.S.-based role with occasional onsite work in Springville and/or Salt Lake City locations (air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned). Must be available during MST business hours. Compensation $125,000 - 160,000 (Note: We have the flexibility to hire at different levels, which may impact the corresponding pay range.) Work Authorization Applicants must already have the legal authorization to work in the US without requiring any employer sponsorship. Physical Requirements Constantly operates a computer and other peripheral office equipment such as a printer or mouse. Ability to communicate information so others can understand. Must be able to exchange accurate information in these situations. Must report to work reliably and with the ability to use full and unimpaired skills and judgment to safely execute your job. Proficiency in reading, writing, and speaking English required. When on the production floor, required to don personal protective equipment to include, but not limited to ear protection, gloves, eye protection and/or safety helmet. When on the production floor, ability to observe, detect and respond to audible and visual machine malfunction warnings. Our Perks & Benefits Employee Rewards Package including equity 401(k) Retirement Savings Plan Health Benefits Package: Choice between traditional PPO or HSA eligible medical plans; Dental insurance; and Vision insurance Human-centered Paid Time Off (based on employment status) including unlimited discretionary PTO; 10-days paid company holidays; Waiting period-free 100% paid parental leave. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran, or disability status.

title: Full Stack Developer (Remote)
description: About Joveo: Every company says they're "AI-first." We actually are. Joveo's recruitment advertising platform processes millions of hiring decisions through machine learning, real-time bidding, and predictive analytics — helping the world's largest employers find the right people, faster and fairer. But we're not done. Not even close. Role: Full Stack Developer Location: Remote Role Overview: We are hiring a Full Stack Developer to own both the frontend experience and backend infrastructure of features across Joveo's platform. You will work across the entire stack — from pixel-perfect UI to scalable APIs — shipping work that directly impacts how employers and job seekers connect. Key Responsibilities: - Build and maintain frontend interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks - Develop scalable RESTful or GraphQL APIs on the backend - Architect database schemas and manage data access layers - Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility for web interfaces - Collaborate with product designers to implement intuitive user experiences - Monitor, debug, and optimize system performance across the full stack Required Skills & Qualifications: - Proficiency in frontend frameworks such as React, Next.js, or Vue.js - Strong backend skills in Node.js, Python, or similar server-side languages - Experience with relational and/or non-relational databases - Understanding of REST and/or GraphQL API design patterns - Familiarity with cloud deployment, CI/CD, and containerization basics - Ability to work independently and take full ownership of features Equal Opportunity Employer: Joveo is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to building an inclusive workplace and welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of race, color, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, marital status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. All hiring decisions are made solely on the basis of qualifications, skills, and demonstrated ability. If your dream job is one that doesn't fit neatly into a job title — apply. Joveo. Where AI meets the future of work.

title: Node.js Full Stack Developer
description: Node.js Full Stack Developer Dublin 15 | Hybrid | Product Technology Company Company Snapshot Our client is a highly regarded product technology company based in Dublin 15 , building sophisticated software platforms used by international customers to improve automation, workflow efficiency, and digital operations at scale. They offer an excellent salary package, great benefits, and a genuinely nice environment to work in , backed by a very strong engineering culture and highly collaborative team setup . Having worked with this business for a number of years, we can confidently say they have a very solid team, low attrition, excellent leadership, and strong long term career progression opportunities . Engineers here are given real ownership, modern tooling, and the opportunity to contribute to meaningful product innovation. What They’re Looking For They are hiring a Node.js Full Stack Developer to join a high performing product engineering team focused on building and evolving modern web based software products. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys owning feature delivery end to end , from backend services through to polished frontend experiences, while working closely with product, design, and engineering stakeholders. Key experience includes: 5+ years of software engineering experience in commercial environments Strong hands on development with Node.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript Proven backend development experience using NestJS Frontend development expertise with Vue.js Strong experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs Solid understanding of MySQL, relational databases, and schema design Experience working with AWS cloud services and serverless architecture Exposure to LLM powered tooling, AI agents, or intelligent workflow automation Strong focus on clean code, maintainability, testing, and engineering best practice Comfortable working within Agile product delivery teams Core Duties The successful developer will play a key role in expanding an established product platform and delivering new capabilities across the stack. Responsibilities will include: Building new product features across backend services and frontend applications Developing scalable APIs and services using Node.js and NestJS Creating reusable and responsive interfaces with Vue.js Integrating third party systems and external services Modernising legacy modules and improving platform performance Contributing to AI driven product initiatives and LLM based automation features Turning business challenges into scalable technical solutions Writing robust unit and integration tests using Jest and TDD methodologies Working closely with product and design teams to shape technical solutions Supporting architectural improvements and continuous product enhancement Nice to Have Additional experience that would be beneficial: Exposure to React.js Experience in modern SaaS or product engineering environments AWS Lambda or event driven architecture knowledge CI/CD and DevOps pipeline familiarity Experience influencing architecture and technical roadmap discussions Strong communication and stakeholder engagement skills Desire to grow within a high quality team environment with excellent progression prospects

title: PHP Backend Developer (Laravel)
description: Com mais de 9 anos de existência a nível nacional, contamos com mais de 200 colaboradores com o nosso ADN e posicionamo-nos no mercado com 3 ofertas de serviço: Strategy (Outsourcing, Team as a Service, Tech Academies); R&D (Estágios, POC, Laboratório Tecnológico); Nearshore. Na ADENTIS centramo-nos nas PESSOAS e é este o nosso salário emocional: Equilíbrio entre a vida profissional e pessoal; Flexibilidade na rotina organizacional; Benefícios de saúde para colaboradores e familiares; Eventos Team Building; Protocolo com mais de 600 parceiros; Formação contínua através de um centro profissional de formação e certificação; Acompanhamento e feedback contínuo através de um plano personalizado; Progressão de carreira através de avaliações objetivas e diretas. IMPORTANTE: Exige-se fluência em português (falado e escrito) e autorização legal para trabalhar em Portugal. O que procuramos: Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática ou similar; Experiência sólida em desenvolvimento PHP orientado a objetos, com frameworks como Laravel; Fortes conhecimentos de bases de dados relacionais, como PostgreSQL; Experiência na construção de frontends ricos e responsivos (TypeScript, HTML, SCSS); Disponibilidade para idas ao escritório em Lisboa 1x por semana. Se queres fazer parte de uma empresa People First, junta-te a nós. We walk with you! REF: OPO.MPG.PLE Na Adentis defendemos a igualdade e valorizamos a diversidade. Criamos um ambiente seguro, diversificado e onde as oportunidades são iguais para todos os colaboradores! Não discriminamos com base em idade, etnia, orientação sexual, género, deficiência ou qualquer fator que não seja o mérito. Todas as candidaturas com competências para o cargo são bem-vindas!

title: Backend Developer Laravel/Python
description: About the Role We are seeking a high-impact (Python/PHP) Backend Developer with at least 4 years of experience who thinks beyond coding — someone who can design systems, build scalable APIs, and integrate AI into real-world products. This role is primarily backend-focused, with occasional light frontend tasks when needed. You will work on scalable, AI-driven platforms where performance, architecture, and clean code are essential. What You'll Do • Design and build scalable backend systems using Python • Develop and maintain robust RESTful APIs • Architect clean, modular, and production-ready systems • Integrate AI models, pipelines, and automation workflows into backend services • Optimize performance, security, and scalability • Handle basic frontend tasks (forms, buttons, simple layouts) when required • Collaborate closely with product, AI, and frontend teams • Follow best practices in clean code, documentation, and code reviews • Apply modern development methodologies in engineering workflows What We’re Looking For • 4+ years of strong hands-on experience in backend development • Advanced understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) • Experience building scalable systems (not just small projects) • Solid knowledge of API design and architecture • Familiarity with AI tools, LLMs, model integration, or AI pipeline • Basic frontend knowledge (HTML, CSS, simple JavaScript) • Experience working in startups or fast-paced environments is a plus • Strong problem-solving mindset • Ability to write clean, maintainable, production-level code Bonus Points • Experience with system design & microservices • Experience with cloud deployments (AWS, GCP, or Azure) • Understanding of performance optimization & security best practices • Experience in SaaS or product-based development

title: Tech Lead Backend (PHP / Laravel)
description: En Vermont Solutions buscamos un/a Tech Lead Backend que actúe como pieza clave entre el equipo de España y la dirección tecnológica en Argentina. Serás la persona encargada de guiar técnicamente al equipo local , asegurar la alineación con los estándares globales y representar al área de IT ante stakeholders en España. Este rol combina liderazgo técnico, visión estratégica y capacidad de comunicación , siendo fundamental para garantizar una ejecución sólida, consistente y de alta calidad. 🛠️ Responsabilidades Serás el punto de referencia técnico en España , asegurando calidad, alineación y buenas prácticas en el desarrollo. 🔹 Guiarás técnicamente a un equipo joven 🔹 Asegurarás la alineación con estándares globales 🔹 Participarás en decisiones técnicas clave 🔹 Representarás IT ante stakeholders y dirección 🔹 Colaborarás en certificaciones, auditorías y documentación Tu día a día incluirá: ✔️ Definir y validar soluciones técnicas ✔️ Detectar riesgos y mejorar la calidad del desarrollo ✔️ Trabajar alineado con PM y líderes técnicos en Argentina ✔️ Participar en reuniones con stakeholders (incluida dirección) ✔️ Apoyar procesos de cumplimiento (ISO, ENS, CE) ✔️ Asegurar consistencia técnica y documental ✔️ Posición híbrida, con asistencia de 2 días a la semana a oficina en zona Goya, Madrid. ✅ Requisitos 👨‍💻 Perfil con al menos 2+ años de experiencia. 📚 Formación Ingeniería en Sistemas, Informática, Software o similar Se valorará formación en arquitectura, calidad o seguridad 📌 Experiencia en: Desarrollo backend sólido Rol como referente técnico o perfil senior Buenas prácticas (testing, clean code, documentación) Interacción con perfiles no técnicos (valorado) ⚙️ Stack tecnológico: LAMP Stack Laravel (o frameworks similares) Arquitectura Hexagonal, DDD, event-driven APIs (diseño, desarrollo e integración) MySQL Git & Docker SOLID, Clean Code, patrones de diseño Testing unitario Optimización de rendimiento ⭐ Valorable ISO 27001, ENS Alto, CE Experiencia en auditorías o certificaciones 🎯 Soft skills clave ✨ Criterio técnico y madurez ✨ Comunicación clara y ejecutiva ✨ Capacidad de liderazgo técnico ✨ Confiabilidad y responsabilidad ✨ Serenidad bajo presión 🎁 ¿Qué ofrecemos? En Vermont Solutions , creemos que trabajar debe ser divertido y satisfactorio. Aquí tienes algunas de las ventajas de unirte a nuestro equipo: Plan de Formación y certificaciones técnicas. Desarrollo profesional y plan de carrera definido. Flexibilidad horaria Plan de retribución flexible acorde a tus necesidades (seguro médico privado, cheques formación para estudiar idiomas, cheques guardería, tarjeta transporte...). Modelo de gestión sostenible y políticas de igualdad efectiva, ambientes de trabajo abiertos e inclusivos. Si buscas un nuevo proyecto, ¡en Vermont Solutions estamos deseando conocerte!

title: Senior Laravel Engineer (FinTech)
description: New Role for my UAE Network - Senior Laravel Engineer (Fintech) 🇦🇪 Dubai (Hybrid) Start Date ASAP FinTech/Trading ***Can be fully remote for the next 6 months given tensions in the region*** What you’re looking for: - 7+ years Laravel (production systems) - Experience owning systems end-to-end (architecture → deployment → on-call) Strong experience with: - Event sourcing / CQRS - MySQL optimisation (queries, indexing, performance) - Queues + real-time systems (WebSockets) - Writes clean, tested code (Pest/PHPUnit) - Comfortable in production environments handling real money / high-stakes systems - Solid DevOps understanding (CI/CD, deployments, logs) - Strong problem-solving + ownership mindset Bonus: Fintech / payments / trading experience Laravel ecosystem depth (Livewire, latest releases, packages) What they’ll do: Own and build complex fintech platforms Make architecture decisions Handle performance + production issues Mentor engineers and raise standards Key filter: Not junior/mid — needs to be someone who can hit the ground running in a complex codebase immediately. hashtag#Fintech hashtag#TradingTech hashtag#Payments hashtag#Brokerage hashtag#FinancialSystems

title: Node JS & Laravel Developer
description: About the Role We are looking for a Backend Engineer with strong Laravel (PHP) experience and working knowledge of Node.js to support legacy applications while actively contributing to our transition toward a modern Node.js-based backend architecture. This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy modernizing systems, working across stacks, and growing into a Node.js-first backend or full-stack role. Technology Stack Current · Laravel (PHP) · MySQL / PostgreSQL · REST APIs Target / Future · Node.js (Express / NestJS) · TypeScript · React (frontend) · API-first & service-oriented architecture · CI/CD pipelines Key Responsibilities Legacy Application Support · Maintain and enhance existing Laravel applications · Fix bugs, optimize performance, and apply security patches · Document legacy code and business logic to support migration Modern Backend Development (Node.js) · Develop and maintain backend services using Node.js · Build RESTful APIs consumed by React frontends and third-party services · Participate in rewriting or refactoring Laravel modules into Node.js services System Transition & Collaboration · Work closely with React frontend engineers, QA, and Product Managers · Participate in code reviews across Laravel and Node.js codebases · Contribute to backend architecture decisions and best practices · Support gradual decommissioning of legacy Laravel systems Required Skills & Experience Core (Must-Have) · 3+ years experience with Laravel (PHP) · Strong understanding of: o MVC architecture o Eloquent ORM o Authentication & middleware o Queues / background jobs · Experience building REST APIs · Solid SQL knowledge (MySQL / PostgreSQL) · Git version control Node.js (Working Knowledge Required) · Hands-on experience with Node.js · Familiarity with Express.js or NestJS · Understanding of asynchronous programming (promises, async/await) · Ability to read, debug, and contribute to Node.js codebases Nice-to-Have (Advantage) · TypeScript experience · Experience migrating or refactoring legacy systems · Knowledge of Docker and CI/CD pipelines · Exposure to React or frontend collaboration · Experience working in a product-led or SaaS environment What We’re Looking For (Mindset) · Willingness to transition toward Node.js as a primary backend stack · Comfortable working with legacy code while building modern systems · Strong problem-solving and ownership mindset · Good documentation and communication skills · Team-first attitude with long-term growth focus Growth & Career Path · Clear transition path from Laravel → Node.js Backend Engineer · Opportunity to grow into: o Senior Backend Engineer (Node.js) o Full-Stack Engineer (React + Node) o Technical Lead (Product Squad)

title: Lead Software Engineer - PHP/Laravel
description: We are seeking a Principal Software Engineer to lead development efforts for a well-established digital platform operating at the intersection of consumer marketplaces and enthusiast communities. This is a high-impact, hands-on leadership role responsible for driving full lifecycle development across a suite of web platforms supporting a large, engaged user base. This is a fulltime position that operates in a hybrid model, with onsite presence required in either New York City or Raleigh. U.S. work authorization is required. No visa sponsorship is available at this time. Job Title: Principal Software Engineer (Full-Stack, PHP/React) Location: Hybrid (New York City or Raleigh) Responsibilities Serve as a hands-on technical leader, managing and mentoring a team of engineers while contributing directly to code and architecture decisions Oversee the full software development lifecycle across multiple web platforms, including CMS-driven sites, eCommerce systems, and custom-built applications Lead system design and architecture for scalable, secure, and high-performance applications Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and executive leadership to define technical requirements, prioritize initiatives, and allocate resources Drive project planning, estimation, and execution to ensure timely and high-quality delivery Establish and enforce best practices for code quality, testing, and documentation Troubleshoot complex system issues, identify root causes, and implement effective solutions Evaluate and introduce new technologies to improve platform performance, scalability, and maintainability Foster a strong engineering culture focused on collaboration, accountability, and continuous improvement Required Skills & Experience 10+ years of experience in full-stack software engineering, with a strong background in web application development Proven experience in a technical leadership or engineering management capacity, including team mentorship and delivery oversight Strong proficiency in PHP and modern frameworks (e.g., Laravel), along with front-end experience in React or Vue Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and/or eCommerce systems (e.g., Shopify) is highly preferred Deep understanding of software architecture, design patterns, and scalable system design principles Experience working across a diverse tech stack, including modern JavaScript frameworks, relational databases, and web technologies (HTML, CSS, etc.) Strong communication skills, with the ability to interface effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders Experience operating in agile or iterative development environments Compensation Base Salary: $120,000 - $150,000 Additional Information Hybrid role with required onsite presence in either New York City or Raleigh Must be authorized to work in the United States — no visa sponsorship available Opportunity to convert to full-time based on performance and business needs Title may be flexible based on experience (e.g., Staff Engineer, Engineering Manager) For more information or to apply, contact Ryan Dwyer at rdwyer@Talener.com.

title: Junior Full Stack Developer
description: Job Overview We are looking for a Junior Full Stack Developer with 2 years of hands-on experience in modern web technologies. The ideal candidate should be comfortable working across both frontend and backend, with a strong understanding of building scalable web applications using PHP (Laravel) and modern JavaScript frameworks. Key Responsibilities Develop, test, and maintain web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP (Laravel). Build responsive and user-friendly frontend interfaces using React.js and Next.js. Collaborate with designers and backend teams to implement UI/UX features. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices. Debug and resolve technical issues across the stack. Integrate APIs and third-party services. Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability. Participate in code reviews and team discussions. Stay updated with emerging technologies and tools, including AI-assisted development tools like Cursor AI. Required Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Minimum 2 years of relevant full stack development experience. Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Experience with React.js and Next.js. Hands-on experience with PHP and Laravel framework. Understanding of RESTful APIs and backend integration. Familiarity with version control systems such as Git. Basic understanding of databases (MySQL or similar). Exposure to AI coding tools like Cursor AI is a plus. Location Bangalore (HSR Layout) – Onsite

title: Backend Engineer
description: About Alrik Construction is one of the world's largest industries — and most of it still runs on phone calls and paper notes. Alrik changes that. We're a transport intelligence platform that turns manual logistics into AI-powered workflows for builders merchants, hire companies, and material suppliers across Northern Europe. Today, Alrik is business-critical software for some of the biggest builders merchants in the Nordics and the UK — and we're expanding into the rest of Europe. Our team is small and tight, which is deliberate. We'd rather have fewer, better people who genuinely shape what we build. Our north star: become the most customer-focused tech company in the world. For engineering, that means you don't just write code that ships — you talk to the people who use it, understand their problems firsthand, and build solutions that create real value. The Role As a Backend Engineer, you'll join a small core team building the systems behind real-time construction logistics. You'll own features end-to-end — from a conversation with a customer to code running in production. We rarely hire — but right now we're gaining real traction, with a growing list of customer projects and demand for new features that our current team can't keep up with alone. This isn't a backfill. It's a deliberate decision to add someone who will raise the bar and grow with us as we scale across Europe. What You'll Do Talk to customers and build what they need. You'll regularly engage with the people using Alrik — understanding their workflows, pain points, and what "good" looks like to them. Then you'll design and ship features and integrations that solve real problems. Balance today's needs with tomorrow's opportunities. You'll deliver working software in short iterations while thinking about where the product should go next — including how AI and new technologies can make us faster and better, and how it affects what we build. Shape how we work. In a team this size, your opinions on architecture, tooling, and engineering practices directly influence the culture. We expect you to have opinions and share them. Our Tech Stack Python, FastAPI, Pydantic, MySQL, Pub/Sub, TypeScript, and GCP. If you're strong in another modern backend language, that's a perfectly fine starting point — we care more about how you think than which language you've been typing in. What We're Looking For You're good with people. Customers and colleagues genuinely enjoy working with you. You can explain technical trade-offs to non-technical people without being condescending. You've shipped products that solve real problems , with a few years of backend experience under the hood. We care more about what you've built and why than how long you've been doing it. You thrive in small teams with short feedback loops. You're comfortable shipping frequently, iterating based on real usage, and owning the outcome. You take ownership and stay curious. You don't wait to be told what to do. You dig into problems, ask questions, and care about the details. You communicate clearly in English , written and spoken. Swedish is not required. You're able to work in Sweden. What We Offer Direct influence on the product. You'll shape architecture decisions, roadmap priorities, and how we work — not just execute tickets. A team that punches above its weight. Small, skilled, and energized colleagues who care about building great software. Competitive salary Generous equity participation — we want you to have real skin in the game as we grow. 30 days vacation Healthcare and wellness allowance Hybrid setup from our Stockholm office — we value in-person collaboration and also respect focused time at home. Interested? Apply through LinkedIn or send your CV and, if you'd like, links to anything you've built that you're proud of. We'd love to hear from you.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Who are we Housr is a fast-growing, well backed Series A tech company on a mission to radically improve the student rental experience across the globe. The company was founded after co-founders Harry and Ben experienced first-hand how broken, stressful and outdated student renting felt while at university and decided there had to be a better way. Since then, Housr has grown rapidly across the UK and the US, partnering with leading colleges and operators to create a fairer, simpler and more transparent rental journey for students and parents alike. We now operate across our 3 offices - Manchester, Chicago and New York. In 2025, Housr hit $10m ARR before raising a $10m Series A , giving us the runway and ambition to scale rapidly! Today, we’re a close-knit global team of ~45 people (plus a large student brand ambassador network), with engineering at the heart of everything we build. Under the leadership of our Founders, Harry Neil Panter and Ben Clayton , the focus is clear: move fast, build with purpose, and make a genuine impact on student lives. This is a pivotal moment to join - we’re looking to double the engineering team and enter the most ambitious product phase in Housr’s history. * Hybrid Work Policy - We’re big advocates of in-person collaboration. We’re in the office four days a week, with Thursday as a team-wide work from home day* What You’ll Do As a Full Stack Engineer , you’ll be a core contributor as we scale our platform, launch new revenue streams, and deepen the value we offer students, parents and partners. Day to day, you’ll: Build and maintain backend services and APIs using the latest versions of PHP and Laravel Develop frontend experiences across React, Next.js and React Native (Expo) Work within an AWS environment (EC2, AppRunner, CodePipeline, S3, RDS) Collaborate closely with internal Product and Design teams - with clear ownership, strong feedback loops, and real influence on decisions Contribute to a clean, modular codebase with a MySQL database at its core Review code, share knowledge, and help shape best practices across the team Use AI tools in your development workflow (we actively encourage it) while applying sound engineering judgement and QA Work is planned collaboratively by Product and Engineering, ensuring the team is aligned, focused, and shipping meaningful improvements every sprint. What We’re Looking For 2x mid-level Full Stack Engineer s (around 3+ years commercial experience), ideally with time spent in a startup or scale-up environment You may lean slightly backend or frontend, but you’re comfortable working across the stack You’ll have commercial experience with our current stack: Laravel / PHP (core backend services & APIs) React, Next.js and/or React Native AWS infrastructure MySQL You care about code quality, performance and maintainabilityYou’re comfortable using AI tools (e.g. Cursor, Claude, Copilot) as part of your workflow — and know how to review, validate and improve AI-assisted output You’re ambitious, proactive and want your work to have visible, real-world impact You enjoy working in a close-knit, collaborative engineering team where voices are genuinely heard You’re based in (or can commute to) the North West and are happy with our hybrid setup 💸 What we offer Salary - Genuinely Market Competitive!! (We’re happy to disclose our benchmarked bandings during the interview process) Share Options - The opportunity to gain from Housr’s success with our Share Options scheme (again, we’re happy to discuss during the interview process) Holiday - 25 days off, plus bank holidays each year Free Gym Membership - Keep fit, with free use of our on-site gym Monthly Team Lunches - At the end of each month, we all grab lunch together as a team, and also have the afternoon off to focus on ourselves Company socials - A chance to let our hair down as a team. Past socials have ranged from paintball to ping pong tournaments - we’re quite competitive! Amazing Central Manchester office space 📝 Interview Process First Stage - Exploratory call with our Talent Partner to discuss your experience and go through any initial questions (30 mins) Second Stage - Informal video call with one of Senior Developers - learn what it's like to be a Engineer at Housr (30 mins) Third Stage - Remote hiring task to evaluate key skills for the role Fourth Stage - A single F2F interview split into two parts: Part 1 - A chance for us to chat through your task (what went well, what you’d improve with more time etc) (30 mins) Part 2 - Wider ranging questions about your experiences and motivations for working at Housr, approaches to certain scenarios, working style and what you’ll bring to this role (30 mins) Offer - If we think it’s a good fit, we’ll make you an offer! 🎉

title: Full Stack Web Developer
description: As a Full Stack Web Developer, you will play a crucial role in building and maintaining robust web applications. This position requires a developer who is skilful in both frontend and backend programming, with a keen eye for detail, and the ability to translate business requirements into technology solutions. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications from concept through deployment. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features. Collaborate the current external web team we are working with. Implement intuitive user interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks, ensuring a seamless user experience. Develop server-side functionality using PHP and other relevant technologies. Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability. Perform rigorous testing and debugging to ensure high-quality code. Maintain and improve existing web applications, websites. Stay up-to-date with emerging technologies and industry trends. Troubleshoot and solve technical issues as they arise. Leverage cloud platforms such as AWS and/or Tencent Cloud for application deployment and management. Deploy and test work from external teams to ensure alignment with project specifications and company standards. Preferred Skills and Qualifications Proven, at least 3-5 years of experience as a Full Stack Developer or similar role. Proficiency in front-end languages, including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Solid understanding of PHP and experience with popular PHP frameworks like Laravel or Symfony. Strong experience with JavaScript frameworks such as React.js or Angular.js. Familiarity with database technologies such as MySQL and MongoDB. Understanding of RESTful services and API integrations. Experience with version control systems, preferably Git. Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Strong communication and collaboration abilities. Familiarity with DevOps practices and tools like Docker and Jenkins. Understanding of web security principles and best practices. What we offer A dynamic, collaborative, and supportive work environment. Competitive salary and benefits package. Downtown office, in the heart of Budapest. Indoor bike storage. Flexibility with remote or hybrid work arrangements, depending on your location. An opportunity to work on a globally recognized application transforming education. Company BOOKR is an industry-leading publisher, pioneering interactive reading-based edutainment tools to help children foster native and/or second language skills. Our book editor software and matching multiplatform is award-winning, with 2000+ fully animated, gamified books already developed and growing. Currently, operating with 35+ digital experts based in Budapest hub and growing. Flagship product: BOOKR Class an award-winning ESL/EFL tool. https://corp.bookrkids.com/
