title: Senior PHP Engineer
description: Location: Remote Salary: £70,000 - £80,000 About us At Arbor, we're on a mission to transform the way schools work for the better. We believe in a future of work in schools where being challenged doesn't mean being burnt out and overworked. Where data guides progress without overwhelming staff. And where everyone working in a school is reminded why they got into education every day. Our MIS and school management tools are already making a difference in over 7,000 schools and trusts. Giving time and power back to staff, turning data into clear, actionable insights, and supporting happier working days. At the heart of our brand is a recognition that the challenges schools face today aren't just about efficiency, outputs and productivity - but about creating happier working lives for the people who drive education everyday: the staff. We want to make schools more joyful places to work, as well as learn. About the role We are looking for an experienced and driven Senior PHP Engineer to join our Engineering team and help lead and drive the successful completion of high-impact features, specifically contributing to the advancement of Arbor products. The remit and focus of the role is to contribute towards the development of the companies core systems and processes, as well as implement strategies to enhance and optimise product quality and lead time across the entire team. It's a broad and exciting role, so we're looking for someone up for a challenge - if you're a collaborative and enthusiastic Engineer, this is the role for you. Core responsibilities Work closely with the Engineering Manager, Tech Lead, QA Engineer, and Product Manager to help solutionise feature requests Lead the creation of detailed documentation for new feature developments, incorporating diagrams for comprehensive project understanding Drive the development and implementation of advanced tests around new features, ensuring the highest standards of test coverage and reliability Demonstrate expertise in producing well-architected, efficient, and scalable code using industry-leading design patterns and methodologies Take a leadership role in code reviews and pair programming sessions, guiding and mentoring colleagues towards excellence Lead and actively participate in tech-talks, workshops, and team-based learning initiatives, ensuring knowledge is disseminated effectively across the team Requirements About you Extensive and demonstrated experience with Object-Oriented languages and software development Considerable experience in software development, specifically with PHP Advanced understanding and application of best practices and software engineering principles, including SOLID, DRY, etc Expertise in relational database technologies Proactive problem-solving approach with a strategic mindset Proven experience in designing and writing APIs and services within a service-oriented environment Leadership qualities demonstrated through collaboration and mentorship A team player, willing to muck in and help others when needed, driven personality who asks questions and actively participates in discussions Good written and spoken English so you can present your ideas - our HQ is based in London Bonus skills Past experience with enterprise solutions and large-scale systems Familiarity with Scrum methodology or other agile development processes Experience with cloud computing Experience with Docker and containerisation Familiarity with software best practices such as Refactoring, Clean Code, Domain-Driven Design, Test-Driven Development, etc Benefits What we offer The chance to work alongside a team of hard-working, passionate people in a role where you'll see the impact of your work everyday. We also offer: A dedicated wellbeing team who champion initiatives such as mindfulness, lunch n learns, manager training, mental health first aid training and much more! 32 days holiday (plus Bank Holidays). This is made up of 25 days annual leave plus 7 extra company wide days given over Easter, Summer & Christmas Life Assurance paid out at 3x annual salary Comprehensive wellness benefit provided by AIG Smart Health, which provides a 24/7 virtual GP service, Mental health support, Counselling, and personalised Health Checks Private Dental Insurance with Bupa Salary sacrifice Pension provided by Scottish Widows Enhanced maternity and adoption leave (20 weeks full pay) and paternity (6 weeks full pay) pay 5 free return to work maternity coaching sessions, helping you adapt to this new exciting time of life! Access to services such as Calm and Bippit (financial wellbeing coaching) All of our roles champion flexible working and we are happy to discuss what this means to you Social committees that plan team, office and company wide events to bring people together and celebrate success Dedicated professional development training budget (CPD courses, upskilling resources, professional memberships etc) Volunteer with a charity of your choice for a day each year Dog friendly offices! Interview process Phone screen 1st stage 2nd stage We are committed to a fair and comfortable recruitment process, so if you require any reasonable adjustments during your application or interview process, please reach out to a member of the team at careers@arbor-education.com. Our commitment is also backed by our partnership with Neurodiversity Consultancy, Lexxic who provide us with training, support and advice. Arbor Education is an equal opportunities organisation Our goal is for Arbor to be a workplace which represents, celebrates and supports people from all backgrounds, and which gives them the tools they need to thrive - whatever their ambitions may be so we support and promote diversity and equality, and actively  encourage applications from people of all backgrounds. Refer a friend Know someone else who would be good for this role? You can refer a friend, family member or colleague, if they are offered a role with Arbor, we will say thank you with a voucher valued up to £200! Simply email: careers@arbor-education.com Please note: We are unable to provide visa sponsorship at this time.

title: PHP Engineer, 1
description: Every career journey is personal. That's why we empower you with the tools and support to create your own success story. Be challenged. Be heard. Be valued. Be you ... be here. Job Summary The Engineer, 1 is responsible for implementing software based on technical designs, writing clean, efficient code, and executing comprehensive unit tests. Building on foundational experience, this role involves deeper participation in team activities and collaborative Agile practices, fostering further growth in software engineering skills, contributes to project outcomes and identifies any major problems that may arise from system enhancements. This role requires contribution to full stack development throughout the SDLC, focusing on enhancing frontend, backend, and UI/UX components and collaboration with teams to ensure seamless integration and optimal performance. Essential Job Functions Contribute to the development and enhancement of technology solutions by implementing software based technical designs. Write clean, maintainable code with minimal supervision and begin to independently translate business requirements into functional components. Provide technical and on call support. Respond to incident inquiries. Resolve medium complexity issues and adhere to project timelines. - (15%) Conduct unit tests to verify functionality and identify issues. Actively participate in peer code reviews to ensure compliance with standards and continue learning best practices. Support continuous improvements for application quality, testing and efficiency by contributing insights and suggestions during team retrospectives. - (15%) Take a more prominent role in leading full stack development projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and implement software solutions. Leverage your growing expertise to ensure seamless integration and optimal performance throughout the software development lifecycle (SDLC). - (15%) Build on your experience to create even more responsive user interfaces and robust backend systems. Utilize modern frameworks and technologies to develop scalable applications, consistently adhering to best practices in coding, testing, and deployment. Take charge of complex troubleshooting and lead efforts to resolve software defects efficiently. - (15%) Play a key role in enhancing user interfaces by applying advanced UI/UX design principles. Collaborate closely with designers and developers to ensure intuitive and visually appealing user experiences. Actively gather and analyze user feedback, contributing to the continuous improvement of the software's usability and overall user satisfaction. - (15%) Collaborate as part of a cross-functional Agile team, fostering communication and teamwork to achieve project goals. Engage with team members to deepen understanding of processes and tools while actively seeking feedback from peers and mentors to enhance technical and business knowledge. - (15%) Gain proficiency in at least one programming language. Contribute to the development or maintenance of foundational components for financial applications and actively enhance technical knowledge through training and hands-on learning. - (10%) Minimum Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in computer science or related field of study or equivalent, relevant work experience 2+ years of work experience in related field (Software Development Life Cycle across Full Stack, Frontend and Backend Development and UI / UX engineering). Preferred Qualifications 5+ years of work experience in related field (Software Development Life Cycle across Full Stack, Frontend and Backend Development and UI / UX engineering). Skills Agile Methodology DevOps Java JavaScript Microsoft Azure Functions Microsoft Azure SQL Full Stack Development AWS Development React.js Angular Flutter Software Development Kit (SDK) Reports To : Manager and above Direct Reports : 0 Work Environment Normal office environment, hybrid. On-call rotation to include evenings or weekends. Other Duties This job description is illustrative of the types of duties typically performed by this job. It is not intended to be an exhaustive listing of each and every essential function of the job. Because job content may change from time to time, the Company reserves the right to add and/or delete essential functions from this job at any time. About Bread Financial® At Bread Financial, you’ll have the opportunity to grow your career, give back to your community, and be part of our award-winning culture. We’ve been consistently recognized as a best place to work nationally and in many markets and we’re proud to promote an environment where you feel appreciated, accepted, valued, and fulfilled—both personally and professionally. Bread Financial supports the overall wellness of our associates with a diverse suite of benefits and offers boundless opportunities for career development and non-traditional career progression. Bread Financial® (NYSE: BFH) is a tech-forward financial services company that provides simple, personalized payment, lending and saving solutions to millions of U.S. consumers. Our payment solutions deliver growth for some of the most recognized brands in travel & entertainment, health & beauty, technology, electronics, jewelry, home and specialty apparel through our co-brand and private label credit cards and pay-over-time products providing choice and value to our shared customers. Additionally, we offer Bread Financial general purpose credit cards and saving products that empower our customers and their passions for a better life. Bread Financial proudly marks 30 years of success in 2026. To learn more about our global associates, our performance and our sustainability progress, visit breadfinancial.com or follow us on Instagram and LinkedIn. All job offers are contingent upon successful completion of credit and background checks. Bread Financial is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Job Family Information Technology Job Type Regular

Le Centre Informatique National De L’Enseignement Supérieur (CINES) Est Un Établissement Public à Caractère Administratif Placé Sous La Tutelle Du Ministère De L’Enseignement Supérieur, De La Recherche Qui a Pour Missions Principales : Le calcul numérique intensif : mise à disposition d’un supercalculateur de niveau mondial avec une équipe d’ingénieurs support dédiée ; L’archivage pérenne : conservation à long terme de données électroniques sur disques et bandes magnétiques ; L’hébergement d’environnements informatiques : hébergement de baies informatiques appartenant à des établissements nationaux et régionaux. Le CINES propose à plus de 1300 utilisateurs scientifiques des moyens informatiques importants pour mener à bien leurs recherches. Il dispose pour cela d’un datacentre de 1500 m² constitué de 5 salles machines et doté d’équipements de pointe dont Adastra, l’une des plus puissantes machines de calcul mondiale (10ème en Novembre 2022). Le CINES compte un effectif de 68 agents et est structuré en cinq départements : Calcul intensif (DCI), Archivage et Services aux Données (DASD), Services Informatiques (DSI), Patrimoine immobilier et Logistique (DPL) et Administration générale (DAG). Descriptif du service Le CINES compte un effectif de 68 agents et est structuré en cinq départements : Calcul intensif (DCI), Archivage et Services aux Données (DASD), Services Informatiques (DSI), Patrimoine immobilier et Logistique (DPL) et Administration générale (DAG). Vous serez affecté au sein du DASD. Le poste est basé au CINES à Montpellier, sis 950 Rue Saint-Priest. À propos de l'offre Emploi et rémunération : Contrat à durée déterminée de 12 mois. Rémunération brute annuelle : entre 24000 € et 28 800 euros selon expérience Quotité de travail : temps plein. title: Full Stack Entwickler / Developer (m/w/d) - Schwerpunkt PIM (Pimcore) - Vollzeit Remote Deutschland

Der Fokus liegt auf der Arbeit mit Pimcore (PHP / Symfony) – gleichzeitig ist es von Vorteil, wenn du auch im Frontend mitdenken und unterstützen kannst. B. zu Shop, ERP oder Drittsystemen) Sicherstellung von Datenqualität und konsistenter Datenhaltung Unterstützung bei der Automatisierung von Datenprozessen Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Fachbereichen (z. B. E-Commerce, Einkauf, Marketing) Optional: Unterstützung bei frontendnahen Themen (z. B. Datenvisualisierung oder UI-Anpassungen) Qualifikation Dein Profil Mindestens 3 Jahre Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung Gute Kenntnisse in PHP und idealerweise Symfony Erfahrung mit Pimcore oder vergleichbaren PIM-/CMS-Systemen von Vorteil Sicherer Umgang mit Datenstrukturen, Datenmodellierung und SQL Verständnis für Schnittstellen (REST, APIs) Strukturierte und datengetriebene Arbeitsweise Erfahrung in der Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Fachbereichen Deutschkenntnisse auf mindestens C1-Niveau Nice to have Grundkenntnisse in HTML, CSS, JavaScript Erfahrung mit Angular Erfahrung im E-Commerce-Umfeld Kenntnisse im Umgang mit großen Datenmengen oder Produktdaten Benefits Eine herausfordernde und abwechslungsreiche Tätigkeit in einem motivierten Team Die Möglichkeit, sich in einem schnell wachsenden Online-Unternehmen zu engagieren und zu entwickeln Ein attraktives Gehaltspaket und zusätzliche Benefits wie Urlaubs- und Weihnachtsgeld Wir haben ein Gleitzeitmodell mit Kernarbeitszeiten, ggf. anfallende Überstunden kannst du in Freizeit ausgleichen. title: Desarrollador Full Stack Senior - San Fernando de Henares
company: Pardo Selección Personal Sanitario y Recursos Humanos

title: Développeur Full Stack – CDI – Nabeul (Tunisie)

SOCA International est une société de développement web offshore spécialisée dans des solutions à forte valeur ajoutée pour les professionnels de santé en France, Belgique et Suisse. Nous concevons des solutions innovantes en : - Télémédecine - Intelligence Artificielle - Logistique (RFID) Notre ambition : Construire une équipe technique solide pour nos projets internes, puis développer une activité orientée clients européens. Votre mission : - Développement de solutions web sur-mesure - Conception et évolution d’applications - Intégration frontend et backend - Participation à des projets innovants Profil recherché Indispensable : - Bonne maîtrise du français - Esprit analytique - Rigueur, implication, ambition - Esprit d’équipe Formation : - Bac +3 minimum - Débutants acceptés Compétences techniques Backend : - PHP (Symfony, Laravel, CakePHP) - API (REST / GraphQL / ASP.NET) Frontend : - JavaScript (NodeJS, VueJS, jQuery, AJAX) - HTML / CSS responsive - Bootstrap CMS : - WordPress, PrestaShop, Shopify Autres : - SQL / JSON - Linux, Apache, UNIX - Odoo Ce que nous offrons : - CDI dès l’embauche - Rémunération attractive - Mutuelle groupe - Environnement international - Projets techniques avancés - Plan de carrière évolutif Conditions : - Poste en présentiel à Nabeul - Pas de freelance / pas de télétravail - Type de contrat : CDI – Temps plein Candidature Envoyez votre CV à : recrutement@socainternational.com

title: Tech Lead / Architecte Fullstack (Symfony / Angular) _ Projet médical
description: Dans le cadre du développement d'un pôle application à forte dimension médicale, nous recherchons un Tech Lead / Architecte logiciel pour concevoir et piloter l’architecture technique d’un produit critique en matière de sécurité, qualité et conformité réglementaire . Vous jouerez un rôle central dans les décisions techniques et la structuration du produit, en collaboration étroite avec les équipes produit, qualité et conformité Vos missions Architecture & vision technique Concevoir et faire évoluer l’architecture logicielle de la plateforme (API, services, front) Définir les standards techniques et les bonnes pratiques de développement Garantir la scalabilité, la robustesse et la maintenabilité du système Concevoir des API sécurisées et des services métier fiables Structurer une architecture adaptée à la gestion de données de santé sensibles Leadership technique Encadrer et accompagner les développeurs Mettre en place des pratiques d’ingénierie solides (code review, normes, documentation) Piloter la qualité du code et les standards d’architecture Participer aux décisions techniques structurantes du produit Qualité, sécurité & conformité Intégrer les contraintes de sécurité dès la conception (security by design) Garantir la traçabilité, la qualité et la fiabilité des développements Participer aux audits techniques et aux démarches qualité Contribuer à la conformité (RGPD, données de santé, hébergement sécurisé) Vos compétences Backend PHP 8+ Symfony (architecture modulaire, API Platform apprécié) Frontend Angular (applications métier complexes) API & architecture API REST sécurisées Architecture orientée services / modulaires Données MySQL, PostgreSQL DevOps & qualité Git, CI/CD Tests automatisés (unitaires, intégration, fonctionnels) Sécurité Authentification, gestion des accès (RBAC) Chiffrement, protection des données sensibles Profil recherché 5 à 10 ans d’expérience en développement web Expérience confirmée en architecture applicative Excellente maîtrise de Symfony Bonne maîtrise d’ Angular ou forte appétence frontend Expérience dans la conception d’ API sécurisées Bonne maîtrise des bases de données SQL Expérience en environnements CI/CD Culture forte de qualité logicielle et sécurité Atouts appréciés Expérience dans des projets e-santé ou données sensibles Connaissance des contraintes RGPD / HDS Expérience dans des environnements réglementés Connaissance d’architectures type : DDD, hexagonale, microservices (ou monolithe modulaire) Ce que nous recherchons avant tout Un leader technique , pas uniquement un développeur senior Une forte capacité à structurer un produit dans la durée Une personne à l’aise dans un environnement exigeant et réglementé Un excellent communicant avec les équipes techniques et métiers

title: PHP-ontwikkelaar
description: Over de organistatie Deze organisatie richt zich op e-commerceoplossingen voor diverse, leuke klanten. Van grote, bekende spelers tot minder voor de hand liggende projecten, juist daar liggen vaak de mooiste technische uitdagingen. Ze ondersteunen hun klanten van A tot Z: van strategie en design tot oplevering en support. Daarnaast beschikken ze over veel expertise in het koppelen met ERP- en PIM-systemen. Hiervoor hebben ze ook een eigen platform ontwikkeld. De afgelopen jaren zijn ze zich bovendien steeds meer gaan toeleggen op maatwerkprojecten met Laravel. Vanwege aanhoudende groei zijn ze nu op zoek naar een nieuwe collega! Het team bestaat inmiddels uit meer dan 25 collega’s, verdeeld over specialisten in strategie, design, development en support. Uitdagend werk en plezier maken staan hier hoog in het vaandel. Daarnaast vinden ze het belangrijk dat iedereen zichzelf kan zijn. Een no-nonsens cultuur dus, waarin je samen gaat voor kwaliteit. Ook buiten het werk om ondernemen ze graag leuke dingen: van hackathons en teamuitjes tot een wandeling tussen de bedrijven door. Functie omschrijving Als PHP Developer ga je aan de slag binnen een van de drie Scrumteams. Jouw team is compact en bestaat uit vier developers van verschillende niveaus. Je werkt mee aan zowel het integratieplatform als het hostingplatform, beide gebouwd met Laravel en VueJS. Naast je hands-on werkzaamheden ben je als ervaren developer ook betrokken bij de begeleiding van collega’s en denk je proactief mee over nieuwe technieken en oplossingen. Er is volop ruimte voor eigen initiatief — zo is het huidige hostingplatform bijvoorbeeld opgezet door een van je collega’s! Eisen Je hebt een aansluitende of relevante opleiding afgerond. Je beschikt over kennis en ervaring met PHP, bij voorkeur met Laravel. Ervaring met front-end development is een pluspunt. Ervaring met Vue.js is een pré. Je hebt aantoonbare werkervaring binnen de e-commerce. Je bent analytisch sterk en denkt graag in oplossingen. Je kunt goed omgaan met vrijheid en weet je werk zelfstandig te plannen. Je vindt het leuk om naast je eigen werk ook anderen binnen het team verder te helpen. Aanbod Salarisindicatie tussen de €4.000,- en €5.500,- bruto per maand, afhankelijk van kennis en ervaring Een uitdagende baan met veel zelfstandigheid en vrijheid in je werk Ruimte om nieuwe technieken te onderzoeken en uit te proberen Ruimte om relevante opleidingen en trainingen te volgen Een MacBook Pro en telefoon van de zaak Ergonomisch ingerichte werkplek Volledige vergoeding van reis- en onkosten Mogelijkheid tot thuiswerken (minimaal 2 dagen per week op kantoor) Een goede pensioenregeling 25 vakantiedagen en 8% vakantiegeld Werken in een klein, informeel en vooral gezellig team Voor meer informatie en om te solliciteren op deze functie kun je reageren via onderstaande contactgegevens. Je wordt binnen 24 uur gebeld mochten wij mogelijkheden voor je zien.

title: Lead Backend Engineer (Flow) (m/f/d)
description: Empowering every employee. Our mission is to be the world's most used AI employee experience platform by changing the way frontline employees work. At Flip, we have a clear goal: to revolutionize the world for frontline workers and give them a voice. Become a Flip Game Changer and work with an unbeatable team to ensure that all employees, no matter where they work, have access to their company's internal information. If you're ready to make an impact and shape the work lives of millions of people, then you've come to the right place! Job teaser What you can expect Lead a team of engineers designing, developing and operating our employee communication platform (backed by PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ), including specifically our structured, chat-driven workflows. At least 70 percent of your time is hands-on engineering work, the remainder is spent on technical leadership tasks. Our Flows subsystem is mostly written in Go with some PHP / Symfony, other parts of the system are built on a JVM-based (Kotlin, Micronaut) stack. We work remote within international (mostly European), cross-functional agile teams. We develop software following modern software engineering practices (API first, code reviews, automated tests, MR environments for exploratory testing before a merge, and some tasteful experimental AI augmentation). We deploy (Kubernetes, Helm) and monitor (Grafana, Sentry, Mixpanel) our services within the teams, with the support of a separate team of SREs for on-call duty. Join customer calls together with your product manager to understand their specific problems and empower your team to build solutions that cover a majority of customer contexts. Take charge on technical topics that are important to you, driving significant decisions, and seeking alignment across teams within our backend guild. What you bring to the table We're seeking a skilled, experienced engineer ready to step up and own complex challenges. Must Haves: 5+ years of software engineering experience, working on backend systems You have designed, implemented, deployed and operated event-based backend services, ideally including data-heavy integrations with other systems. You feel comfortable moving between two major tech stacks: you have experience with Go for backend services. you have some experience with the JVM-stack (preferably Kotlin / Spring). Excellent communication skills, that enable you to directly work with customers, partners and other important stakeholders Interest in developing your own skills and those of your team Nice-to-haves Experience working in SaaS startup environments Experience with PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ Experience with PHP / Symfony Fullstack development experience What we offer you Work mode: We’re remote-first, giving you flexibility to work from home. At the same time, we deeply value the power of in-person collaboration. Depending on the role, you’ll join occasional team events, workshops, or meetings in our Berlin or Stuttgart offices - always with plenty of notice. The exact balance will be discussed during your interview. Work-Life-Balance: We don't want you to grow roots to your desk chair. That's why we cover the costs of your E-Gym-Wellpass membership and offer job bike leasing. Celebrating success: Expect highly motivated and committed people in a relaxed working atmosphere. Be part of something bigger : You actively shape Flip in your role. Along the way, you are an enabler of the rapid growth process of a young tech company and grow towards your goals, fun is guaranteed. Happy to be a Flipster: Stay tuned for regular team events and culture days that bring us together as Flipsters. Working abroad: At Flip you can also work abroad in the European Union. Let's talk about remote work in the interview. At Flip, everyone is welcome - no matter what gender you identify as or how old you are. Sexual identity, origin, religion, world view and disabilities do not influence your potential job at Flip. The most important thing is that YOU fit in!

title: PHP Developer
description: We are Webartstudio, a rapidly growing company based in Chalandri, Athens. We are looking for a skilled and motivated PHP Developer to join our team and work on eCommerce projects primarily based on Opencart and WordPress . About this role We are seeking a driven PHP Developer with strong problem-solving skills to join our eCommerce development team in Chalandri, Athens. If you are passionate about technology, constantly aiming to learn and enhance your skill set, and eager to tackle advanced front-end and back-end challenges, you are exactly who we are looking for! Duties and Responsibilities Collaborate with a team to develop modules, services, and eCommerce solutions based on Opencart and WordPress. Code, test, and operate front-end and back-end applications. Address complex performance issues and architectural challenges. Utilize tools and creativity to identify and fix bugs before they escalate. Document both existing and new applications. Requirements Excellent experience with PHP Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) Familiarity with AI-powered development tools and modern coding assistants such as Claude Code, Codex, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, or similar tools, for improving productivity, debugging, code review, and development workflows Familiarity with MVC patterns (e.g., used in frameworks like Laravel, CodeIgniter, etc.) Proficiency in debugging and performance optimization Solid knowledge of SQL (MySQL, MariaDB) Comfortable working with REST/SOAP APIs Strong communication skills, self-motivated, team player Ability to tackle complex problems, requirements, and design Willingness to learn from our experienced staff Constantly striving to stay current with new tools and best practices Nice to Have Front-end expertise Familiarity with JavaScript frameworks/libraries such as React, Vue, or jQuery Strong skills in HTML5 and CSS3 Experience with CSS preprocessors (e.g., Sass or Less) Understanding of build tools (e.g., Webpack, Gulp, or npm scripts) Version control knowledge (e.g., Git) Benefits Competitive salary (based on experience) Team bonding activities, including happy hours/events Career development opportunities and educational programs A friendly and dynamic work environment

title: Junior Backend Software Development Engineer
description: What You'll Do: You'll ldevelop web applications—introducing new workflows, enhancing usability, and actively contributing to the design and implementation of full-stack features. Collaborate closely with Product and UX to shape new features, design solutions, and plan smooth rollouts. Align product and customer priorities with operational and technical requirements. Ensure high-quality, maintainable, and scalable code. Drive technical decisions and help define the architecture of both new and existing features. Who You Are: BS in Software Engineering or equivalent practical experience 2+ years of experience in programming with C#, Java, Scala, or another backend language, along with a willingness to learn and work with .NET/C# Strong communication and collaboration skills; able to navigate and build connections across distributed teams and functions Product-minded: dedicated to delivering exceptional customer experiences Committed to quality through sound design principles, automated testing, and thorough documentation Passionate about shipping performant, reliable software Self-starter with a strong sense of ownership and accountability A clear communicator and dependable team player We acknowledge that many candidates may not meet every single role requirement listed above. If your experience looks a little different from our requirements but you believe that you can still bring value to the role, we’d love to see your application! Who We Are: Criteo is a leader in commerce media, helping brands, agencies, and publishers create meaningful consumer connections through AI-powered advertising solutions. We’re shaping a more open and sustainable digital future for advertising. At Criteo, our culture is as unique as it is diverse. From our offices across the globe or from the comfort of home, our 3,600 Criteos collaborate together to build an open, impactful, and forward-thinking environment. We foster a workplace where everyone is valued, and employment decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and business needs—never on non-job-related factors or legally protected characteristics. What We Offer: 🏢 Ways of working – Our hybrid model blends home with in-office experiences, making space for both. 📈 Grow with us – Learning, mentorship & career development programs. 💪 Your wellbeing matters – Health benefits, wellness perks & mental health support. 🤝 A team that cares – Diverse, inclusive, and globally connected. 💸 Fair pay & perks – Attractive salary, with performance-based rewards and family-friendly policies, plus the potential for equity depending on role and level. Additional benefits may vary depending on the country where you work and the nature of your employment with Criteo.

title: MCP BackEnd developer
location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
description: MCP BackEnd developer We are looking for MCP BackEnd developer to join Unikie Team. The Mission is to ensure the MCP servers are fed by clean, high-quality data and that the model’s tool-use performance is constantly being monitored and tuned. Responsibilities Design and maintain MCP Servers (Python/TypeScript) that expose internal data and functions to the model. Author rigorous JSON Schemas for tool definitions to ensure high model accuracy and reduce hallucinations. Architect secure Transport Layers (SSE/stdio) to bridge the gap between AI clients and remote data sources. Implement Least Privilege authorization logic to ensure the AI only accesses the data it absolutely needs. Core Requirements: Expert-level knowledge of JSON-RPC, REST APIs, and Security protocols. Experience with LLM function-calling behaviors and prompt orchestration. Expanded Responsibilities Semantic Data Engineering: Curate the datasets that power MCP tools. This involves cleaning unstructured data so that the "Search" or "Fetch" tools return high-signal results. Evaluation Pipelines (LLM-as-a-Judge): Build automated testing suites to "score" how well the LLM uses the MCP tools. If the model fails to call a tool correctly 10% of the time, you identify if the schema or the data is the bottleneck. Prompt Versioning & Registry: Manage a centralized repository of system prompts and tool definitions, ensuring that a change in the backend data schema doesn't break the model's ability to reason. Inference Monitoring: Track "Time to First Token" and "Tool Execution Latency" to optimize the costs and speed of the MCP backend. Added Skills: LangSmith/Weights & Biases (for monitoring), Vector Database management (Pinecone/Weaviate/pgvector), and Python-based ETL pipelines. The selected candidates will be invited to an interview for further discussion.

title: Backend Engineer
location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
description: About the role As a Backend Engineer, you will be responsible for developing, and maintaining robust and scalable backend systems. You will work closely with crossfunctional teams, including product managers and frontend engineers, to understand requirements and translate them into efficient and reliable backend solutions. Core responsibilities Your primary function in this role is to develop, and maintain backend systems using Java, Kafka, REST APIs, and Spring Boot framework. Working in a collaborative environment with a Lead/Senior Developer, Product Manager, Engineering Manager or Solutions Architect. Design, develop, and maintain backend services and microservices using Python for data processing, automation, and AI/ML model integration. Build and maintain AI-enabled APIs that expose machine learning and generative AI capabilities to internal and external applications. Integrate LLM and AI services (e.g., model inference endpoints, vector databases, embedding pipelines) into existing backend architectures. Implement prompt orchestration, caching, and monitoring mechanisms to optimize performance and cost of AI services. Mentor and provide guidance to junior engineers, assisting them in their technical growth. Containerize applications using Docker and deploy them on Kubernetes clusters. Collaborate with frontend developers to design and develop RESTful APIs that provide seamless integration between frontend and backend components. Write efficient and optimized SQL queries to interact with PostgreSQL databases. Ensure the quality of code through thorough unit testing and performing code reviews. Collaborate with other engineers on this project. Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to backend services in a timely manner, including performance bottlenecks, scalability, and reliability. Optimize and fine-tune backend systems for performance and scalability. Monitor and maintain production environments, ensuring high availability and performance. Work closely with DevOps engineers to automate deployment processes and improve system scalability and resilience. Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry best practices, and share knowledge with the team. About you 3-5 years plus industry experience Proven experience as a software engineer with expertise in Java, Spring Boot, JavaScript, Kafka, Docker, NodeJS (Javascript), Python, Keycloak and PostgreSQL. Proficiency in developing/building scalable, fault-tolerant systems using Java Microservices, Kafka and RESTful APIs. Good knowledge of SQL and hands-on experience with PostgreSQL or similar databases. Understanding with containerization technologies like Docker and container orchestration platforms like Kubernetes. Experience working in UNIX/Linux environments, including shell scripting Good understanding of unit testing principles and experience with testing frameworks like JUnit, and code quality tools like Sonarqube. Good communication skills and the ability to clearly articulate technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. An understanding of software development best practices, design patterns, and coding standards Familiarity with version control systems, such as Git. A high level of attention to detail and the ability to produce accurate and consistent engineering documentation Ability to work independently and effectively in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. Strong communication skills both written and verbal A desire to contribute to and maintain the company values and culture Nice to have Experience in data ingestion systems, other message brokers, and data streaming Knowledge of Python, NodeJS and GraphQL Experience with Agile development methodologies is a plus. Experience with HL7 Integration between external systems is a plus Familiarity with software project tracking tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence)

title: Billing Systems Developer (PHP / Go)
description: About Command|Link Command|Link is a global SaaS Platform providing network, voice services, and IT security solutions, helping corporations consolidate their core infrastructure into a single vendor and layering on a proprietary single pane of glass platform. Command|Link has revolutionized the IT industry by tackling the problems our competitors create. In recognition for our unprecedented innovation and dedication, Command|Link was recognized as the SD-WAN Product of the Year, ITSM Visionary Spotlight, UCaaS Product of the Year, NaaS Product of the Year, Supplier of the Year, and the AT&T Strategic Growth Partner. Command|Link has built the only IT platform for scale that solves ISP vendor sprawl and IT headaches. We make it easy for our customers to get more done, maximize uptime and improve the bottom line. Learn more about us here! This is a 100% remote position! About Your New Role We’re seeking a Billing Systems Developer to build and scale the financial systems that power Command|Link’s platform. This role sits at the intersection of engineering, finance, and data, ensuring billing is accurate, resilient, and fully auditable across a global customer base. You’ll own key components of billing, from invoicing and payments to reconciliation and reporting, where precision and reliability are critical. Key Responsibilities Design and develop scalable billing systems (invoicing, usage-based billing, credits, taxes, proration) Build and maintain ledger-based financial systems with full auditability Integrate with payment gateways (Stripe, ACH, etc.) Ensure idempotent processing to prevent duplication and inconsistencies Develop reconciliation workflows to detect and resolve discrepancies Architect resilient systems with retry, rollback, and recovery mechanisms Optimize and manage large financial datasets, including historical data Build and maintain APIs for billing services Debug complex production data issues and support safe data migrations Partner with finance, product, and engineering teams to evolve billing logic Takes on additional responsibilities and projects as needed to support the success of the team and organization. What You'll Need For Success Core Engineering Strong experience with PHP and/or Go Proficiency in MySQL (joins, indexing, performance tuning) Comfortable in Linux/Unix environments (Bash, command line) Experience with Git Financial Systems Experience with billing, payments, or financial transactions Understanding of double-entry / ledger-based systems Knowledge of taxes, proration, credits, and adjustments Familiarity with payment processors (Stripe, ACH) Data & System Design Strong grasp of data integrity, ACID principles, and concurrency Experience with audit trails, traceability, and reconciliation Background in event-driven or queue-based architectures Experience designing APIs and evolving system logic over time Operations & Security Strong debugging skills, especially with production data issues Experience with cron jobs / scheduled processing and data migrations Awareness of secure financial data handling, PCI, and RBAC Why you'll love life at Command|Link Join us at CommandLink, where you'll have the opportunity to shape the future of business communication. We value the innovative spirit and seek individuals ready to bring their unique vision and expertise to a team that values bold ideas and strategic thinking. Are you ready to make an impact? Apply now and be the architect of your career as well as our clients' success. Room to grow at a high-growth company An environment that celebrates ideas and innovation Your work will have a tangible impact Flexible time off Fun events at cool locations Employee referral bonuses to encourage the addition of great new people to the team At CommandLink, we’re committed to creating a fair, consistent, and efficient hiring experience. As part of our process, we use AI-assisted tools to help review and analyze applications. These tools support our recruiting team by identifying qualifications and experience that align with the requirements of each role. AI tools are used only to assist in the evaluation process — they do not make final hiring decisions. Every application is reviewed by a member of our recruiting or hiring team before any decisions are made.

title: ReactJS Developer
description: About The Position We are looking for a senior developer to join our team. You will be interacting with Support team members as part of their support and enhancement team to help solve their challenging business problems, create innovative solutions, and implement innovative ideas to provide true value to the customer. title: React.js Developer - BATAM (Entry Level)

Where AI meets the future of work.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: **About Storytime** Storytime is a creator marketing platform that connects restaurants and local businesses with influencers to run authentic, high-impact campaigns. So in short, we empower influencers to post engaging content about the local restaurants they already know and love **The Role** We're looking for a Full Stack Engineer to join our small, fast-moving team. You'll work across our React web app, Flutter mobile app, native iOS influencer app, and Node.js backend — building features that directly shape the experience for both the businesses and creators on our platform. This is a high-ownership role. You won't just be executing product requirements, you'll be building end to end features **What You'll Work On** - Building and iterating on our React web dashboard (campaign management, creator analytics, redemption tracking) - Developing features for our Flutter mobile app (iOS & Android) used by businesses - Contributing to our native iOS creator app built with UIKit and SwiftUI - Designing and maintaining Node.js backend services and microservices that power both sides of the marketplace - Collaborating closely with product and design to ship features end-to-end - Contributing to architecture decisions as we scale **What We're Looking For** - 3+ years of full stack engineering experience - Strong proficiency in React with JavaScript and/or TypeScript - Experience with Node.js for backend and microservices development - Experience with Flutter for cross-platform mobile development - Familiarity with native iOS development using UIKit and/or SwiftUI is a plus -A strong design eye without always having a product designer - Comfort working in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where priorities can shift - Strong communication and a bias toward action **Nice to Have** - Experience with native iOS (UIKit / SwiftUI) - Background in marketplace or two-sided platform products - Experience with consumer apps or social/creator tools - Familiarity with analytics pipelines or data visualization **What We Offer** - Competitive salary + equity - Healthcare coverage - Hybrid flexibility - Opportunity to be an early, high-impact engineer at a growing startup - Direct access to founders and real ownership over what you build **How to Apply** Send an email to madeline@storytimeapp.io with: - Your resume - A link to your GitHub (if you have one) - A short note on why you're specifically interested in joining the Storytime team -Your favorite New York City restaurant

title: Backend Software Engineer, Manus
description: Manus — now part of Meta — is a general-purpose AI agent that bridges mind and action, handling complex tasks from start to finish. It enables people to delegate entire workflows across deep research, data analysis, and software development, turning advanced AI into reliable, practical results.We are seeking backend engineers to join our team in driving the development of Manus’s core infrastructure & business systems, as well as building cutting-edge products that enable our infrastructure & operations to connect billions of people around the world. As a member of our team, you will have the opportunity to work on complex technical problems, build new features, and improve existing products across various platforms. Our teams are constantly pushing the boundaries of system efficiency & user experience, and we're looking for individuals who can help us advance the way people connect globally. If you’re excited to collaborate with a diverse team and contribute to impactful projects, we encourage you to apply. Golang to support core AI product features Design, develop, and optimize APIs (RESTful and gPRC) ensuring efficient frontend-backend interactions Participate in system architecture design to ensure stability, reliability, and scalability at enterprise scale Handle large-scale data flows and optimize distributed systems for peak performance Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following industry best practices Implement custom user interfaces using latest programming techniques and technologies Develop reusable software components for interfacing with back-end platforms Analyze and optimize code for quality, efficiency, and performance Lead complex technical or product efforts and provide technical guidance to peers Architect efficient and scalable systems that drive complex applications Identify and resolve performance and scalability issues Work on a variety of coding languages and technologies Establish ownership of components, features, or systems with in-depth end-to-end understanding Lead and participate in technical syncs with Mandarin-speaking teams, translate and review technical specifications to ensure alignment across partners Minimum Qualifications: Hands-on experience with distributed systems, message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ), and caching technologies (Redis) Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, relevant technical field, or equivalent practical experience Solid understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization technologies Strong understanding of microservices architecture and service orchestration tools (gRPC, Kubernetes) Proficiency in database design, optimization, and management (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB) Experience with CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code practices 7+ years of backend development experience with demonstrated expertise in Golang Preferred Qualifications: Experience building and shipping high quality work and achieving high reliability Proficiency in Mandarin (spoken and written) is preferred to conduct daily meetings with Mandarin-speaking colleagues/vendors, and to review technical specifications in Mandarin Track record of setting technical direction for a team, driving consensus and successful cross-functional partnerships Experience working in international, distributed teams Experience in programming languages such as Python, C++, Java Exposure to architectural patterns of large scale software applications Previous experience in backend development for AI, ML, or SaaS products Experience improving quality through thoughtful code reviews, appropriate testing, proper rollout, monitoring, and proactive changes Experience designing, analyzing and improving efficiency, scalability, and stability of various system resources Experience owning a component, feature or system Demonstrated interest in AI products and emerging technologies Knowledge of infrastructure monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack) Familiarity with security best practices and compliance frameworks Contributions to open-source projects or technical community involvement Experience with performance optimization and large-scale system design Experience with payment processing systems, financial transactions, or fintech applications Passionate about AI technology with a strong interest in exploring AI-powered development tools and understanding AI product design principles Demonstrated ability to integrate AI tools to optimize/redesign workflows and drive measurable impact (e.g., efficiency gains, quality improvements) Experience adhering to and implementing responsible, ethical AI practices (e.g., risk assessment, bias mitigation, quality and accuracy reviews) Demonstrated ongoing AI skill development (e.g., prompt/context engineering, agent orchestration) and staying current with emerging AI technologies About Meta: Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. People who choose to build their careers by building with us at Meta help shape a future that will take us beyond what digital connection makes possible today—beyond the constraints of screens, the limits of distance, and even the rules of physics. Individual compensation is determined by skills, qualifications, experience, and location. Compensation details listed in this posting reflect the base hourly rate, monthly rate, or annual salary only, and do not include bonus, equity or sales incentives, if applicable. In addition to base compensation, Meta offers benefits. Learn more about  benefits  at Meta.

title: Laravel Entwickler
description: Wir entwickeln zwei zentrale Anwendungen für die Digitalisierung von Gemeinden, Städten und Kreisen: Serviceportal – für Bürgerinnen und Bürger, um Anträge und Anliegen einfach zu finden, online einzureichen und sich zu informieren. Fachverfahren – für die komplette und automatisierte Digitalisierung eines Antrags von dem Absenden bis zum Bescheid. Beide Anwendungen sind mit Laravel entwickelt, basieren auf einer modernen Monolithen-Architektur mit Services und sind noch jung – keine veralteten Systeme, kein technischer Ballast. Unser Ziel: endlich die oft umständlichen und papierlastigen Verwaltungsprozesse so einfach, schnell und nutzerfreundlich wie möglich machen. Wir arbeiten mit Start-up-Energie, aber in einem stabilen Umfeld. Aufgaben Entwicklung und Weiterentwicklung unserer beiden Laravel -basierten Kernanwendungen Umsetzung neuer Features von der Idee bis zum Deployment Technische Konzeption und Architekturentscheidungen im Team erarbeiten Sicherstellung von Code-Qualität, Performance und Wartbarkeit Mitarbeit an API-Schnittstellen und Integration externer Systeme Qualifikation Mehrjährige Erfahrung in PHP und Laravel Fundierte Kenntnisse in objektorientierter Programmierung , Softwarearchitektur und Datenbanken Erfahrung mit modernen Entwicklungsprozessen ( Docker, GitHub, CI/CD ) Selbstständige und strukturierte Arbeitsweise Freude an direkter, kollegialer Zusammenarbeit in einem kleinen Team Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift Optional: Erfahrung in Vue.js und GraphQL Benefits Arbeit an jungen Projekten – kein veralteter Code, keine jahrelangen Altlasten Hoher Gestaltungsspielraum in Technik und Umsetzung Kleine, fokussierte Teams – wenige Meetings , keine unnötige Bürokratie Kaum Kundenkontakt – Fokus auf Entwicklung Langfristig sicherer Arbeitsplatz mit Perspektive Flache Hierarchien und direkte Kommunikation Teil eines Teams, das Lösungen schafft, um das Leben von tausenden von Bürgern zu verbessern Du solltest dich nicht bewerben , wenn du gerne in größeren Teams mit klaren Hierarchien arbeitest, jeden Tag viele Abstimmungsrunden brauchst, dich hauptsächlich auf fest vorgegebene Aufgaben konzentrierst oder dich unwohl fühlst, wenn du technische Entscheidungen selbst treffen musst. Du solltest dich unbedingt bewerben , wenn du Freude daran hast, selbst mitzugestalten, lieber codest statt an Meetings teilzunehmen, technische Verantwortung übernehmen möchtest und dich darauf freust, effizient mit einem kleinen Team sinnvolle Software zu entwickeln, die einen Mehrwert für viele Bürger bringt.

title: PHP Developer
description: Hello there, thanks for paying attention to our vacancy and let us introduce ourselves. We are an IT company occupying a remarkable place in marketing, gaming, and financial segments of the iGaming industry. Our products are successfully implemented in European, African, and Latin American markets. Ever since we first started, we have been driven to find the best solutions in everything we do. At the same time, we have been creating strong connections worldwide, which have helped us establish our presence in the industry. We strive for fun, elegance, and efficiency in everything we do. You can feel this in our relaxed, homelike working environment. We offer employment and seek to hire only the brightest, most driven, and most gifted minds around. Currently, we are looking for an ambitious PHP Developer to join our team for full-time employment in our beautiful office in New Belgrade. Here are a few reasons to join us : competitive salary and constant encouragement for your efforts and contribution (annual salary review,); rapid growth (junior to CEO is a familiar journey for our company. We value business results and individuals eager to raise the bar. As an employer we provide supportive space to pursue your ideas); we are taking care of the overall well-being of our people by providing private health insurance and Fit Pass for all; work-life balance (25 working days of paid vacation, flexible schedule, corporate events, and team-building activities); modern and comfy office (easy-to-get office in new business center with a spectacular view, free fruits, and snacks in the office, playroom with billiard, tennis table, and PlayStation); we like to celebrate special days and have fun at our corporate events, and team-building activities, and we have special vouchers for our people's birthdays so you can enjoy your special day. In this role, you will collect, process, validate, send, and monitor important data. You will also communicate with colleagues responsible for checking and operating that data. This role is well suited for someone who is accurate, responsible, and comfortable working with data-heavy systems where mistakes are costly. As a PHP Developer at our company, we expect you to be responsible for: Develop and maintain PHP/Symfony backend functionality Build reporting features for regulators Process large datasets efficiently Ensure strict data validation and integrity Support data collection and submission workflows Work with queues and background jobs for asynchronous processing Monitor logs and system health in Kibana Investigate issues related to data processing and delivery Communicate with internal stakeholders involved in regulatory operations Help ensure that systems are stable, accurate, and reliable Required skills: 3+ years of professional experience in PHP development Strong experience with PHP 8.4 and typed code 3+ years of experience with Symfony(or related) Strong SQL knowledge: indexing complex joins window functions Experience with Doctrine, including optimization and batch processing Experience with message queues Experience supporting long-running background tasks Experience analyzing logs and monitoring systems in Kibana Strong attention to detail Good communication skills High level of responsibility for data accuracy and system reliability Good spoken and written English, sufficient to communicate clearly with stakeholders involved in regulatory and operational processes Will be an advantage: Experience with regulatory or compliance-related systems Experience with data pipelines and high-load data processing Experience in systems where validation and correctness are business-critical For our part, we are ready to provide you with our full and comprehensive support in order to successfully cope with this list of tasks. Our CMS department is waiting for you to become an indispensable part of it and to strengthen us with your personality.

title: PHP Developer
description: About The Company EarthCam is a global leader in webcam technology dedicated to providing construction teams with real-time visibility into their projects from anywhere in the world. Since its inception in 1996, EarthCam has pioneered innovative solutions supporting project monitoring, documentation, promotion, and security across construction sites worldwide. Our platform offers live video streaming, time-lapse recordings, progress tracking, and site security, all powered by intelligent AI tools that convert visual data into actionable insights for better decision-making. EarthCam has been trusted on major projects such as One World Trade Center, SoFi Stadium, and the Panama Canal Expansion, and seamlessly integrates with industry-leading tools like Procore, Autodesk, and Bentley. We are committed to building a collaborative, hands-on team that develops technology in-house, working closely across departments to solve real-world problems for our users. About The Role EarthCam is seeking a motivated and curious Junior Backend Developer to join our in-house development team. This role is pivotal in building and maintaining robust backend services and APIs that power our web applications. The primary focus is on utilizing PHP, specifically Laravel, to support reliable data flows between systems and enhance our platform’s capabilities. The ideal candidate will have a strong desire to learn, enjoy tackling complex problems, and take pride in writing clean, maintainable code. Collaborating closely with engineers, product managers, and UX teams, this role offers an excellent opportunity to grow technical skills and contribute meaningfully to innovative solutions that impact global construction projects. Qualifications The ideal candidate will possess a bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent practical experience. Hands-on experience with PHP and Laravel through coursework, internships, projects, or professional roles is essential. A solid understanding of backend fundamentals such as APIs, MVC architecture, authentication, and data modeling is required. Familiarity with relational databases, especially MySQL, including writing queries and understanding indexing, is preferred. Experience with version control systems like Git and project management tools such as Jira or Confluence is advantageous. Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript will facilitate cross-stack collaboration. Strong communication skills, a detail-oriented mindset, and a commitment to producing high-quality, maintainable work are critical for success in this role. Responsibilities The Junior Backend Developer will be responsible for developing and maintaining backend features using PHP (Laravel) to support product and business needs. This includes building and supporting RESTful APIs used by internal tools and customer-facing applications, ensuring seamless data exchange. The role involves working with databases, primarily MySQL, to design schemas, optimize queries, and improve overall performance. Implementing validation, authentication, authorization, and secure data handling practices will be key to maintaining system integrity. The developer will write clean, testable code, assist with debugging, bug fixes, and provide ongoing production support. Collaboration with front-end developers to integrate APIs and ensure end-to-end functionality is vital. Additionally, the role requires participating in code reviews, adhering to established development standards, documenting technical workflows, and staying current with backend development best practices and Laravel/PHP enhancements. Benefits At EarthCam, we believe in fostering a supportive and inspiring work environment where employees can thrive. Our benefits package is designed to promote health, well-being, and professional growth. Compensation starts at $55,000 annually, complemented by 100% company-paid health insurance coverage for employees, including dental and vision plans. We also offer a 401(k) plan with generous company matching to support your financial future. Paid time off and holidays ensure work-life balance, while our onsite amenities include complimentary breakfasts, lunches, and snacks. We regularly host team events, BBQs, and an annual company Olympics to foster camaraderie and team spirit. EarthCam is committed to creating an energetic, entrepreneurial workplace where your ideas are valued and your career can flourish. Equal Opportunity EarthCam is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse team enhances our ability to innovate and serve our global community effectively. All qualified candidates are encouraged to apply, and we are dedicated to providing a fair and transparent recruitment process.

title: Full stack Developer

title: Full Stack Engineer (m/w/d)
description: Du willst Lösungen entwickeln, die sauber deployen und im Betrieb langfristig tragen? Du liebst dieses gute Gefühl, wenn ein Release sauber durchläuft, das Monitoring grün bleibt und ein Produkt spürbar besser wird. Nicht durch Glück, sondern dadurch, dass du Architektur, Codequalität und Betrieb zusammendenkst. Bei Esono baust du genau solche Lösungen. Du entwickelst Full Stack, von stabilen Backend Services bis zu modernen Frontends, und behältst gleichzeitig den Betrieb im Blick. Du denkst in Schnittstellen, Datenflüssen und Failure Modes, setzt auf Automatisierung statt Handarbeit und sorgst dafür, dass Deployments reproduzierbar, Observability sinnvoll und Plattformen belastbar sind. Wenn du Verantwortung magst, gerne End to End arbeitest und dich sowohl in der Entwicklung als auch im DevOps Kontext zuhause fühlst, dann sind wir dein Match. Über uns Wir entwickeln und betreiben seit über 20 Jahren Web, App und E-Business Lösungen für mittelständische Unternehmen im deutschsprachigen Raum. Zu unseren Kunden zählen unter anderem: • Ambientedirect : Einer der größten europäischen Online Händler für Möbel und Wohnaccessoires • Buchmarkt / SPIEGEL Bestseller : Plattform für die renommierten Buchrankings im deutschsprachigen Raum • Tischwelt : Führender Anbieter für Tischkultur und Küchenzubehör im deutschsprachigen Raum Dein Arbeitsumfeld Du arbeitest bei Esono in Kundenprojekten und internen Vorhaben, in denen du Entwicklungs und DevOps Themen gleichermaßen bedienst, je nach Projekt und Auftragslage. Mal liegt der Fokus stärker auf Features und Architektur im Produkt, mal stärker auf CI CD, Deployments und Plattformstabilität. Immer mit dem Ziel, dass Code und Betrieb zusammenpassen und zuverlässig laufen. Du baust Backend Features und APIs, setzt moderne Frontend Komponenten um und bringst dich in die technische Konzeption ein. Gleichzeitig sorgst du mit Automatisierung, CI CD und Kubernetes dafür, dass Releases reproduzierbar laufen und Systeme verlässlich bleiben, von Docker Images bis zum Deployment Workflow. Je nach Skillset übernimmst du zusätzlich Verantwortung in Architektur und Plattformstandards. Du unterstützt andere Entwickler:innen, triffst technische Entscheidungen transparent und hilfst dabei, Infrastrukturkonzepte und gemeinsame Leitplanken weiterzuentwickeln, ohne den Hands on Fokus zu verlieren. Unser Tech Stack besteht unter anderem aus • PHP mit Laravel oder Symfony • Node.js • TypeScript • GitLab CI • React • Argo CD • MySQL / MariaDB • Elasticsearch / OpenSearch • Docker / containerd • Kubernetes • Helm • GitLab Deine Aufgaben als Full Stack Entwickler:in • Architektur-Design: Du konzipierst und entwickelst skalierbare Backend Systeme mit PHP, Symfony oder Laravel, und verbindest sie mit modernen Frontends wie React oder Vue.js. Dabei triffst du eigenständige Entscheidungen über Software Design Patterns und Schnittstellenarchitekturen. • Systemintegration: Du integrierst unsere Lösungen tief in bestehende Systemlandschaften wie ERP, PIM und CRM und sorgst für einen reibungslosen, automatisierten Datenaustausch. • Technical Ownership: Du begleitest Projekte vom ersten technischen Konzept über die Entwicklung bis hin zum Deployment. Dabei hinterfragst du Anforderungen kritisch und schlägst aktiv bessere technische Lösungswege vor. • DevOps & Skalierung: Gemeinsam mit unserem Infrastruktur Team optimierst du Deployment Pipelines und stellst sicher, dass deine Anwendungen in unseren Kubernetes Umgebungen performant und stabil laufen. • Qualitätsanspruch: Du setzt auf sauberen Code, automatisierte Tests und kontinuierliches Refactoring, um die langfristige Wartbarkeit unserer Individualprojekte sicherzustellen. • Research und kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung: Du nutzt einen Teil deiner Zeit für eigenständige Research und Development Themen, testest neue Technologien und treibst Weiterentwicklungen voran. • Prozessverbesserung und Mitgestaltung: Du wirkst an der Verbesserung unserer Prozesse mit und unterstützt eine nachhaltige, zukunftsfähige Weiterentwicklung unserer Entwicklungslandschaft. Das bringst Du mit • Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Full Stack Entwicklung mit PHP, idealerweise mit tiefen Kenntnissen in Symfony oder Laravel. Du verstehst die Konzepte hinter den Frameworks. • Abstraktionsvermögen: Du durchdringst komplexe technische Zusammenhänge schnell und kannst sie Teammitgliedern oder Kund:innen verständlich erklären. • Architektur Mindset: Du willst verstehen, warum etwas gebaut wird und nicht nur, wie. Eigenverantwortung und Mitgestaltung sind für dich selbstverständlich. • Cloud Native Affinität: Docker und Kubernetes sind für dich keine Fremdwörter, sondern Werkzeuge, mit denen du sicher arbeitest. • Du bringst sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse mit, da technisches Consulting ein integraler Bestandteil unserer Arbeit ist. • Gute SQL Kenntnisse und ein sicherer Umgang mit relationalen Datenbanken • Verständnis für sauberen Code, moderne Entwicklungsprinzipien und eine effiziente Umsetzung • Freude an Open Source und die Bereitschaft, Verantwortung zu übernehmen, auch im direkten Austausch mit Kund:innen in einem dynamischen Projektumfeld Lust auf einen Austausch ohne Floskeln? Wir wissen, dass Senior Entwickler:innen nicht einfach nach einem Job suchen, sondern nach der richtigen Herausforderung. Deshalb machen wir es dir einfach: • Kein Anschreiben nötig: Schick uns einfach dein LinkedIn Profil oder einen Link zu deinem GitHub Repository. • Meet a Dev: Bevor es in ein offizielles Gespräch geht, bieten wir dir einen 15 minütigen Video Call mit einem unserer Entwickler an. Stell deine technischen Fragen direkt unter Kolleg:innen, ganz ohne HR Filter. Klingt gut? Dann schreib uns eine kurze Mail an jobs@esono.de

title: Full Stack Engineer (Junior/Mid-Senior - PHP oriented)
description: Η CodeeHut είναι μια δυναμική εταιρεία που εξειδικεύεται στην ανάπτυξη καινοτόμων και εξατομικευμένων λύσεων λογισμικού. Με έμφαση στην παροχή αποτελεσμάτων υψηλής ποιότητας, αναπτυσσόμαστε δημιουργώντας εφαρμογές αιχμής που ανταποκρίνονται στις εξελισσόμενες απαιτήσεις πελατών από διάφορους κλάδους. Η ομάδα μας βασίζεται στη συνεργασία, τη δημιουργικότητα και την τεχνική αριστεία. Με έδρα τον Πειραιά , στόχος μας είναι να προσφέρουμε ευέλικτες συνθήκες εργασίας που υποστηρίζουν την επαγγελματική εξέλιξη και την ισορροπία μεταξύ επαγγελματικής και προσωπικής ζωής. Περιγραφή Ρόλου Αναζητούμε έναν Full Stack Engineer (Junior/Mid-Senior) με ισχυρό προσανατολισμό στην ανάπτυξη σε PHP . Πρόκειται για μια θέση πλήρους απασχόλησης με υβριδικό μοντέλο εργασίας ( hybrid ) στον Πειραιά, προσφέροντας τη δυνατότητα για ορισμένες ημέρες τηλεργασίας. Ο κάτοχος της θέσης θα ενταχθεί σε ένα σύγχρονο εργασιακό περιβάλλον όπου χρησιμοποιούμε το ClickUp για τη διαχείριση έργων (project management) και ενσωματώνουμε σύγχρονα εργαλεία Τεχνητής Νοημοσύνης (AI) στη διαδικασία ανάπτυξης των προϊόντων μας. Κύριες Αρμοδιότητες: Ανάπτυξη και βελτιστοποίηση κώδικα χρησιμοποιώντας τα frameworks Laravel (PHP) για το back-end και Angular για το front-end. Ανάπτυξη custom themes και plugins για ιστοσελίδες βασισμένες στο WordPress . Σχεδιασμό και υλοποίηση σύγχρονων διαδικτυακών εφαρμογών με τη βοήθεια AI tools για την ενίσχυση της παραγωγικότητας και της ποιότητας του κώδικα. Συνεργασία με διαλειτουργικές ομάδες μέσω του ClickUp για την αποτελεσματική παράδοση των projects. Συντήρηση και αναβάθμιση υφιστάμενου κώδικα, διασφαλίζοντας την υψηλή απόδοση και ασφάλεια. Προσόντα που θα εκτιμηθούν Back-End Development: Καλή γνώση PHP και αποδεδειγμένη εμπειρία στο framework Laravel . Front-End Development: Εμπειρία στην ανάπτυξη εφαρμογών με Angular και σύγχρονες τεχνολογίες front-end. WordPress Development: Ικανότητα δημιουργίας προσαρμοσμένων (custom) λύσεων (themes & plugins) στο περιβάλλον του WordPress. AI & Tools : Ενδιαφέρον για τη χρήση εργαλείων AI (π.χ. Claude) και εξοικείωση με πλατφόρμες διαχείρισης έργων όπως το ClickUp. Project Management: Εμπειρία στη χρήση εργαλείων οργάνωσης (κατά προτίμηση ClickUp ή παρόμοιων πλατφορμών όπως Jira/Asana). Software Principles: Κατανόηση των αρχών ανάπτυξης λογισμικού, καθαρού κώδικα (clean code) και των βέλτιστων πρακτικών. Soft Skills: Ισχυρές ικανότητες επίλυσης προβλημάτων και πνεύμα ομαδικής συνεργασίας. Εκπαίδευση: Πτυχίο Πληροφορικής, Μηχανικού Η/Υ ή συναφούς κλάδου (θα προτιμηθεί). Τι Προσφέρουμε Υβριδικό μοντέλο εργασίας και ευελιξία. Εργασία με τεχνολογίες αιχμής και σύγχρονες μεθοδολογίες. Φιλικό και δημιουργικό περιβάλλον εργασίας στον Πειραιά.

title: Junior Backend Developer (PHP)
description: At LINK, we connect businesses to customers through our communications products and services that drive engagement and satisfaction during each stage of the customer journey. You're probably already familiar with us: we're behind the messages you receive via SMS, WhatsApp, email, or even to check-in for your upcoming flight, receive delivery notifications, cash in a mobile coupon to your favorite store, and so much more. As a Junior Backend Developer , you will be part of our team of code geniuses! Your work will contribute to the improvement and maintenance of the SMSAPI platform, which is part of a European leader in mobile communication in the areas of mobile messaging, mobile solutions, and mobile intelligence. Your responsibilities will include writing clean code, designing, and developing new features for the SMSAPI platform. Your Responsibilities Developing new functionalities for the SMSAPI platform Actively participating in the analysis, design, and testing phases Continuously improving your skills through regular code reviews Refactoring Analyzing current system issues Learning to write automated tests Collaborating with the entire IT team (Frontend, Backend, Testers, Admins, DevOps, Product Management) Technologies We Use Daily PHP 8 CI/CD Docker RabbitMQ ELK MongoDB MySQL Redis Your Strengths You have at least 1 year of experience in a similar role Basic understanding of PHP You are familiar with best programming practices (TDD, BDD, DDD, SOLID) You are comfortable with version control systems We Offer Hybrid work model (2–3 remote days per week after onboarding) Flexible working hours Co-financed private medical care (Medicover) Co-financed Multisport card Co-financed Life insurance Team-building events Additional day off on your birthday Additional employer's PPK contribution Holiday bonus Free parking Lunches on Wednesdays and Fridays Fresh fruit in the office LINK Mobility is publicly listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange with offices in 18 countries throughout Europe. We continue to experience strong organic growth and recurring revenue as businesses move more activities onto mobile platforms. In 2023, LINK Mobility had a total turnover of 6.3 billion NOK. Every employee is an important member of LINK Mobility. We do not tolerate discrimination of any kind – whether active or passive – based on ethnicity, national origin, religion, disability, gender, sexual orientation, marital or parental status, union membership, political views, age, or any other characteristic that results in compromising the principle of equality. LINK regards diversity as a lever for innovation and profitability.

title: Alternant·e Développeur·se Web – PHP/Symfony
location: Nantes, Pays de la Loire, France
description: Chez Edflex , nous aidons les entreprises à relever le défi de l'obsolescence des compétences depuis 2016. Notre mission ? Accompagner la transformation des organisations en développant les savoirs des collaborateurs, via une plateforme unique qui centralise les meilleurs contenus de formation disponibles en ligne. Nous combinons technologie, pédagogie, et curation pour offrir une expérience d'apprentissage personnalisée, engageante et constamment mise à jour. Notre culture valorise l'innovation, la transparence, la curiosité et la performance collective. 🎯 Ce que tu vas apprendre et faire chez nous Encadré·e par ton tuteur, tu contribueras au développement et à l'évolution de notre plateforme, dans un environnement moderne et exigeant. Ton périmètre grandira progressivement avec ton autonomie. Tes missions : Participer au développement de nouvelles fonctionnalités back-end en PHP 8.3 / Symfony 6.4 Produire un code maintenable, testé et documenté Découvrir les bonnes pratiques de développement logiciel : Clean Architecture, Domain Driven Design Collaborer avec l'équipe produit pour comprendre les besoins fonctionnels Prendre part aux rituels agiles de l'équipe (daily, review, rétro, affinages…) Tu pourras également : Contribuer à l'amélioration de la performance applicative Participer à la mise en place d'outils d'observabilité (logs, monitoring, etc.) Être impliqué dans des réflexions sur l'architecture ou les choix techniques ⚙️ Notre environnement technique Langage : PHP 8.3 Framework : Symfony 6.4 Base de données : MySQL & PostgreSQL Messaging : RabbitMQ (messagerie asynchrone) Infrastructure : AWS, Docker, CI/CD Tests : PHPUnit (tests unitaires), Behat (tests BDD) Tu es actuellement en formation Bac+4 à Bac+5 en informatique (école d'ingénieur, université ou équivalent) et tu cherches une alternance pour approfondir tes compétences back-end dans un environnement stimulant. ✅ Ce que nous attendons de toi : Une bonne compréhension de PHP orienté objet: une expérience de projet personnel ou scolaire en PHP est un plus De solides bases en algorithmique et en logique de programmation, quel que soit le langage Une première expérience (projet ou stage) avec Symfony est appréciée, mais pas indispensable Une curiosité naturelle pour les bonnes pratiques et les architectures modernes (Clean Architecture, DDD) Une volonté d’apprendre, de progresser, et d’autonomie dans la recherche de solutions Un esprit proactif et ouvert : tu n'hésites pas à solliciter ton tuteur dès que tu bloques Une bonne capacité à communiquer, à poser des questions et à travailler en équipe Une utilisation réfléchie de l'IA : tu es capable de comprendre, expliquer et reviewer le code que tu génères 🎁 Bonus si : Tu as déjà touché à Docker, AWS ou GitLab CI Tu t’intéresses aux sujets DevOps ou d’architecture logicielle Tu as envie de participer à des meetups ou événements internes 🗒️ Process : Étape 1 : Entretien en visio avec notre People Officer de 30’ environ Etape 2 : Test technique en visio ou en présentiel avec le manager de la team et le tuteur de 45’ environ Étape 3 : Entretien en visio ou en présentiel avec notre CTO de 30’ environ ➕ Les avantages : Nous rejoindre, c’est l’opportunité de bénéficier de nombreux avantages à commencer par : Faire partie d’une équipe hyper motivée, avec un fort esprit d’équipe, des valeurs incarnées, le tout dans un environnement international (Paris, Nantes, Milan& Miami) 🌍 Avoir la chance d’échanger lors de nos différents rituels internes, pour vivre ensemble cette aventure incroyable ! (2 séminaires par an, 1 séminaire d’équipe par trimestre, des rdv mensuels “Show & Tell” pour partager autour des projets, des rdv trimestriels “Get Together” pour échanger autour de nos résultats et actualités, et beaucoup d’autres moments informels) 🙌 Pouvoir évoluer en même temps qu’Edflex et donc bénéficier d’évolutions rapides, en fonction de tes compétences et de ton engagement 📈 Rejoindre une entreprise à impact, certifiée Ecovadis 🥈, adhérente au Un Global Compact, fondatrice du mouvement L&D for Good, et qui soutien l’éducation partout dans le monde 💙 Mais aussi : Une mutuelle (Alan) prise en charge à 75% pour toi et ta famille 🚑 Des tickets restaurants pris en charge à 60% 🍔 La possibilité de faire du sport grâce à Wellpass 🤸 Une politique télétravail te permettant d’être 2 jours par semaine en home office, et de faire 2 semaines de full télétravail 2 fois par an 💻 Des bureaux en plein centre de Paris (We Work Jules Lefebvre), Nantes (Gare Sud), Milan ou Miami📍 Conformément à la réglementation, tous nos postes sont ouverts au recrutement de travailleurs en situation de handicap.
